### 3.5.5.0-4 PRACH occasions and slots configuration ~~[Before CB013669-A ]ORAN or ORAN Profile~~ [CB013669-A] NetConf Yang [End CB013669-A] FDD PRACH occasion configuration**** (ID: 11114878)

**3.5.5.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11114885`)

PRACH occasions and slots configuration L2-PS shall provide the information related to the PRACH transmission occasions in cell setup response for FDD FR1 cells only while actOranFDD activation flag is TRUE for the cell **[PR796340] (refer 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7230_replaced([11297583](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqH68_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), SRAN_SiSo_FH.969_replaced([10949785](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3XMNd_uyEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[End PR796340]. The information on PRACH transmission occasions will be sent to CP-RT. This information specifies the same set of parameters as the one used for RP1 and the parameters are specified in 5G_L2_IF_161_replaced([10967736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UUhkfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The CP-RT forwards this information to DU-cOAM, which translates the parameters (as specified in 5G_L2_IF_161_replaced([10967736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UUhkfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) into the ones specified for NetConf Yang, and subsequently forwards them to the RU.****

Note: actOranFDD actually means m-plane is using NetConf Yang profile. CB016669 plans to clean up the NIDD and link legacy function directly to NetConf Yang profile

---

### 3.5.5.0-5 PRACH occasions and slots configuration Number of valid PRACH occasions in PRACH association period configuration (ID: 11114888)

**3.5.5.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11114891`)

PRACH occasions and slots configuration gNB-DU shall provide the number of valid PRACH occasions in a PRACH association period in cell setup response. The information will be sent to CP-RT and utilized by 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_14949_replaced([11314172](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrvrsfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The number of valid PRACH occasions value is rrmNbValidRoInPrachAP in 5G_UP_ALG_1970_replaced([11111961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpRvS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

## 3.5.6 CSI-RS for tracking configuration

### 3.5.6.0-1 CSI-RS for tracking configuration (ID: 11114897)

**3.5.6.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `13481111`)

CSI-RS for tracking configuration 5G-L2-PS receives _CsiRsTracking (NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking) during cell setup_ _. This structure contains multiple entries of type_ CsiRsTrackingResourceSet, each of them itself contains multiple entries of type _CsiRsTrackingResource. If in this structure the parameter_ csirsTrackingEnable is set to TRUE, 5G-L2-PS shall add in the slot format pattern each CsiRsTrackingResource entry of each CsiRsTrackingResourceSet for all occurrences according to the slot offset of each CSI-RS resource and the periodicity also given in _CsiRsTracking._***** *

Each CsiRsTrackingResource shall contain the associated ssbBeamIndex of the CsiRsTrackingResourceSet and be identified as used for tracking.

For each CSI-RS resource, the pattern ID which corresponds to the SSB beam of the TCI-State linked to this resource shall be applied.

Note: In FR1, a CsiRsTrackingResourceSet for tracking is split over two consecutive slots with two CsiRsTrackingResource each.

[Before CB013712-B]In FR2, a CsiRsTrackingResourceSet for tracking is contained in a single slot with two CsiRsTrackingResources.[End CB013712-B]

For FR1 and more than a single SS/PBCH block, CSI-RS for tracking are sent in dedicated special or DL slots without SS/PBCH blocks, without multiplexing them in frequency with other physical channels or signals. In case 2 X-pool beams are used in one symbol for CSI-RS for tracking , every 6 SS/PBCH blocks, two additional slots have to be allocated as indicated by the respective RRC configuration provided by C-Plane at cell setup. This means, for 2 to 6 SS/PBCH blocks, two dedicated slots are needed, for 7 and 8 SS/PBCH blocks four dedicated slots are needed. If isCsirsTrackingResourceMultiplex

== FALSE, only one X-pol beam is available in one symbol for CSI-RS for tracking, it means for 2 to 3 SS/PBCH block, 2 dedicated slots are needed, for 4 and 6 SS/PBCH blocks, 4 dedicated slots are needed.

[Before CB013712-B]In FR2, CSI-RS for tracking are expected to be TDM in dedicated slots neither used for SS/PBCH nor for PDSCH.[End CB013712-B]

In FR1 and single SS/PBCH block (TDD and FDD), a CsiRsTrackingResourceSet for tracking is split over two consecutive slots with two CsiRsTrackingResource each.

In FDD, Both SSB slot with TRS and TRS slot(only configured with CSI-RS for Tracking without SSB shall be available for PDSCH scheduling with rate matching.

In TDD FR1,

  * SSB slot with TRS shall be available for PDSCH scheduling with rate matching.
  * if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is false or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false), then**,**
  * all TRS slots (only configured with CSI-RS for Tracking without SSB in normal DL slot or special slot with CSI-RS for tracking configured) shall be available for PDSCH scheduling with rate matching.
  * Note: This part is always selected in case of TDD eCPRI 7-2e, as ZAB privilege is removed and slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is equal to false in case of TDD eCPRI 7-2e. exception: Case actTddCsirsOpt equal true is not applicable as it is handled by other below "if statement" section



else if (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true) and (actTddCsirsOpt is true),

If NRBTS/NRCELL/actSubTrsRateMatch is TRUE [CB015769-A] and (NRBTS.maxNbMutedTrs is not configured or NRBTS.maxNbMutedTrs is equal to zero)[End CB015769-A]),PDSCH shall not be scheduled on TRS symbols in gNB-DU side. (Note: ZP-CSI-RS-Resource(row 9 in Table 7.4.1.5.3-1 of 38.211) will be configured at RRC level to exclude all REs on TRS symbols in UE side.), refer to 5G_UP_11590_replaced([11350121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubkDifvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When NRBTS/NRCELL/actSubTrsRateMatch is TRUE and NRBTS.maxNbMutedTrs is a non-zero value, refer to [12873824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_stj0ga8sEfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9);

If NRBTS/NRCELL/actSubTrsRateMatch is FALSE, PDSCH shall be scheduled on TRS symbols or not depending on the configuration of NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdschRmCsirsForTracking, refer to 5G_UP_11587_replaced([11350100](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubkDhvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: NRBTS/NRCELL/actSubTRSRateMatch and NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdschRmCsirsForTracking can't be set to true at the same time which is guaranteed by PDL

else

If actTddCsirsOpt is false,

all TRS slots (only configured with CSI-RS for Tracking without SSB in normal DL slot or special slot with CSI-RS for tracking configured), except for the ones where CSI-RS for a cell in a different CsiRsPoolingGroup could be transmitted, shall be available for PDSCH scheduling with rate matching.

Slots that could contain CSI-RS transmission symbols for a cell in a different CsiRsPoolingGroupId are determined in 5G_UP_ALG_11874_replaced([11117149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9rwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). L2-PS shall check if the TRS slots of the current cell over-lap with any of the slots determined in 5G_UP_ALG_11874_replaced([11117149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9rwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and disable PDSCH scheduling in such slots.

Else

If ((NRBTS/NRCELL/actSubTrsRateMatch is TRUE) and (NRBTS.maxNbMutedTrs is not configured or NRBTS.maxNbMutedTrs is equal to zero)), for the UEs in ZAB cells(5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and non-ZAB cells, PDSCH shall not be scheduled on TRS symbols in gNB-DU side. (Note: ZP-CSI-RS-Resource(row 9 in Table 7.4.1.5.3-1 of 38.211) will be configured at RRC level to exclude all REs on TRS symbols in UE side.), refer to 5G_UP_11590_replaced([11350121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubkDifvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When NRBTS/NRCELL/actSubTrsRateMatch is TRUE and NRBTS.maxNbMutedTrs is a non-zero value, refer to [12873824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_stj0ga8sEfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9);

If NRBTS/NRCELL/actSubTrsRateMatch is FALSE, for the UEs in ZAB cells (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and non-ZAB cells, PDSCH shall be scheduled on TRS symbols or not depending on the configuration of NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdschRmCsirsForTracking, refer to 5G_UP_11587_replaced([11350100](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubkDhvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

End

Note: NRBTS/NRCELL/actSubTRSRateMatch and NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdschRmCsirsForTracking can't be set to true at the same time which is guaranteed by PDL rule.

end

Note: While Specific BWP size function for TDD FR1 is enabled (that is, actSpecificBwpSize is true) together with PRB pooling (that is, slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true) and actTddCsirsOpt is false, CSI-RS for tracking shall be allocated within specific BWP area, and CSI-RS for tracking will use less PRBs than whole bandwidth. But to simplify the implementation, the case of enabled Specific BWP size function still follows the design of CSI-RS for tracking for the case that Specific BWP size function not enable while PRB pooling(that is cells in same L1 pool that are allowed to have CSI-RS for tracking concurrently are grouped together in same csirsPoolingGroup) refer more to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4276_replaced([11276704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpKRoPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If csirsTrackingPeriod > _rrmSlotPatternLength as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2296_replaced([11114662](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpmfb_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), then _rrmSlotPatternLength shall be extended to csirsTrackingPeriod such that the slot pattern built from _ssBurstSetPeriod and_ rrmPrachAssociationPeriod is repeated multiple times. Note that csirsTrackingPeriod always divides 160ms which is the maximum value for _ssBurstSetPeriod and_ rrmPrachAssociationPeriod.***** *

**NOTE: with PR416050 _csirsTrackingEnable shall be set to TRUE according to [NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking]._**

Note: in this artifact, actTddCsirsOpt is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator. 

For FR1 TDD the eligible slot determination is made using the configured slot format pattern as per 5G_UP_ALG_2313_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 3.5.6.0-2 CSI-RS for tracking configuration Beam IDs for symbols carrying CSI-RS for tracking (moved from Beam Control) (ID: 11114913)

**3.5.6.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `13479452`)

CSI-RS for tracking configuration **[Before CB013712-B] In FR2, if CSI-RS for tracking is enabled, then CSI-RS resources for tracking are sent in dedicated slots. Two CSI-RS resources are mapped per CSI-RS resource set to a slot, and up to 4 CSI-RS Resource sets per slot. Each CSI-RS resource set is mapped to a SSB.**[End CB013712-B]****

In FR1 and when the numberOfTransmittedSsBlocks is equal to 1 (MRBTS.NRBTS.NRCELLGRP.numberOfTransmittedSsBlocks), **the CSI-RS resource set for tracking comprises 4 resources in two consecutive slots. One of them may carry the SSB while the other one would be dedicated to CSI-RS.**

In FR1 and when the number of activated SS/PBCH is greater than 1 (nActivatedSsPbch, 5G_UP_82_replaced([11347116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if CSI-RS for tracking is enabled, then CSI-RS resources for tracking are sent in dedicated slots. If two x-pol beams are available, up to six CSI-RS resource sets per slot are possible (and used in case of 6 SS/PBCH blocks). Each CSI-RS resource set comprising 4 resources in two consecutive slots and it is mapped to an SSB Either 2 (for up to 6 SS/PBCH blocks) or 4 slots are needed.

 If _isCsirsTrackingResourceMultiplex == FALSE, CSI-RS for tracking can only be transmitted on one x-pol beam per symbol, see [5G_UP_ALG_1924_replaced([11111609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpOsAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]. As a consequence, CSI-RS for tracking for only one SS/PBCH block can be addressed per symbol, up to 3 per two slots._

If _isCsirsTrackingResourceMultiplex == TRUE, CSI-RS for tracking is transmitted on two x-pol beams per symbol, see [5G_UP_ALG_1924_replaced([11111609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpOsAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]. So, CSI-RS for tracking for two SS/PBCH blocks can be addressed per symbol, up to 6 per two slots. It is the default behaviour introduced by 5GC000533-H._

NB: CSI-RS for tracking resource allocation is given by CP-RT.

The value of DlData_CsiRsSendReq.csiRsScramblingSequenceInt is as in 5G_UP_ALG_3583_replaced([11159730](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktLX3fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In case of C4 subcell (introduced with 5GC000533-G), the second x-pol beam is sent on the same C4 subcell. A single DlData_CsiRsSendReq message is sent for both x-pol beams.

CSI-RS Resources are mapped to physical resources (symbols, slots) as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2343_replaced([11114897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpo7p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 

CSI-RS resource for tracking are mapped in _DlData_CsiRsSendReq in the increasing order of symbols and within a symbol in increasing order of SSB index associated to. Examples are given in 5G_UP_ALG_3591_replaced([11159895](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktMl9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))._

**NOTE: In case of DL C2 subcells, a separate message has to be sent to each impacted L2 C2 subcell.**

Beam ID for a CSI-RS resource for tracking is the beam ID of the SSB index it is associated to.

Antenna stream mapping on the subcells is given in 5G_L2_5042_replaced([11172243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26UoQ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**NOTE: with PR416050 _csirsTrackingEnable shall be set to TRUE according to [5G_CP_ARC_ALG_3594_replaced([11302779](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqhjnPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]_**

---

### 3.5.6.0-3 CSI-RS for tracking configuration TRS slot PDSCH scheduling restriction (ID: 12873824)

**3.5.6.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12873833`)

CSI-RS for tracking configuration When NRBTS/NRCELL/actSubTrsRateMatch is TRUE and NRBTS.maxNbMutedTrs is a non-zero value, for cell(A), within a TRS configured slot,

  * if the number of TRS symbols that require rate matching indicated by CPlane is less than the total number of configured TRS symbols, then the entire slot shall not be used for PDSCH scheduling, because only part of the TRS symbols can be configured as ZP which results in the TRS symbols becoming non-continuous within the slot. Refer to example in [11350121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubkDifvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
  * Otherwise, L2RT shall not schedule PDSCH on any PRBs belonging to the symbols which is indicated by Cplane in ZP CSI-RS configuration for TRS rate matching [11302024](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqd5MPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), while scheduling on the remaining other symbols.

---

## 3.5.7 Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1

### 3.5.7.0-1 Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Overview of cell specific CSI-RS - resource allocation (ID: 11114925)

**3.5.7.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11114930`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Overview

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12581041`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 If dlMimoMode is 'CL 8x4 MIMO' or **actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true** or **actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true, cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements transmission is requested as below:** ****

Note: CL 8x4 MIMO can only be enabled for TDD FR1 and actBeamforming is True and numOfSubSectors is 0.

Note: PUCCH resource pool for CSI feedback is not changed. PUCCH pool preparation is still triggered by PsCell_CellSetupReq and the calculation result is still in PsCell_CellSetupResp.

If cell CSI-RS/CSI-IM resources present in cell setup **request message** then L2 shall skip the allocation algorithm defined below but check the manual configured CSI-RS/CSI-IM as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_9381_replaced([11114973](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kppivPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));****

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true [CNI-147211-B] or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true [End CNI-147211-B], the support of manual cell-specific csi-rs resource allocation (configuration provided by CPRT), related to e.g. feature CB007601, is not yet considered.

Else (cell CSI-RS/CSI-IM resources is not present in cell setup request message):

The final cell specific CSI-RS resources shall be sent to control plane in cellCsiRsTimeDomainAllocation::resourceSet[] in PsCell_CellSetupResp or PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationReq.

After PsCell_CellSetupReq (5G_UP_ALG_7703_replaced([11114943](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kppitPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is received, L2 PS shall allocate intermediately the needed CSI-RS resources as 5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **and 5G_UP_ALG_2354_replaced([11115052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));**

After PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationReq (5G_UP_ALG_7706_replaced([11114990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is received L2 PS shall handle the interworking with OSI/Paging as 5G_UP_ALG_2357_replaced([11115060](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If {actDlSrsBm is true and dlMimoMode is 'CL 8x4 MIMO'} or **{actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see 5G_UP_82_replaced([11347116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than 4}, cell specific CSI-RS for channel acquisition is requested in parallel with UE specific CSI-RS for channel acquisition. Both UE specific CSI-RS resource list and cell specific CSI-RS resource list shall be returned to Cplane. The UE specific CSI-RS resource list shall exclude the whole slot that has the final allocated cell specific CSI-RS.**

Note: UE specific list is always feedback to Cplane at cell setup response, and Cplane will remove slots of Cell CSI-RS whenever it received them.

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11114943`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 **After PsCell_CellSetupReq is received**

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-2.0-8**  (ID: `12815912`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 After PsCell_CellSetupReq is received, L2-PS shall prepare the CSI-RS candidate lists:

  * Primary CSI-RS candidate list: csiRsResourcesInSsSlots, refers to 5G_UP_ALG_2514_replaced([11117226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true** or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = true AND actTddCsirsAllocOptimization = true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true), refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11299_replaced([11116720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6ocfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * Secondary CSI-RS candidate list: csiRsResourcesInDataSlots, refers to 5G_UP_ALG_2530_replaced([11117351](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S3_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true** or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = true AND actTddCsirsAllocOptimization = true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true), refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11299_replaced([11116720](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6ocfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).



L2 PS shall allocate intermediately the needed CSI-RS resources as 5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **and 5G_UP_ALG_2354_replaced([11115052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **defined and mark the situation if normal dl data slots are used (normal dl date slot means before CSI-RS allocation there is 14 dl symbols);****

During cell setup procedure,

If {cellWithSib1 is set as TRUE AND CSI-RS drop in the DL14 slot based on the intermediately allocation result in 5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2354_replaced([11115052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))} and actCsirsMultiplexing is false **and actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is false and actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is false**

L2 shall not fill the CSI-RS resources location in PsCell_CellSetupResp;

Else:

the intermediately allocated result in 5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2354_replaced([11115052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be the final result and be sent to CPRT in PsCell_CellSetupResp.

**Rationale: If CSI-RS drop in the DL14 slot and cellWithSib1 is configured to TRUE, L2-PS should wait PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationReq because CSI-RS may drop in the same slot of OSI/Paging whose DL symbol length is 14.** If actCsirsMultiplexing is true **or (actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true)** or actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true, cell specific CSI-RS and OSI/Paging can be scheduled in the same slot.**_*_** *

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset (defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32993_replaced([11118286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9MvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is True or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = true AND actTddCsirsAllocOptimization = true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true), 

If actTddCsirsOpt is false,

Cell Specific CSI-RS and OSI/Paging can not be scheduled in the same slot.

Else

Cell Specific CSI-RS and OSI/Paging can be scheduled in the same slot.

End

End

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true, the support of manual cell-specific csi-rs resource allocation (configuration provided by CPRT), related to e.g. feature CB007601, is not yet considered.

**[CB015668-A]** Note: in this artifact, actTddCsirsOpt is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator. **[End CB015668-A]** ****

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11114965`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Exception after PsCell_CellSetupReq is received: NoEnoughCellCsirsForChannelAcquistion

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11114969`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 If there is not enough resource to allocate (all/part) cell specific CSI-RS resource(s), L2 shall feedback NOK with cause (0x00001000)"NoEnoughCellCsirsForChannelAcquistion"

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11114973`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Check manual configured cell CSI-RS

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11114979`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 If cell CSI-RS/CSI-IM resources are manually configured by the operator then L2-PS shall skip the Cell specific CSI-RS allocation algorithm defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), but shall do below check and raise corresponding exceptions and reject the configuration:

1) whether they are conflict with SSB/SIB1/CSI-RS for tracking via checking primary list; if conflict is noticed CellCsirsForChannelAcquistionConlictWithSsbSib1Trs exception (as mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_8518_replaced([11114982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kppiv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is raised.

2) whether they are conflict with PDCCH symbols either in slots of primary (5G_UP_ALG_2521_replaced([11117299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or secondary list (5G_UP_ALG_2531_replaced([11117353](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-54PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))); if conflict is noticed CellCsirsForChannelAcquistionConlictWithPDCCH exception (as mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_8518_replaced([11114982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kppiv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is raised.

3) whether they are within slots in secondary list with 14 DL symbols but not allocated at the end of the slot, or not at secondary list at all; ); if conflict is noticed CellCsirsForChannelAcquistionNotSlotEnd exception (as mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_8518_replaced([11114982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kppiv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is raised.

4) If actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is set to TRUE;

[Before CB010784-A]whether they are within BI6,4 slot in primary list or within BI10,y slot in secondary list but not allocated at the end of the DL symbols in the slot pattern.[CB010784-A] whether they are within BIx,y slot but not allocated at the end of the DL symbols in the slot pattern.[End CB010784-A] if conflict is noticed CellCsirsForChannelAcquistionNotSlotEnd exception (as mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_8518_replaced([11114982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kppiv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is raised.

Note: If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and if cell CSI-RS/CSI-IM resources present in cell setup request, L2PS also shall skip the allocation algorithm but check as above description.

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11114982`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Exception of checking manual configured CSI-RS/CSI-IM: CellCsirsForChannelAcquistionConlictWithSsbSib1Trs

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11114986`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 If cell CSI-RS/CSI-IM resources present in PsCell_CellSetupReq are not configured properly then L2 shall feedback NOK with cause as below:

Note PDSCH scheduling in SSB slot and TRS slot are also considered.

By default all diagnosticInformation[0-13] fields are initialized to 0x00000000 and when the check is failed, then the 5G-L2-PS reports a negative acknowledgement in the PSCell_CellSetupResp message with the following information:

1) CellCsirsForChannelAcquistionConlictWithSsbSib1Trs

· The status is set to “NOK” (EStatus5G_NotOk).

· The cause is set to 0x00000002 (ECause5G_InvalidParameter).

· The “diagnosticInformation“ array is fulfilled with data used for the check as follow:

\- The “diagnosticInformation[0]” element is filled with the value 0x00000002.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[1]” element is set to the conflict set ID, resource ID, slot, symbol of CSI-RS.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[2]” element is set to the conflict set ID, resource ID, slot, symbol of CSI-IM.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[3]” element is set to the startSlot of the segment of primary candidate list printed in “diagnosticInformation[4-13]” which is decided as max(0, conflict slot -9) and printed in decimal.

  * The “diagnosticInformation[4-13]” elements are set to the segment of primary candidate list from startSlot to startSlot + 19 slot printed in binary. If startSlot + 19 exceed the end of list, round back to the beginning of the list for the print.



2) CellCsirsForChannelAcquistionConlictWithPDCCH

· The status is set to “NOK” (EStatus5G_NotOk).

· The cause is set to 0x00000002 (ECause5G_InvalidParameter).

· The “diagnosticInformation“ array is fulfilled with data used for the check as follow:

\- The “diagnosticInformation[0]” element is filled with the value 0x00000003.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[1]” element is set to the conflict set ID, resource ID, slot, symbol of CSI-RS.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[2]” element is set to the conflict set ID, resource ID, slot, symbol of CSI-IM.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[3]” element is set to bit map of configured symbols of PDCCH within one slot.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[4-13]” elements are set to 0x00000000.

3) CellCsirsForChannelAcquistionNotSlotEnd

· The status is set to “NOK” (EStatus5G_NotOk).

· The cause is set to 0x00000002 (ECause5G_InvalidParameter).

· The “diagnosticInformation“ array is fulfilled with data used for the check as follow:

\- The “diagnosticInformation[0]” element is filled with the value 0x00000004.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[1]” element is set to the problematic set ID, resource ID, slot, symbol of CSI-RS.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[2]” element is set to the problematic set ID, resource ID, slot, symbol of CSI-IM.

\- The “diagnosticInformation[5-13]” elements are set to 0x00000000

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `11114990`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 After PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationReq is received

---

**3.5.7.0-1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11114993`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 After PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationReq is received,

If actCsirsMultiplexing is false and actCellCsiRsImTddnonBf is false:

1) If needReturnCsirs in PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationReq is set to true,

  * If normal dl data slots for Paging/OSI are used by CSI-RS:



L2-PS should change the CSI-RS slots which are allocated in previous step to another non-conflicted normal dl data slot as final allocation as defined by 5G_UP_ALG_2357_replaced([11115060](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * Else if normal dl data slots for Paging/OSI slot are NOT used by CSI-RS:



No handling

Feedback CSI-RS resources location in PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationResp.

2) If needReturnCsirs in PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationReq is set to false, 

  * If normal dl data slot for Paging slot are used by CSI-RS:



Feedback configuration Not OK

  * else if normal dl data slot for OSI slot are used by CSI-RS:



L2-PS shall try to allocate OSI to avoid confliction with CSI-RS as 5G_UP_ALG_23573_replaced([11166320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktkZZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

If no such resource is available,

Feedback configuration Not OK;

else

Feedback configuration OK. Note: this PR is raised in release 21A but 20B also need this correction.

  * Else if normal dl data slot for Paging/OSI slot are NOT used by CSI-RS:



No handling

Feedback configuration OK.

No CSI-RS resources location in PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationResp.

Note: control plane always replaces the old CSI-RS resource pool from L2 with the new ones from later PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationResp, no mater the previous resource pool is from PsCell_CellSetupResp or PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationResp.

If actCsirsMultiplexing is true or actCellCsiRsImTddnonBf is true:

: L2 shall not check slot confiliction between cell specific CSI-RS and paging/OSI and consider it as no confliction. There is always no CSI-RS resources location in PsCell_SystemInfoConfigurationResp.

Note:

If the NSA and SA mixed mode is enabled, with the NSA mode used first and the SA mode later, the paging or other system information (OSI) slots in SA mode might overlap with the CSI-RS slots which are already allocated in NSA mode. In this case, the CSI-RS slots are re-allocated to avoid overlapping with the paging or OSI slots. However, the new location of the CSI-RS slots is not informed to the UEs through the RRC reconfiguration message. The location change of the CSI-RS slots might cause these UEs to be released.

### 3.5.7.0-2 Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Intermediate cell specific CSI-RS resource allocation for all resource sets. (ID: 11115014)

**3.5.7.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11115018`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Algorithm overview

---

**3.5.7.0-2.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `12815914`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Background knowledge: Each Row 8 CSI-RS resource as defined by TS38.211 needs 2 consecutive symbols. Maximum 3 resource sets are supported here. The 1/2/4 CSI-RS resources belong to independent resource sets as defined by 3GPP 38.331.

Input:

 **primary CSI-RS candidate list: csiRsResourcesInSsSlots, refers to 5G_UP_ALG_2514_replaced([11117226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

 **secondary CSI-RS candidate list: csiRsResourcesInDataSlots, refers to 5G_UP_ALG_2530_replaced([11117351](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S3_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

 The number of CSI-RS needed for the cell from control plane in cell setup stage.

 The period of CSI-RS (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2571_replaced([11299301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqS6EfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

  * CSI-RS frequency multiplexing flag _actCsirsMultiplexing_
  * dlMimoMode, actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf
  * actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf,
  * number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see 5G_UP_82_replaced([11347116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot



Algorithm:

The 1/2/4 CSI-RS resources within one resource set shall be allocated in the same slot.

If NRBTS/NRCELL-_actCsirsMultiplexing is true, two cell specific CSI-RS resources of the same set is frequency multiplexed together. In this case, set#4 of row 8 CSI-RS shall occupy 2 pair of 2 symbols, set#2 shall occupy 2 adjacent CSI-RS symbols, set#1 shall still occupy 2 adjacent CSI-RS symbols since no resource will multiplex with it._

The period of CSI-RS resource is configured via 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2571_replaced([11299301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqS6EfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**.**

If actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true: only one set#1 exist, each CSI-RS resource needs 1 symbol. Note actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true can only work when dlMimoMode is CL 4x4 or OL 4x4 or CL 2x2 or OL 2x2.

If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see 5G_UP_82_replaced([11347116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is less than or equal to 4: only one resource set#1 exist. if dlMimoMode is CL 4x4 or OL 4x4, each CSI-RS resource needs 1 symbol; If dlMimoMode is CL 8x4, each CSI-RS resource needs 2 symbols. If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see 5G_UP_82_replaced([11347116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than 4: only one resource set#4 exist. If NRBTS/NRCELL-actCsirsMultiplexing is set to true, every two resources shall be mapped to two adjacent symbols. Frequency multiplexing shall be used for the two resources mapped to the same 2 symbols.

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is True or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true), Cell specific CSI-RS slot & symbol allocation is described in 5G_UP_ALG_19419_replaced([11116985](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp8dpvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If actPciBasedCsiImRandomization is set to ‘false’:

If NRBTS/NRCELL-_actCsirsMultiplexing is false_ _and actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is false:_ **

  * L2 shall traverse the **primary CSI-RS candidate list first for all the CSI-RS needed and mark the first resource suitable as found. If not all the CSI-RS needed are allocated, traverse the** secondary CSI-RS candidate list then for the resources not found in **primary CSI-RS candidate list.** ****
  * For both lists, the search shall start with CSI-RS resource set with max resource number and allocate all the CSI-RS resource sets needed in descending order.
  * For both lists, the search shall start from the last symbol of the slot for each slot. Rationale: if CSI-RS does not book all the symbols of the slot, the front symbols can still be used for PDCCH+PDSCH.



If NRBTS/NRCELL-_actCsirsMultiplexing is true_ _or actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true_ _or actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true:_ ****

  * **primary and** secondary CSI-RS candidate list shall be combined before the search starts.****
  * For the combined list, the search shall start with CSI-RS resource set with max resource number and allocate all the CSI-RS resource sets needed in descending order.
  * For the combined list, the search shall start from the last symbol of the slot for each slot.



Multi sets randomization refers to 5G_UP_ALG_7725_replaced([11115037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJzvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If actPciBasedCsiImRandomization is set to ‘true’ please see req 5G_UP_ALG_2363_replaced([11115066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In the above algorithm, if NIDD:actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot **is set to value True, if the slot is not SS/PBCH nor TRS OR _numPdschPrbInSsbSlots >0 for a SS/PBCH slot OR *numPdschPrbInTrsSlots >0 for a TRS slot, allocation of a CSI-RS set in a slot must additionally pass the following check:_***

Considering X = firstSymbolCs – _tdraStartSymb, where:_

o firstSymbolCs = first OFDM symbol in the slot allocated to a CSI-RS resource

o  _tdraStartSymb = maximum schedulable size of the PDCCH defined by the_ tdraStartSymb as specified in 5G_UP_ALG_6659_replaced([11115568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

then the allocation of a CSI-RS set in the slot is only allowed when X <= 0 OR X >= 3

**Output:**

CSI-RS slots for the sets needed by this cell.

The period of CSI-RS resource is configured via 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2571_replaced([11299301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqS6EfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**.**

**Exception: the same as 5G_UP_ALG_2348_replaced([11114925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpo7r_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**

**[CB015668-A]** Note: in this artifact, actTddCsirsOpt is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator. **[End CB015668-A]** ****

---

**3.5.7.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11115037`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Multi sets randomization

---

**3.5.7.0-2.0-2.0-6**  (ID: `12815916`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 If NRBTS/NRCELL-_actCsirsMultiplexing is true or actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true :_

_below search shall be done_**for the combined list.** **

else:

If NRBTS/NRCELL-periodicCsiAcquisition.maxCsirsNumber is set as 1 **and NRBTS/NRCELL-actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is set as TRUE:**

_below search shall be done_**for the combined list.** **

else:

_below search shall be done_**for both lists.** **

The search shall start from the first slot of the CSI-RS resource period + _slot_shift , the_ slot_shift = (physical cell id(from cell setup request) mod _N )__cell shift._ ***

 N equals to _rdCsiRsSlotShiftPciMod(5G_UP_ALG_2544_replaced([11118180](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAvEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if the value of _rdCsiRsSlotShiftPciMod is non-zero, otherwise, N is configured based on the following table:**

|   
---|---  
CSI-RS resource period(slots) | N  
20 | 3  
40 | 11  
80 | 23  
160 | 47  
320 | 91  
  
  _cell shift equals to_ rdCsiRsCellShiftMod(5G_UP_ALG_2545_replaced([11118186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAvE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if the value of _rdCsiRsCellShiftMod is non-zero, otherwise if the value of_ rdCsiRsCellShiftMod is zero _,_ cell shift is set to 5 when CSI-RS resource period is equal or smaller than 20 slots, otherwise, this value is set to 7.***** *

In one CSI-RS resource period, there is only one CSI-RS resource set#4, one resource set#2 and one resource set#1. The _slotSperation among different CSI-RS resource sets within one CSI-RS resource period is the first prime number which is equal to or smaller than ROUNDDOWN(CSI-RS resource period / M),_

M equals to _rdCsiRsSlotsInterval if rdCsiRsSlotsInterval(5G_UP_ALG_2546_replaced([11118197](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAvFvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is non-zero values, _otherwise, M equals to the number of CSI-RS resource sets in one CSI-RS resource period based on NIDD::maxCsirsNumber.**

L2 shall search each resource set#X from the startSlotSet#X to (enSlotSet#X - 1) in each CSI-RS resource period, X = 1,2,4. 

If NIDD::maxCsirsNumber is equal to 4:

  * startSlotSet#4 is equal to (the first slot in one CSI-RS resource period + _slot_shift) % CSI-RS resource period as the start slot of the CSI-RS resource set#4._

  * startSlotSet#2 is equal to (startSlotSet#4 + _slotSperation) % CSI-RS resource period as the start slot of CSI-RS resource set#2._

  * startSlotSet#1 is equal to (startSlotSet#2 + _slotSperation) % CSI-RS resource period as the start slot of CSI-RS resource set#1._

  * endSlotSet#X which is the end slot of CSI-RS resource set#X(X = 1,2,4) is defined as following:


|   
---|---  
CSI-RS resource set | endSlotSet#X  
set#4 | startSlotSet#2 - 1  
set#2 | startSlotSet#1 - 1  
set#1 | startSlotSet#4 - 1  
  
If NIDD::maxCsirsNumber is equal to 2:

  * startSlotSet#2 is equal to (the first slot in one CSI-RS resource period + _slot_shift) % CSI-RS resource period as the start slot of the CSI-RS resource set#2._

  * startSlotSet#1 is equal to (startSlotSet#2 + _slotSperation) % CSI-RS resource period as the start slot of CSI-RS resource set#1._

  * endSlotSet#X which is the end slot of CSI-RS resource set#X is defined as following:


|   
---|---  
CSI-RS resource set | endSlotSet#X  
set#2 | startSlotSet#1 - 1  
set#1 | startSlotSet#2 - 1  
  
If NIDD::maxCsirsNumber is equal to 1 or actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true or **actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true: either set#1 or set#4 exist, then the only one set shall be located in the same way as #1**

  * startSlotSet#1 is equal to (the first slot in one CSI-RS resource period + _slot_shift) % CSI-RS resource period as the start slot of the CSI-RS resource set#1._

  * endSlotSet#1 is the slot before startSlotSet#1.




Note: 1) Wrap back to the start of the CSI-RS resource period will happen if the endSlotSet#X is smaller than startSlotSet#X when L2-PS search the slot allocation for CSI-RS resource set X. 2) Different CSI-RS resource sets should drop in the different slots.

If **slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true** or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true), the above procedure is invalid, multi-set CSI-RS randomization is described in**5G_UP_ALG_19419_replaced([11116985](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp8dpvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) .**

**[CB015668-A]** Note: in this artifact, actTddCsirsOpt is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator. **[End CB015668-A]** ****

---

### 3.5.7.0-3 Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Intermediate cell specific CSI-RS resource allocation for multi resource set#1. (ID: 11115052)

**3.5.7.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11115056`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 There is only one set#1 in each CSI-RS resource period.

NIDD:csirsNumberWithinReportPeriod_Set1 is used to calculate the CSI-RS resource period. For the detailed algorithm of CSI-RS resource period, please refer to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2571_replaced([11299301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqS6EfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 3.5.7.0-4 Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Shift cell specific CSI-RS resource allocation to avoid SI/Paging confliction (ID: 11115060)

**3.5.7.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11115062`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Input:

 Intermediately allocated CSI-RS resources which is the output of 5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 Paging slots refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3918_replaced([11167942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kts8SPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 Other SI slots refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3804_replaced([11166172](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktkZYPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 **secondary CSI-RS candidate list: csiRsResourcesInDataSlots, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2530_replaced([11117351](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S3_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

Algorithm:

If normal dl data slots for Paging/SI slots are used by intermediately allocated CSI-RS, L2 shall change these slots with CSI-RS resources to another non-conflicted normal dl data slots in **secondary CSI-RS candidate list as final allocation.**

Output:

Final CSI-RS slots for the all CSI-RS needed by this cell.

**Exception: the same as 5G_UP_ALG_2348_replaced([11114925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpo7r_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**

If _actCsirsMultiplexing is true_ _or actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true_ _or actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true, this algorithm is not needed because Paging/OSI can be scheduled in the empty symbols with cell CSI-RS at the end of the slot._ ****

---

### 3.5.7.0-5 Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Cell specific CSI-RS – handling for CSI-RS/IM with PCI randomization of its position (ID: 11115066)

**3.5.7.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11115070`)

Cell specific CSI-RS for channel measurements - TDD FR1 Traverse the secondary CSI-RS candidate list first for all the CSI-RS needed and mark the first resource suitable as found. If not all the CSI-RS needed are allocated, traverse the primary CSI-RS candidate list then for the resources not found in secondary CSI-RS candidate list. For both lists, the search shall start with CSI-RS resource set with max resource number and allocate all the CSI-RS resource sets needed in descending order. For both lists, the search shall start from the last symbol of the slot for each slot. Rationale: if CSI-RS does not book all the symbols of the slot, the front symbols can still be used for PDCCH+PDSCH. For both lists, the slots within the candidate list, the search shall start from the first slot+slot_shift, the slot_shift = physical cell id(from cell setup request) mod(MIN(21,cellCsiRsPeriodicity)).

Note: cellCsiRsPeriodicity (refers to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2571_replaced([11299301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqS6EfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) define periodicity (in slots) of the cell specific periodic CSI-RS transmission. Optional. Range scope: ENUMERATED {sl5, sl10, sl20, sl40, sl80, sl160, sl320}

If NRBTS/NRCELL-actCsirsMultiplexing is true, two cell specific CSI-RS resources of the same set is frequency multiplexed together. In this case, set#4 of row 8 CSI-RS shall occupy 2 pair of 2 symbols, set#2 shall occupy 2 continual CSI-RS symbols, set#1 shall still occupy 2 continual CSI-RS symbols since no resource will multiplex with it.

---

##### 3.5.8 Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD

###### 3.5.8.0-1 Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD Triggering the Transmission of CSI-RS (ID: 11115076)

**3.5.8.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11115079`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD **Triggering the Transmission of CSI-RS for Channel Measurement**

---

**3.5.8.0-1.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `12805311`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD If /NRBTS/**actSlowPrbPoolingFddFr1Enh = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), this requirement shall not be used. CSI-RS allocation and transmission is described in 5G_UP_ALG_19535_replaced([11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**

If NRCELL/actPciBasedCsiImRandomization is false and NRCELL/NRDSSLTE/**actRateMatchedCsiIm is FALSE [Before CB013525-D][CB008577-B] and**

\- If dlMimoMode is not CL32x4 [End CB008577-B][End CB013525-D]: 

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Inputs** |  | **Outputs** |   
NRBTS/actSlowPrbPooling | csiRsPoolingGroupId | **Primary CSI-RS candidate list (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots)** | **Secondary CSI-RS candidate list (csiRsResourcesInDataSlots)**  
FALSE | any | Each SSB slot in the CSIReportPeriodicity cycle. | All slots as unavailable.  
TRUE | 0 | All slots as unavailable. | Slot 2 in RadioFrames 1, 5, 9, … shall be marked as available.  
TRUE | 1 | All slots as unavailable. | Slot 3 in RadioFrames 1, 5, 9, … shall be marked as available.  
  
[Before CB013525-D]**[CB008577-B] - If dlMimoMode is CL32x4: csiRsGroupId = physical cell ID mod 3, the slots are selected as below. Note this solution can be used directly for later NRBTS/actSlowPrbPooling = true. Primary and secondary CSI-RS candidate list are not used.**

8 ports CSI-RS: The periodicity shall be 20slots (20ms) for easy interworking with measurement gap), last symbol of the slot.

32 ports CSI-RS: The periodicity shall be [Before CB008577-D] 320 slots (320ms). [CB008577-D] decided by NRCELL.periodicCsiAcquisition.csiReportPeriodicity and NRCELL.periodicCsiAcquisition.csirsNumberWithinReportPeriod [End CB008577-D], last 4 symbols of the slot.

|  |   
---|---|---  
**Inputs** | **Outputs** |   
csiRsGroupId | **8 ports CSI-RS** | 32 ports CSI-RS  
0 | Slot 3 in every 20 slot | Slot 16 in every periodicity in slot.  
1 | Slot 4 in every 20slot | Slot 17 in every periodicity in slot.  
2 | Slot 10 in every 20slot | Slot 18 in every periodicity in slot.  
  
[End CB008577-B] 

Note after 13525, dlMimoMode CL32x4 on Thor only support enhanced pooling enabled. This note does not need to appear in the next rebase. But 8577-D still need to support tunable periodicity of 32 ports at 1st step.

[End CB013525-D]

Note1: For DSS with NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true there is no CSI-IM and Msg2 in the same slot. UE without dedicated configuration shall not be scheduled in the CSI-IM slots. For asymmetric DSS the rateMatchedCsiImInMsg2Slot shall be set to false by CPRT regardless of NRCELL.rateMatchedCsiImInMsg2Slot ([11279032](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpTbmPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).  
Note2: For DSS with NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true it is not possible to have NRBTS.actSlowPrbPooling=true and NRBTS.actSlowPrbPoolingFddFr1Enh=false

If NRCELL/actPciBasedCsiImRandomization is FALSE and NRCELL/NRDSSLTE/**actRateMatchedCsiIm is TRUE**(except NSA DSS 10Mhz boths side blanking configuration is being used - see below).****

|  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---  
**Inputs** |  | **Outputs** |  |  |   
**NRBTS.** **actSlowPrbPooling** | **NRCELL.** **prachConfigurationIndex** | **Primary CSI-RS candidate list (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots)** | **Secondary CSI-RS candidate list (csiRsResourcesInDataSlots)** |  |   
NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false and **rateMatchedCsiImInMsg2Slot is set to** |  | **NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true** |  |  |   
**TRUE** | **FALSE** |  |  |  |   
FALSE | any | All slots as unavailable. | Every slots reserved for **CSI-IM** transmission (5G_UP_ALG_4716_replaced([11171969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJBIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be marked as available.**** | Every slots reserved for CSI-IM **transmission (5G_UP_ALG_4716_replaced([11171969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJBIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be marked as available.** | Every slots reserved for CSI-IM **transmission (5G_UP_ALG_4716_replaced([11171969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJBIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be marked as available.**  
TRUE | 12, 13, 40 | All slots as unavailable. | Slot 8 in every odd RadioFrame reserved for msg2 transmission shall be marked as available. | Slot 2 in RadioFrames 3, 7, 11, … shall be marked as available. | NA  
TRUE | 14, 15, 41, 42, 43 | All slots as unavailable. | Slot 6 in every even RadioFrame reserved for msg2 transmission shall be marked as available. | Slot 3 in RadioFrames 3, 7, 11, … shall be marked as available. | NA  
  
If NSA DSS 10Mhz boths side blanking configuration is being used (see 5G_UP_ALG_4716_replaced([11171969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJBIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

|  |   
---|---|---  
**Input** | **Outputs** |   
**NRCELL/prachConfigurationIndex** | **Primary CSI-RS candidate list (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots)** | **Secondary CSI-RS candidate list (csiRsResourcesInDataSlots)**  
12, 13, 40 | All slots as unavailable. | Slot 8 in every odd RadioFrame reserved for msg2 transmission shall be marked as available.  
14, 15, 41, 42, 43 | All slots as unavailable. | Slot 6 in every even RadioFrame reserved for msg2 transmission shall be marked as available.  
  
Where  
  
---  
SSB_SlotIndex = 0 to maxNumSSB_slot -1 refers to the index of SSB Slot in the CSIReportPeriodicity cycle where maxNumSSB is the total number of SSB slots available in the CSIReportPeriodicity cycle.  
csiRsPoolingGroupId is received in PsCell_CellSetupReq  
maxNumCsiRsGroup = 2  
csiRsAcqSlotOffset as in the table 1 in this requirement  
SFN = System Frame Number  
  
**Slots with ZeroAllocation symbols:**

are handled in requirement 5G_UP_ALG_7609_replaced([11115123](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**3.5.8.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11115109`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD **CSI-RS/IM for Channel and Interference Measurements Slot Selection With Enhanced FDD FR1 PRB Pooling**

---

**3.5.8.0-1.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `13373468`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD The requirement works for slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Due to the PRB processing limitation at L1, only limited number of cells of the same L1 pool can have a wide band PRB allocation concurrently. For this reason cells of same L1 pool that are allowed to have CSI-RS concurrently are grouped together using CsiRsPoolingGroups (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The slots for CSI-RS transmission are allocated based on the CsiRsPoolingGroupId for each cell**. The slots have been selected such that they can be used in every scenario including DSS, DSS with rate matched CSI-IM in Msg2 slot, Measurement Gap etc.**

If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), maxCsiRsPoolingGroup = 3 **(5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

L2-PS shall use the same slot for CSI-RS for all use cases.

The table below shall be used to allocate CSI-RS for Channel Measurement slots for a cell, with csiRsPoolingGroupId is received in PsCell_CellSetupReq:

\- If dlMimoMode is CL32x4:

|  |   
---|---|---  
**Inputs** | **Outputs** |   
**CsiRsPoolingGrpId** | **8 ports CSI-RS** | 32 ports CSI-RS  
0 | Slot 3 in every 20 slot | Slot [Before CB014275-D] 11 [CB014275-D] 10 [End CB014275-D] in every periodicity in slot.  
1 | Slot 6 in every 20slot | Slot [Before CB014275-D] 13 [CB014275-D] 12 [End CB014275-D]in every periodicity in slot.  
2 | Slot 18 in every 20slot | Slot [Before CB014275-D] 16 [CB014275-D] 15 [End CB014275-D] in every periodicity in slot.  
  
8 ports CSI-RS: The periodicity shall be 20slots (20ms) for easy interworking with measurement gap, last symbol of the slot.

32 ports CSI-RS: The periodicity is decided by NRCELL.periodicCsiAcquisition.csiReportPeriodicity and NRCELL.periodicCsiAcquisition.csirsNumberWithinReportPeriod at higher layer, and shall use the last 4 symbols of the slot.

  * else:

|  |   
---|---|---  
**CsiRsPoolingGrpId** | **Primary CSI-RS Candidate List (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots)** | **Secondary CSI-RS Candidate List (csiRsResourcesInDataSlots)**  
0 | All slots unavailable | Slot 3 in every even radio frame (0, 2, 4, …) shall be marked as available  
1 | All slots unavailable | Slot 6 in every even radio frame (0, 2, 4, …) shall be marked as available  
2 | All slots unavailable | Slot 8 in every odd radio frame (1, 3, 5, …) shall be marked as available  
  
CSI-RS transmission shall be independent of the CsiReportPeriodicity and shall always follow a 20 slot (20ms) periodicity.

  * End of dlMimoMode



Note: For beamforming not enabled, if /NRBTS/actSlowPrbPoolingFddFr1Enh = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall only support DSS and CSI-IM with rate matching in Msg2 slot if NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false.

~~[CB014275-D] For beamforming enabled cells, if /NRBTS/actSlowPrbPoolingFddFr1Enh = TRUE,   
[End CB014275-D]~~  
Note2: If NRBTS.actSlowPrbPoolingFddFr1Enh = TRUE ([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) the DSS with NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true shall be supported with any value of NRCELL.rateMatchedCsiImInMsg2Slot. For asymmetric DSS the rateMatchedCsiImInMsg2Slot shall be set to false by CPRT regardless of NRCELL.rateMatchedCsiImInMsg2Slot.

|   
---|---  
Min SSB Periodicity | 20 Slots  
Allowed CSI-RS Periodicity | 20 Slots  
Min TRS Periodicity | (>=) maxCsiRsPoolingGroups (3) * Min SSB Periodicity; 80 Slots

---

**3.5.8.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11115116`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD **Triggering the Transmission of CSI-RS for Channel Measurement - notes only**

---

**3.5.8.0-1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11115120`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD [CNI-88099-AE] Split of the requirement from the release 24R1 to the requirement from the realase 24R2 (5G_UP_ALG_2365_replaced([11115079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and note part. [End CNI-88099-AE]

Note1: the max number of CSI-RS group considered in the design is assumed not to exceed 2.

Note2: due to the limited L1subpool PRB processing capacity shared by all cells in the same L1subpool, when a symbol is used for wideband CSI-RS by the cells same csirsPoolingGroupId, no more L1subpool capacity is available. Thus, the concurrent symbol in the cells of a different csirsPoolingGroupId of same L1subpool are not usable, hence, regarded as empty (zero) allocation symbol.

Note3: CSIReportPeriodicity >=2*ssBurstSetPeriod. This shall be enforced by a PDL rule. ssBurstSetPeriod and CSIReportPeriodicity of all cells in all csirsPoolingGroups is aligned, since there is the static pattern for ZeroAllocation of 40ms (the ssBurstSetPeriod for FDD is 20ms).

Note 4: Configuration guidelines will assure that L1 subPool capacity for DSS-RM cells (PRACH indices 12/13/40 and PRACH indices 14/15/41/42/43) is not exhausted. See description of ZeroAllocation in 5G_UP_ALG_7609_replaced([11115123](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note 5: The term SSB_SlotIndex mentioned in this requirement is different to the SSBIndex mentioned in requirement 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). SSB_SlotIndex in this requirement here refers to the occurrence of an SSB Slot in the CSIReportPeriodicity cyle. E.g. the first occurrence refers to SSB_SlotIndex0, the second occurrence to SSB_SlotIndex1 and so forth …

Note 6: With slow PRB pooling enabled in FDD, the period of the cell CSI-RS resource for channel acquisition if located in slot 0 or 1 has been doubled (i.e., from 20ms to 40ms). This led to issues with MG config (40ms periodicity) overlapping with all CSI-RS resources. With PR674556, correction has been introduced to move the CSI-RS to slot 2 or 3 in odd radio frames. As also DSS cells with actRateMatchedCsiIm is true and rateMatchedCsiImInMsg2Slot is false are using slot 2 or 3 in odd radio frames, the cell level periodicity of the CSI-RS resource for channel acquisition has been increased to 40ms for all these CSI-RS in slot 2 and 3.

Measurement gap configurations sent from LTE for NSA UEs are expected to 40ms period, 6ms lengths, and covering TTIs 0 and 1 in even radio frame where SSB is located. The CSI-RS candidates as specified in this requirement are chosen to avoid that the MG configurations sent from LTE will fully overlap with CSI-RS.

Note 7: A PDL rule shall assure that NRBTS/NRCELL/NRDSSLTE:ssbPosition=6 is not allowed if slowPrbPoolingAllowed is equal to TRUE.

Note 8: CSIReportPeriodicity: NRCELL.periodicCsiAcquisition.csiReportPeriodicity

Note 9: due to the PRB processing limitation at L1, only limited number of Cells of the same L1 subpool can have a wide band PRB allocation concurrently. For this reason cells of same L1 subpool that are allowed to have CSI-RS concurrently are grouped together

Note 10: While PRB blanking feature enabled together with PRB pooling(that is, slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true'), CSI-RS shall be allocated in non-blanked area, so CSI-RS will use less PRBs than whole bandwidth. But to simplify the implementation, for PRB blanking case still follow the design of CSI-RS for nonblanking case while PRB pooling, that is, cells of same L1 subpool that are allowed to have CSI-RS concurrently are grouped together in same csirsPoolingGroup.

---

Note: A PDL rule shall assure that NRBTS/NRCELL/NRDSSLTE:ssbPosition=6 is not allowed if slowPrbPoolingAllowed is equal to TRUE.

---

###### 3.5.8.0-3 Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD Zero Allocation With Enhanced FDD FR1 PRB Pooling (ID: 11115143)

**3.5.8.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11115147`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD Overview

---

**3.5.8.0-3.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11115157`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD This requirement is applicable only in case slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

After allocating resources to CSI-RS for TRS and CSI-RS for Channel Measurement, L2-PS shall determine the slots and corresponding symbols that could be used by other cells in the same L1 Pool but different CsiRsPoolingGroups for any kind of CSI-RS.

L2-PS shall not use these symbols for any other downlink transmissions (PDSCH/PDCCH) if the cell has not been granted the Zero Allocation Bypass privilege by the BBRM (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

In every pooling period, L2-PS shall evaluate the response received from BBRM and if the cell has been granted the Zero Allocation Bypass privilege (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it can use these symbols for downlink transmissions (PDSCH/PDCCH) as long as a valid SLIV exists.

A list of such slots/symbols is determined in :

  * CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups 5G_UP_ALG_19560_replaced([11115160](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * CSI-RS for Channel Measurements in other CsiRsPoolingGroups 5G_UP_ALG_19561_replaced([11115176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))



If [Before 03804082-25R1]NRBTS.tmpParam4[03804082-25R1]NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode[End 03804082-25R1] > 0 (i.e. the parameter is enabled & configured)

  * Symbols used for CSI-RS for Channel Measurements in other CsiRsPoolingGroups (5G_UP_ALG_19561_replaced([11115176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall not be used for any other downlink transmission (PDSCH/PDCCH) irrespective of the cell's ZAB privilege.



End If

Note: A PDL rule shall assure that NRBTS/NRCELL/NRDSSLTE:ssbPosition=6 is not allowed if slowPrbPoolingAllowed is equal to TRUE. This PDL rule was introduced by 5GC001227.

---

**3.5.8.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11115160`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups

---

**3.5.8.0-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11115163`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the slot offsets where CSI-RS for TRS could be allocated for FDD is described in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The slot offsets are calculated as a function of the CsiRsPoolingGroup and the slot offset "Option2" from Table 1 in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

CsiRsTrackingSlotoffsets for Option 2 : Slot 1, Slot 2

CsiRsTrackingSymbols : 6, 10

Restrictions :

  * From 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * ssBurstPeriodicty should be set to 20ms
  * csirsTrackingPeriod >= 3 * ssBurstPeriodicty (80ms : 80 slots)



Input :

  * CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell.



List of all CsiRsPoolingGroupIds : [0,1,2] -> MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups = 3 (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

The following steps will list out all the slots that could be potentially used for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups,

  * For each CsiRsPoolingGroupId != (CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell)
  * Calculate TRS Slot offsets as : (CsiRsTrackingSlotOffsets ) + (CsiRsPoolingGroupId * 20) : (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (for all offsets)
  * List of slot offsets used for CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups is generated.
  * For each slot offset, the CsiRsTrackingSymbols mentioned above shall be considered as used for CSI-RS for TRS
  * With the Slot offsets determined here, a periodicity of 80ms (80 slots) shall be considered as mentioned in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for determining all other slots.
  * End



[CB009215-C]

If the cell is provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then

L2-PS shall schedule PDSCH in all the slot offsets determined above for the current cell as long as a valid SLIV exists.

(PDSCH scheduled in such slots can be allocated PRBs only upto the numAllocCellPrb provided to the cell by the BBRM).

Else

[End CB009215-C]

L2-PS shall not schedule PDSCH in all the slot offsets determined above for the current cell.

[CB009215-C]

End If

[End CB009215-C]

An example for determining CSI-RS for TRS slots for other CsiRsPooling Groups is described in 5G_UP_ALG_19566_replaced([11115167](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.5.8.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11115167`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD Example : Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups

---

FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115173: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD Example:

Consider for the current cell:

\- CsiRsPoolingGroupId : 1

From 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) :

\- CsiRsTrackingSlotoffsets for Option 2 : Slot 1, Slot 2

\- CsiRsTrackingSymbols : 6, 10

CsiRsPoolingGroupId for current cell = 1, hence we need to determine the slot offsets for CSI-RS for TRS that would be used in the cells with CsiRsPoolingGroupIds : 0 & 2

  * For CsiRsPoolingGroupId = 0
  * Slot Offsets for TRS = (CsiRsTrackingSlotoffsets ) + (CsiRsPoolingGroupId * 20) : (CsiRsTrackingSlotoffsets ) + (0 * 20)
  * The resultant offsets are : [1, 2]
  * For CsiRsPoolingGroupId = 2
  * Slot Offsets for TRS = (CsiRsTrackingSlotoffsets ) + (CsiRsPoolingGroupId * 20) : (CsiRsTrackingSlotoffsets ) + (2 * 20)
  * The resultant offsets are : [41, 42]



Final list of TRS slot offsets : [1, 2, 41, 42]

For each slot offset above, the CsiRsTrackingSymbols (6, 10) shall be considered as used for CSI-RS for TRS

With the Slot offsets determined here, a periodicity of 80ms (80 slots) shall be considered for each slot offset as mentioned in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for determining all other slots => [1, 2, 41, 42, 81, 82, 121, 122...]

[CB009215-C] If the cell is provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2-PS can proceed with PDSCH scheduling in the above determined slot offsets as long as there exists a valid SLIV, else,[End CB009215-C] L2-PS shall skip PDSCH scheduling in all the above determined Slot Offsets.

(PDSCH scheduled in the above slot offsets can be allocated PRBs only upto the numAllocCellPrb provided to the cell by the BBRM)

A pictorial representation would look similar to the below:

[image-0][image_desc]The image is a spreadsheet-like visualization showing slot offsets and their corresponding cell assignments within different CSI-RS pooling groups. The title of the visualization is "Current CsiRsPoolingGrp = 1; CSI-RS for TRS Slots in Other CsiRsPoolingGroups". The visualization is divided into three main sections, each representing a range of slot offsets. Each section has rows for "Slot offset" and "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1". The slot offsets are numbered sequentially from 0 to 119. The top row of each section indicates whether the slots fall within an "Even Frame" or an "Odd Frame", with "Even Frame" highlighted in light green and "Odd Frame" in yellow. The "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1" row indicates which slots are used by the current cell (CsiRsPoolingGrp1). These are shown in blue. Additionally, there are green colored cells in the "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1" row, which are explained by the legend at the bottom as "Slots potentially used for CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups". Here's a breakdown of the slot usage for "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1": * **Slots 1 and 2:** Used by "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1". * **Slots 21 and 22:** Potentially used for CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups. * **Slots 41 and 42:** Used by "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1". * **Slots 81 and 82:** Used by "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1". * **Slots 101 and 102:** Potentially used for CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups. The legend at the bottom clarifies the color coding: * Light green cells indicate "CSI-RS for TRS Slot in Current Cell". * Blue cells indicate "Slots potentially used for CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups". The table representation of the data is as follows:

Slot Offset Range | Frame Type | Slot Numbers | Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1 Usage | Other CsiRsPoolingGroups Usage  
---|---|---|---|---  
0-9 | Even Frame | 0-9 | 1, 2 | None  
10-19 | Odd Frame | 10-19 | None | None  
20-29 | Even Frame | 20-29 | None | 21, 22  
30-39 | Odd Frame | 30-39 | None | None  
40-49 | Even Frame | 40-49 | 41, 42 | None  
50-59 | Odd Frame | 50-59 | None | None  
60-69 | Even Frame | 60-69 | None | None  
70-79 | Odd Frame | 70-79 | None | None  
80-89 | Even Frame | 80-89 | 81, 82 | None  
90-99 | Odd Frame | 90-99 | None | None  
100-109 | Even Frame | 100-109 | None | 101, 102  
110-119 | Odd Frame | 110-119 | None | None

---

**3.5.8.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `11115176`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for Channel Measurements Slots in other CsiRsPoolingGroups

---

**3.5.8.0-3.0-4.0-5**  (ID: `13373439`)

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2-PS shall determine the list of slots used for CSI-RS for Channel Measurements in other CsiRsPooling Groups as follows

Input :

  * CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell.
  * [CB014275-D] dlMimoMode of the cell and pool type ([13382498: Mixed type of wideband CSI-RS within a pool](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tts3YACwEfGhFrIQm2O4Ew?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/bi_tts3yacwefghfriqm2o4ew?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9")) that the cell belongs to.
  * periodicity of 32 ports CSI-RS. [End CB014275-D]



List of all CsiRsPoolingGroupIds : [0,1,2] -> MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups = 3 (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

The following steps will list out all the slots that would be used for Cell Specific CSI-RS in other CsiRsPooling Groups,

  * For each CsiRsPoolingGroupId != (CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell)
  * Select the slot offset mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_19535_replaced([11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  * List of slot offsets used for CSI-RS for Channel Measurements is generated.
  * For each slot offset listed above, the symbol of CSI-RS defined in [11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) shall be considered as used for CSI-RS for Channel measurements.
  * With the Slot offsets determined here, a periodicity as defined in [11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) shall be considered as mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_19535_replaced([11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for determining all other slots.
  * [CB014275-D] If periodicity of 32ports is indicated and pool type is BF or mixed, gNB-DU shall select slot offset/symbol/periodicity by assuming other CSI-RS pooling groups have dlMimoMode 32x4. [End CB014275-D]
  * End



If the cell is provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode = 0 (i.e. the parameter is disabled & not configured), then

L2-PS shall schedule PDSCH in all the slot offsets determined above for the current cell as long as a valid SLIV exists.

(PDSCH scheduled in such slots can be allocated PRBs only upto the numAllocCellPrb provided to the cell by the BBRM. [CB014275-D] For the cell itself, if it is non BF, then for the symbols marked for 32ports csirs of its cell group id, gNB can transmit PDSCH [End CB014275-D]).

Else

L2-PS shall not schedule PDSCH in the CSI-RS symbol of all the slot offsets determined above for the current cell. Supported cases are: 

[Before CB014275-D] If dlMimoMode is CL32x4 and NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is 1,2, then gNB-DU shall replace 1 to 3, and 2 to 4. 

If dlMimoMode is not CL32x4 and NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is 3,4, then gNB-DU shall replace 3 to 1, and 4 to 2. 

Muting other cell groups' CSI-RS assume cells within pooling groups have the same dlMimoMode. 

[CB014275-D] 

gNB-DU shall exclude symbols used for CSI-RS its own cell. Additionally, for CSI-RS symbol of other two CsiRsPoolingGroupId:

[End CB014275-D]

1) NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is equal to 1 (i.e. mute_slot_3_6_8),

  * The last symbol in slot offsets 3 & 6 in every even SFN, and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN.



2) NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is equal to 2 (i.e. mute_slot_0_3_6_8),

  * The last symbol in slot offsets 0, 3 & 6 in every even SFN, and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN.



3) NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is equal to 3 (mute_slot_8p_32p) 

  * The predefined [Before CB014275-D] 8/32 [CB014275-D] 8 [End CB014275-D] ports CSI-RS symbols in slots of each CsiRsPoolingGroupId.
  * [CB014275-D] Optional for 32 ports: If dlMimoMode is CL32x4, 32 ports CSI-RS symbols in slots of each CsiRsPoolingGroupId. If dlMimoMode is not CL32x4 but periodicity of 32 ports are provided by high layer, then 32 ports CSI-RS symbols in slots of other two CsiRsPoolingGroupId. [End CB014275-D]



4) NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is equal to 4 (mute_slot_xp_8p_32p) 

  * The last symbol in slot offsets 0 in every even SFN, and the predefined [Before CB014275-D] 8/32 [CB014275-D] 8 [End CB014275-D]ports CSI-RS symbols in slots of each CsiRsPoolingGroupId.
  * [CB014275-D] Optional slots/symbols of 32 ports shall be decided the same way as NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is equal to 3 . [End CB014275-D]



End If

An example for determining CSI-RS for Channel Measurement slots for other CsiRsPooling Groups is described in 5G_UP_ALG_19569_replaced([11115190](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD Example : Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for Channel Measurements in other CsiRsPoolingGroups
