FDD 11115209: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115209: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115209: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115209: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115209: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115209: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115209: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115209: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD 11115209: Cell specific CSI-RS/CSI-IM for Channel measurements (RI / PMI / CQI) - FDD Example:

Consider for the current cell:

\- CsiRsPoolingGroupId : 1

CsiRsPoolingGroupId for current cell = 1, hence we need to determine the slot offsets for CSI-RS for Channel Measurements that would be used in the cells with CsiRsPoolingGroupIds : 0 & 2

  * For CsiRsPoolingGroupId = 0
  * Select slot offset from 5G_UP_ALG_19535_replaced([11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) = (Slot offset for CsiRsPoolingGroupId = 0) : Slot 3
  * The resultant offset is : [3]
  * For CsiRsPoolingGroupId = 2
  * Select slot offset from 5G_UP_ALG_19535_replaced([11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) = (Slot offset for CsiRsPoolingGroupId = 0) : Slot 18 (Slot 8 of Odd frame = 1 * 10[Num Slots Per Frame] + 8)
  * The resultant offset is : [18]



Final list of CSI-RS for Channel Measurement slot offsets : [3, 18]

For each slot offset above, the last Symbol of the slot shall be considered as used for CSI-RS for Channel Measurements.

With the Slot offsets determined here, a periodicity of 20ms (20 slots) shall be considered for each slot offset as mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_19535_replaced([11115109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for determining all other slots => [3, 18, 23, 38, 43, 58...].

If the cell is provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and [Before 03804082-25R1]NRBTS.tmpParam4[03804082-25R1]NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode[End 03804082-25R1] = 0 (i.e. the parameter is disabled & not configured), L2-PS can proceed with PDSCH scheduling in the above determined slot offsets as long as there exists a valid SLIV, else, L2-PS shall not schedule PDSCH in the last symbol of all the slot offsets determined above for the current cell.

(PDSCH scheduled in the above slot offsets can be allocated PRBs only upto the numAllocCellPrb provided to the cell by the BBRM)

A pictorial representation would look similar to the below:

[image-0][image_desc]The image is a spreadsheet-like diagram illustrating CSI-RS (Channel State Information Reference Signal) slot allocations for channel measurements in different CSI-RS pooling groups. The diagram is divided into three main rows, each representing a different set of slot offsets. Each row is further divided into 10 ms segments, which are then broken down into "Even Frame" and "Odd Frame" sections. Within these frames, individual slots are numbered sequentially. The top row covers slot offsets from 0 to 39. The middle row covers slot offsets from 40 to 79. The bottom row covers slot offsets from 80 to 119. Each row has two sub-rows: "Slot offset" and "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1". The "Slot offset" row displays the numerical slot numbers. The "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1" row uses colored cells to indicate CSI-RS usage. \- **Green cells** in the "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1" row represent CSI-RS for channel measurement slots in the _current cell_. \- **Blue cells** in the "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1" row represent slots potentially used for CSI-RS for channel measurements in _other CSI-RS pooling groups_. The title of the diagram is "Current CsiRsPoolingGrp = 1; CSI-RS for Channel Measurements Slots in Other CsiRsPoolingGroups". Below the main diagram, there are two legend entries: \- "CSI-RS for Channel Measurement Slot in Current Cell" (represented by a green rectangle). \- "Slots potentially used for CSI-RS for Channel Measurements in other CsiRsPoolingGroups" (represented by a blue rectangle). Here's a breakdown of the colored slots in the "Cell in CsiRsPoolingGrp1" rows: **Top Row (Slot offsets 0-39):** \- Slot 2: Blue \- Slot 5: Green \- Slot 17: Blue \- Slot 24: Blue \- Slot 26: Green \- Slot 37: Blue **Middle Row (Slot offsets 40-79):** \- Slot 43: Blue \- Slot 46: Green \- Slot 53: Blue \- Slot 56: Green \- Slot 63: Blue \- Slot 66: Green \- Slot 71: Blue \- Slot 76: Green **Bottom Row (Slot offsets 80-119):** \- Slot 83: Blue \- Slot 86: Green \- Slot 93: Blue \- Slot 96: Green \- Slot 102: Blue \- Slot 105: Green \- Slot 111: Blue \- Slot 117: Blue[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5412.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

---

## 3.5.9 PDSCH configuration

### 3.5.9.1 Available slots for PDSCH scheduling (except SIB1 transmissions)

#### 3.5.9.1.0-1 Available slots for PDSCH scheduling (except SIB1 transmissions) Supported DL slots for Time Domain Resource Allocations in TDD FR1 (ID: 11115218)

**3.5.9.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11115228`)

Available slots for PDSCH scheduling (except SIB1 transmissions) gNB shall compose PDSCH TDRA list for TDD FR1 as 5G_UP_ALG_2387_replaced([11115342](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNG_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Slot formats for PDSCH common TDRA list and PDSCH dedicated TDRA list are addressed in 5G_UP_ALG_6484_replaced([11115389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0J_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_6658_replaced([11115546](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCTfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) respectively. Slot formats are the resultant slot pattern of 5G_UP_ALG_2313_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If NIDD parameter actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is set to FALSE then slot pattern with less than 10 DL symbols are not used for PDSCH, else if actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is set to TRUE then slot pattern with less than 6 DL symbols are not used for PDSCH.

When gNB considers to evaluate PDSCH TDRA entries for SSB slots, the SSB slots shall meet following conditions:

1\. available RBGs/PRBs is greater than 0 per 5G_UP_ALG_4284_replaced([11177074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kusa1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and

2\. subcell is also available after excluding the subcell for SSB with/without TRS in non-FD BF case.

When gNB considers to evaluate PDSCH TDRA entries for slots (including special slots) with CSI-RS for tracking, the slots shall meet following conditions:

1\. available RBGs/PRBs is greater than 0 per 5G_UP_ALG_4288_replaced([11177156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kutB3PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and

2\. subcell is also available after excluding the subcell for TRS in non-FD BF case.

[CNI-88099-E]

Refer 5G_UP_ALG_21496_replaced([11115230](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-__vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD FR1 Potential SLIV values (informative).

[End CNI-88099-E]

[CNI-92005-23R2]

[End CNI-92005-23R2]

---

#### 3.5.9.1.0-2 Available slots for PDSCH scheduling (except SIB1 transmissions) Potential SLIV for PDSCH transmission based on the slot format in TDD FR1 (informative) (ID: 11115230)

**3.5.9.1.0-2.0-11**  (ID: `12874008`)

Available slots for PDSCH scheduling (except SIB1 transmissions) This requirement is informative only. gNB shall compose TDRA list for TDD FR1 per 5G_UP_ALG_2387_replaced([11115342](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNG_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and shall not be limited in the fixed SLIVs in the following table.

Where :

\- SLIV defines the TD mapping of PDSCH as per 5G_UP_ALG_2387_replaced([11115342](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNG_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- S : Start symbol

\- L : Length in symbols

**NOTE:**

  1. S value is the number of symbols for PDCCH.

  2. refer 5G_UP_ALG_9301_replaced([11115621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TRS and PDSCH DMRS collision.




3A. DL10: when the bi-lateral agreement is in place and actBlankDlSymbBorderCoord=TRUE, a DL14 slot is reduced to 10 symbols by muting the DL symbols corresponding to the guard symbols and the UL symbols of an interfering slot.

3B. DL12: when a DL14 slot is reduced to 12 symbols due to interfering cell.

  1. In case of DL TDD PRB pooling, the last symbol of a SIB1 slot can be used by other cells of the L1 pool, having different SSB number, for UE-specific CSI-RS. As such it must be considered as a “wideband symbol” in which some cells can only do UE-specific CSI-RS. PDSCH transmission on this symbol is only possible if the cell has been provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  2. In case rdMmuteLastSymbolInSSBSlot is non zero value, then last DL symbol of SSB slot shall be muted as per 5G_UP_ALG_6661_replaced([11115584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpWfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  3. In case of DL TDD PRB pooling, CSI-RS symbols may not be placed in the end of a slot and symbols after the CSI-RS symbols can not be used for PDSCH, thus a valid SLIV from table above shall be used with only available symbols before the CSI-RS symbols. 

  4. If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false **and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization** is false, only up to 2 PDCCH symbols (symbol0 and symbol1) can be used for FR1-TDD BW 10MHz and 15MHz in the Cell Specific CSI-RS slots which are determined in 5G_UP_ALG_11874_replaced([11117149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9rwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). A valid SLIV (with S corresponds to number of used PDCCH symbols in the slot) from table above shall be used for FR1-TDD BW 10MHz and 15MHz in the Cell Specific CSI-RS slots, including the cases as described in NOTE 6.****

  5. If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true, then:




\- Last 2 or 4 symbols of a slot might be used by CSI-RS of cells in other pooling groups in same L1 pool, thus PDSCH transmission on the symbols is only possible for the cell has been provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), [CB014543-H] [Note: When partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))] [End CB014543-H]. If the cell has been provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **[CB014543-H]****[** Note: When partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))]. **[End CB014543-H]**

L2PS shall decide whether PDSCH in current cell shall be scheduled or not on CSI-RS symbols from other pooling groups according to 5G_UP_ALG_25008_replaced([11116931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72n_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

\- If actTddCsiImRm is true, last symbols which are reserved for CSI-IM (as well as symbols after CSI-IM symbol) (5G_UP_ALG_25008_replaced([11116931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72n_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall not be considered for PDSCH scheduling for Common TDRA usage (5G_UP_ALG_2391_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

else If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true, then:

\- Last 2 or 4 symbols of a slot might be used by CSI-RS of cells in other pooling groups in same L1 pool, but PDSCH transmission on the symbols is possible for the cell because ZAB concept has been removed in TDD eCPRI 7-2e. L2PS shall decide whether PDSCH in current cell shall be scheduled or not on CSI-RS symbols from other pooling groups according to 5G_UP_ALG_25008_replaced([11116931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72n_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

\- If actTddCsiImRm is true, last symbols which are reserved for CSI-IM (as well as symbols after CSI-IM symbol) (5G_UP_ALG_25008_replaced([11116931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72n_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall not be considered for PDSCH scheduling for Common TDRA usage (5G_UP_ALG_2391_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

  1. If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true, last 4 symbols of a slot might be used by CSI-RS of cells in other pooling groups in same L1 pool, thus PDSCH transmission on the symbols is not possible for the cell which has not been provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). 



else if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false , last 4 symbols of a slot might be used by CSI-RS of cells in other pooling groups in same L1 pool, but PDSCH transmission on the symbols is possible for the cell because ZAB concept has been removed in TDD eCPRI 7-2e. (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). 

**Note: in this artifact, actTddCsirsOpt and actTddCsiImRm are not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator.**

---

#### 3.5.9.1.0-3 Available slots for PDSCH scheduling (except SIB1 transmissions) Supported DL slots for Time Domain Resource Allocations PDSCH in TDD FR2 (ID: 11115271)

**3.5.9.1.0-3.0-5**  (ID: `12813347`)

Available slots for PDSCH scheduling (except SIB1 transmissions) To allow PDSCH scheduling in a slot, the following conditions must be met:

 The slot must have enough downlink symbols not booked neither the uplink transmisison nor guardian period (see 5G_UP_ALG_2312_replaced([11114694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGePvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The minimum number of PDSCH symbols allowed for the PDSCH mapping Type A is 3 symbols in the 3GPP specification. In the gNB, the limit is 4 PDSCH symbols.

 The slot must have a k1 value to handle the HARQ feedback, even if it is not used (ex CCH or RA-Msg2).

 The slot must must not handle CSI-RS for tracking.

The CSI-RS for tracking configuration is done, by the C-Plane, during the cell setup procedure.

 The slot must must not handle [Before PR854098-26R1] an active [PR854098-26R1] configured [End PR854098-26R1] SS/PBCH.

[PR854098-26R1] The configured SS/PBCH are defined from SS/PBCH bitmaps (inOneGroup and groupPresence) (see: [11347128: Configured SS/PBCH](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). [End PR854098-26R1] 

[Before PR854098-26R1] ; The gNB computes the list of active SS/PBCH, from the configured SS/PBCH bitmaps (inOneGroup and groupPresence) and the bitmap of inactive SS/PBCH (NRCELL/inactiveSsbFr2).

Therefore, it is not allowed to have in a candidate PDSCH slot (with enough DL symbols) with only configured and deactivated SS/PBCH. Otherwise, the the gNB will not forbids PDSCH in the slot with only configured and inactive SS/PBCH, whereas the UE is not able to receive PDSCH symbols where there is a configured SS/PBCH (the UE does not know that a SS/PBCH is inactive in the gNB) leading to send back to the gNB a negative HARQ acknowledgement for a transmission in this type of slots (only inactive SS/PBCH in the slot). [End PR854098-26R1]

 The slot must have a PDCCH token for the downlink (see 5G_UP_ALG_2446_replaced([11170184](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt8z6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 The UE must be configured with a set of TDRA compatible with the number of PDSCH symbols expected (5G_UP_ALG_2387_replaced([11115342](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNG_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Refer 5G_UP_ALG_21588_replaced([11115290](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpsmDPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD FR2 Potential SLIV values (informative)

 If actHighNumberOfUEs is TRUE AND rdActDedicatedCsiSlots is TRUE, then no CSI-RS shall be scheduled in that slot.

---

[xlsx_desc]--- Sheet1 --- BI6,2 NaN 44 (S=2, L=4) used with semiStatic frame structure with 2 PDCCH symbols NaN NaN 30 (S=2, L=3) used with semiStatic frame structure with 2 PDCCH symbols and 1 CSI-RS symbol NaN NaN 57 (S=1, L=5) used with semiStatic frame structure with 1 PDCCH symbol NaN NaN 43 (S=1, L=4) used with semiStatic frame structure with 1 PDCCH symbol and 1 CSI-RS symbol BI10,2 28 100 (S=2, L=8) used with semiStatic frame structure with 2 PDCCH symbols NaN NaN 86 (S=2, L=7) used with semiStatic frame structure with 2 PDCCH symbols and 1 CSI-RS symbol NaN NaN 96 (S=1, L=9) used with semiStatic frame structure with 1 PDCCH symbols NaN NaN 99 (S=1, L=8) used with semiStatic frame structure with 1 PDCCH symbol and 1 CSI-RS symbol DL14 27 (B0) 40 (S=1, L=13) used for 13 symbols scheduling and 1 PDCCH symbol NaN 40 54 (S=1, L=12) used for 12 symbols scheduling with 1 PDCCH symbol and 1 CSI-RS symbol NaN NaN 53 (S=2, L=12) used with semiStatic frame structure with 2 PDCCH symbols NaN NaN 67 (S=2, L=11) used with semiStatic frame structure with 2 PDCCH symbols and 1 CSI-RS symbol[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file5432_0.xlsx[/xlsx_path]

\- L : Length in symbols

#### 3.5.9.1.0-5 Available slots for PDSCH scheduling (except SIB1 transmissions) Supported DL slots for Time Domain Resource Allocations in FDD (ID: 11115299)

**3.5.9.1.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `11115310`)

Available slots for PDSCH scheduling (except SIB1 transmissions) SSB slots shall be used for PDSCH transmission only available [Before CB008927-B] RBGs [CB008927-B] FD resources (RBGs or PRBs if Nrcell.actRat1Alloc is set to false or true) [End CB008927-B] is greater than 0. The calculation of available RBGs [CB008927-B] or PRBs [End CB008927-B] shall refer to 5G_UP_ALG_4284_replaced([11177074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kusa1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Refer to 5G_UP_80_replaced([11347107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz1vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_124_replaced([11347480](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubM3KPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_147_replaced([11347646](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubOsUfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for SS_BURST slot type definition.

TRS slots shall be used for PDSCH transmissions:

  * on a carrier not shared with LTE,
  * on a carrier shared with LTE,
  * if available [Before CB008927-B] RBGs [CB008927-B] FD resources (RBGs or PRBs) [End CB008927-B] is greater than 0. The calculation of available RBGs shall refer to 5G_UP_ALG_4288_replaced([11177156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kutB3PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).



If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' AND slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = FALSE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

Selected slots without TRS in a cell with csirsPoolingGroupId shall not be used for PDSCH scheduling if these slots are in time overlap with TRS slots of the other cell of different csirsPoolingGroupId in the same L1subpool (CSI RS pool group is defined in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4276_replaced([11276704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpKRoPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Rationale: scheduling PDSCH in these slots would need to match the rate of PDSCH with the punctured empty (zero allocation) symbol where no usable PRB is available as the L1supool PRB processing capacity limit is reached due to the concurrent TRS transmission in other cells of the L1subpool.

The two slots without TRS (SSB or non-SSB) located at the slot index given by noPdschSlotIndex shall not be used for PDSCH scheduling. noPdschSlotIndex is defined as follows:

If (mod(SFN;4) = 0) then noPdschSlotIndex is defined as follows:

|  |   
---|---|---  
| csirsPoolingGroupId |   
0 | 1 |   
first_no_pdsch_slot | 21 | 1  
second_no_pdsch_slot | 22 | 2  
  
Note 1: the no Pdsch slot index is given with a reference slot index zero as the first slot in each SFN where mod(SFN;4) =0.

Note 2: Above mechanism requires

csirsTrackingPeriod >= 2* ssBurstSetPeriod with ssBurstSetPeriod = 20ms; ssBurstSetPeriod should have the same value for all cells within the L1 subPool. PDL rules will assure this.

Note 3: Above approach with a fixed 40ms periodicity is chosen, because the restriction all cells within the L1 subPool having the same csirsForTracking periodicity becomes obsolete. A mix of all csirsTrackingPeriod >=2* ssBurstSetPeriod can be supported.

Where:

  * csirsPoolingGroupId of the cell refers to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4276_replaced([11276704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpKRoPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).



\- TRS_first_slot_index: is index of the first TRS slot (considering that consecutive slots are used for TRS, i.e. TRS_first_slot_index, and TRS_first_slot_index+1)

Note 4: max 2 CSI-RS pool group is considered with 5GC001227, if higher group size is considered in the future, the restriction shall be revised as per the CSI-RS for TRS pattern to be defined.

Note 5: due to the limited L1subpool PRB processing capacity shared by all cells in the same L1subpool, when a symbol is used for wideband CSI-RS for TRS by the cells of one TRS group, no more L1subpool capacity is available. Thus, the concurrent symbol in the cells of a different TRS group of same L1subpool are not usable, hence, regarded as empty (zero) allocation symbol.

Note 6: A PDL rule shall assure that NRBTS/NRCELL/NRDSSLTE:ssbPosition=6 is not allowed if slowPrbPoolingAllowed is equal to TRUE.

Note 7: While PRB blanking feature enabled together with PRB pooling(that is, slowPrbPoolingAllowed set to 'true'), CSI-RS for tracking shall be allocated in non-blanked area or full bandwidth according to NIDD parameter trsMutingInBlankedPRBsEnabled. But to simplify the implementation, for PRB blanking case still follow the design of CSI-RS of tracking for nonblanking case while PRB pooling, that is, cells of same L1 subpool that are allowed to have CSI-RS for tracking concurrently are grouped together in same csirsPoolingGroup, refer more to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4276_replaced([11276704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpKRoPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 

The supported SLIV for PDSCH transmission based on the slot format in FDD was presented on 5G_UP_ALG_14243_replaced([11115315](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNFPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

94 (S=3, L=9) | Note: CB007372-A aligns this requirement with the code, slowPrbPoolingAllowed is irrelevant. Used for DL FDD carrier shared with LTE and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false with NR-PDCCH in symbol 2 and the two last symbols left empty (this is a special DSS case, [11115691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpw3dPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). or used for FR1 CA UE in FDD SCell PDSCH impacted by TAS-SRS for SB BF from TDD PCell in critical band combination with 3 symbol PDCCH and the two last symbols left empty. For FDD with DSS and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true it is used for the same purpose as in FDD non-DSS. |   
54 (S=1, L=12) | SLIV 54 is used for 12 symbols PDSCH • For FDD except 5MHz carrier not shared with LTE, when there is Ca in last symbol in SSB slot without or with Ct • or If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' AND DL FDD carrier not shared with LTE AND with one-symbol PDCCH **DL data slot**(without CSI-RS AND with the last symbol with zero allocation) 5G_UP_ALG_2365_replaced([11115079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**_* • or if slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true', DL FDD carrier not shared with LTE, one-symbol PDCCH, CA in last symbol * or if NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode_ *= 1 (mute_slot_3_6_8), then in slot offsets 3 & 6 in every even SFN and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN as long as these slots have one-symbol PDCCH** else If NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode **= 2 (mute_slot_0_3_6_8), then in slot offsets 0, 3 & 6 in every even SFN and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN as long as these slots have one-symbol PDCCH** End If. |

80 (S=3, L=10) | SLIV 80 is used to schedule 10 symbols PDSCH • For FDD with DSS carrier shared with LTE, when there is Ca in last symbol in SSB slot without or withCt**. Used also actRateMatchedCsiIm is set to 'true' for slots with CSI-RS on the last symbols of the DL data slot**.**_* • or If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' AND DL FDD carrier not shared with LTE, AND with three-symbol PDCCH DL data slot (without CSI-RS AND with the last symbol with zero allocation) 5G_UP_ALG_2365_replaced([11115079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) • or If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true', AND DL FDD carrier shared with LTE AND with NR-PDCCH in symbol 2 for SSB slot • or If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true', AND DL FDD carrier shared with LTE, AND with NR-PDCCH in symbol 2 for DL data slot (without CSI-RS AND with the last symbol with zero allocation) 5G_UP_ALG_2365_replaced([11115079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqw2vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). • or if slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true', DL FDD carrier not shared with LTE, three-symbol PDCCH, CA in last symbol. * or if NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode = 1 (mute_slot_3_6_8), then in slot offsets 3 & 6 in every even SFN and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN as long as these slots have three-symbol PDCCH else If NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode _*= 2 (mute_slot_0_3_6_8), then in slot offsets 0, 3 & 6 in every even SFN and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN as long as these slots have three-symbol PDCCH** End If. Note: For FDD with DSS and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true it is applicable only when 3 PDCCH symbols are configured. |   
68 (S=1, L=11) | SLIV 68 is used to schedule 11 symbols PDSCH • For FR1 CA UE in FDD SCell PDSCH impacted by TAS-SRS for SB BF from TDD PCell in critical band combination with 1 symbol PDCCH and the two last symbols left empty. |   
81 (S=2, L=10) | SLIV 81 is used to schedule 10 symbols PDSCH • For FR1 CA UE in FDD SCell PDSCH impacted by TAS-SRS for SB BF from TDD PCell in critical band combination with 2 symbol PDCCH and the two last symbols left empty. For FDD with DSS and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true it is used for the same purpose as in FDD non-DSS. |   
72 (S=2, L=6) | TDRA for the PDSCH transmissions in a slot where CSI-IM are configured in symbol 8 in the cell, when the RNTI is not configured yet to handle the rate matching around CSI-IM and the NIDD parameter “NRCELL/dmrsTypeAPosition“ is set to “pos2”. |   
100 (S=2, L=8) | TDRA for the PDSCH transmissions in a slot where CSI-IM are configured in symbol 10 in the cell, when the RNTI is not configured yet to handle the rate matching around CSI-IM and the NIDD parameter “NRCELL/dmrsTypeAPosition“ is set to “pos2”. |

### 3.5.9.2 Configuration of PDSCH Time Domain Resource Allocation Lists

#### 3.5.9.2.0-1 Configuration of PDSCH Time Domain Resource Allocation Lists The 5G-L2-PS uses up to three lists of Time Domain Resource Allocations (TDRA) for the PDSCH transmissions per bandwidth part configured. The list is selected according the Radio Network Temporary Identifier (RNTI), the search space type (Common or UE-Specific) and the Control Resource Set (CORESET) identifier used for the transmissions:  The Default Time Domain Resource Allocation List (known by default in the UE). This list is used at least for the SIB1 transmissions and when there is no specific common TDRA list defined by the 5G-L2-PS (see common TDRA list). This list is not broadcasted to the UEs and is defined according to the frequency range, the configuration index of the CORESET(0) and both Sub Carrier Spacings (SCS), common and SS/PBCH.  The common Time Domain Resource Allocation list. This list is defined by the 5G-L2-PS according to the slot formats and the position of any downlink signals transmitted at the end of the slot within downlink symbols. By default, this list is initialized with the default list used for the SIB1 (see above). When the 5G-L2-PS creates a specific list of TDRA which are not in the default one, the common TDRA list contains only the TDRA defined by the 5G-L2-PS, is broadcasted to the UEs in the PDSCH-ConfigCommon Information Element (IE) on the radio interface and is sent back to the C-Plane in the PsCell_CellSetupResp message. Otherwise, the 5G-L2-PS sends an empty TDRA list to the C-Plane.  The dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocation list. This list is defined according to all slot formats used for the downlink transmissions and for the slot pattern defined in the cell. This list, to be configured in the UEs through the PDSCH-Config IE, is sent back to the C-Plane in the PsUser_UserSetupResp message. (ID: 11115345)

#### 3.5.9.2.1 PDSCH default Time Domain Resource Allocation

##### 3.5.9.2.1.0-1 PDSCH default Time Domain Resource Allocation (ID: 11115351)

**3.5.9.2.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `12521648`)

PDSCH default Time Domain Resource Allocation The 5G-L2-PS defines the list of possible Time Domain Resource Allocation (TDRA) which will be used by the downlink scheduler for the SIB1 PDSCH transmissions.

With the SS/PBCH block and CORESET multiplexing pattern defined through the frequency band indicator, type0CoresetConfigIndex, SCS SS/PBCH and Common parameters sent in the PsCell_CellSetupReq message, the 5G-L2-PS selects the right default TDRA list (A,B or C) to be used for the SIB1 transmissions and to initialize the common TDRA list as follow.

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---  
Default list index according to SS/PBCH block and CORESET multiplexing pattern |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
SS/PBCH SCS (kHz) |  | 15 |  | 30 |  | 30 (n79 [CB009173-B] and 104)[End CB009173-B] |  | 120 |  | 240 |   
Common SCS (kHz) |  | 15 | 30 | 15 | 30 | 15 | 30 | 60 | 120 | 60 | 120  
type0CoresetConfigurationIndex | 0 | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A  
1 | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A |   
2 | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A |   
3 | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | A |   
4 | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | C | - | B |   
5 | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | C | - | B |   
6 | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | C | - | B |   
7 | A | A | A | A | A | A | A | C | - | B |   
8 | A | A | A | A | A | A | B | - | - | - |   
9 | A | A | - | A | - | A | B | - | - | - |   
10 | A | A | - | A | - | - | B | - | - | - |   
11 | A | A | - | A | - | - | B | - | - | - |   
12 | A | A | - | A | - | - | - | - | - | - |   
13 | A | A | - | A | - | - | - | - | - | - |   
14 | A | - | - | A | - | - | - | - | - | - |   
15 | - | - | - | A | - | - | - | - | - | - |   
|  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---  
Default A List of PDSCH Time domain resource allocation |  |  |  |  |   
TDRA Index | dmrsTypeAPosition | PDSCH mapping type | OFDM Start symbol (S) | Time domain length (L) | SLIV  
0 | 2 | Type A | 2 | 12 | 53  
3 | 3 | 11 | 66 |  |   
1 | 2 | Type A | 2 | 10 | 81  
3 | 3 | 9 | 94 |  |   
2 | 2 | Type A | 2 | 9 | 95  
3 | 3 | 8 | 108 |  |   
3 | 2 | Type A | 2 | 7 | 86  
3 | 3 | 6 | 73 |  |   
4 | 2 | Type A | 2 | 5 | 58  
3 | 3 | 4 | 45 |  |   
5 | 2 | Type B | 9 | 4 | 51  
3 | 10 | 4 | 52 |  |   
6 | 2 | Type B | 4 | 4 | 46  
3 | 6 | 4 | 48 |  |   
7 | 2, 3 | Type B | 5 | 7 | 89  
8 | 2, 3 | Type B | 5 | 2 | 19  
9 | 2, 3 | Type B | 9 | 2 | 23  
10 | 2, 3 | Type B | 12 | 2 | 26  
11 | 2, 3 | Type A | 1 | 13 | 40  
12 | 2, 3 | Type A | 1 | 6 | 71  
13 | 2, 3 | Type A | 2 | 4 | 44  
14 | 2, 3 | Type B | 4 | 7 | 88  
15 | 2, 3 | Type B | 8 | 4 | 50  
  
This list is used by the downlink scheduler to compute the link adatpation parameters of the SIB1 and to build the PDSCH and PDCCH (Downlink Control Information content) data.

---

#### 3.5.9.2.2 PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration

##### 3.5.9.2.2.0-1 PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration Common TDRA usage and construction (ID: 11115365)

**3.5.9.2.2.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11115375`)

PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration The 5G-L2-PS defines the list of possible Time Domain Resource Allocation (TDRA) which will be used by the downlink scheduler for the following PDSCH transmissions:

· The System Information (SI) messages (except the SIB1).

· The Paging records

· The Random Access (RA) procedure associated to a RA-RNTI or a Temporary C-RNTI (TC-RNTI) or a C-RNTI without the first Signaling Radio Bearer (SRB0) established or a C-RNTI without UE dedicated configuration activated (5G_UP_ALG_18227_replaced([11153313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kslh9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[CB010544-A] including the UE in the initial BWP without dedicated configuration**[End CB010544-A] and when the Type1-PDCCH is configured with the Control Resource Set (CORESET) identifier zero.****

· The UE dedicated PDSCH transmissions for which the Downlink Control Information (DCI) is transmitted in a common search space associated to the CORESET(0).

To be also transmitted in the PDSCH-ConfigCommon Information Element (IE) towards UEs, the 5G-L2-PS sends back this list to the C-Plane using the pdschTimeDomainAllocationList structure in the PsCell_CellSetupResp message.

The list is always provided to the C-Plane, also if all Time Domain Resource Allocations, selected, are included in the default list known by the UE and defined according to the SS/PBCH block and CORESET multiplexing pattern

Note: The algorithm implemented differs from the one specified and illustrated below. It does not distinguish among the type of the cell (FDD/TDD) and does neither consider other optimizations, e.g. due to used CORESET duration patterns. Thus, more list entries may be created as needed for a cell

---

configuration 11115384: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration 11115384: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration 11115384: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration The principle steps to build the common list is summarized hereafter. [image-0][image_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process related to cell setup and resource allocation in a telecommunications system. The flowchart begins with a request labeled "PsCell_CellSetupReq". The process involves several steps: 1\. **Selecting Slot Formats:** The first step is to select slot formats from cell slot format lists to handle SH-Msg(s), Paging, and RA procedures using Type1. 2\. **Selecting First Slot Format:** The first slot format from the selected list is then chosen. 3\. **Selecting First PDSCH Start Symbol:** From the cell PDSCH start symbol list, the first start PDSCH symbol for TDRA is selected. 4\. **Computing SLIV:** The SLIV (Start Symbol and Length) is computed with CSI-RS, if configured, using `tdraStartSymb`, slot format, and CSI symbols. The `tdraLength` is calculated as `NbLsymb - tdraStartSymb - [0, csiPsSymbol]`. 5\. **Building TDRA:** A TDRA (Time Domain Resource Allocation) is built with `K0` set to 0, PDSCH mapping Type set to "TypeA", and SUV (Start Symbol and Length Value). 6\. **Checking for Existing TDRA:** A check is performed to see if the TDRA already exists in the list. * If "Yes", the process proceeds to check for remaining `tdraStartSymb` in the list. * If "No", the TDRA is added to the common `pdschTimeDomainAllocationList`. 7\. **Checking for Remaining`tdraStartSymb`:** If there are remaining `tdraStartSymb` in the list, the process loops back to "Select the next `tdraStartSymb` in the list". 8\. **Checking for Remaining Slot Format:** If there are no remaining `tdraStartSymb`, a check is made for remaining slot formats in the list. * If "Yes", the process loops back to "Select the next slot format in the list". * If "No", the process moves to "Specific TDRA addition". 9\. **Checking for More Than 16 Indexes:** A check is performed to see if there are more than 16 indexes. * If "Yes", a "Configuration Error" is indicated. * If "No", the computed `pdschTimeDomainAllocationList` is reported in the `PsCell_CellSetupResp`. 10\. **Broadcasting the List:** The list is then broadcast within the 5GL2-PS for transmissions using the common TDRA list. 11\. **End:** The process concludes with an "End" state. The flowchart uses standard flowchart symbols: rounded rectangles for start/end points, rectangles for process steps, and diamonds for decision points. Arrows indicate the flow of control.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5455.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] File: pdschTdraMgt.vsdx. Folder:

##### 3.5.9.2.2.0-3 PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration Slot format selection (ID: 11115389)

**3.5.9.2.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11115396`)

PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration The list, for the PDSCH mapping type A, is built according to the slot format with the largest number of downlink symbols in frame structure defined for the cell, the DM-RS type A position, the predefined position of the UE-Specific or Cell-Specific CSI-RS for channel feedback and Dynamic Spectrum Sharing (DSS), in order to handle the PDSCH transmissions defined above.

The slot Format DL14 for “semiStatic” or “tdLte” patterns (TDD) or for FDD configurations and BI12,1 for TDD “flexible” are used to define the TDRA list for the PDSCH symbol lengths with default slot formats.

Only slots available for PDSCH scheduling without PDSCH muting (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2373_replaced([11115215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr--_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are considered.

For TDD, slots with CSI-RS at the end of slot shall refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9409_replaced([11115460](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpubOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note with actDlSrsBm is true and dlMimoMode is CL 8x4MIMO, both UE specific CSI-RS resource and cell specific CSI-RS resource coexist in the cell.

Note with and dlMimoMode is CL 8x4MIMO and actCsirsMultiplexing is true, slots with either cell specific or UE specific CSI-RS at end is added to common TDRA list.

If **{actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and the**[Before CB008285-E-UPD001] numberOfTransmittedSsBlocks **[CB008285-E-UPD001] number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see 5G_UP_82_replaced([11347116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[End CB008285-E-UPD001] is greater than 4}, slots with either cell specific or UE specific CSI-RS at end shall be added to common TDRA list.**_*_** *

~~For FDD, there is only Cell-Specifc CSI-RS in the slots handling the PDSCH transmissions and this slot (SS/PBCH slot) is not used for the specific allocations (see requirement 5G_UP_ALG_6667_replaced([11115365](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).~~

---

##### 3.5.9.2.2.0-4 PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration Start PDSCH symbols selection for common PDSCH TDRA (ID: 11115399)

**3.5.9.2.2.0-4.0-7**  (ID: `12590628`)

PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration **For TDD:**

gNB-DU shall build the actual PDSCH start symbols expected for cell. L2-PS shall use **each position of the bits set to 1 in the monitoringSymbolsWithinSlot bitmap for** each search space and the CORESET duration of the associated CORESET, to decide the PDCCH symbols for each search space. The start OFDM symbol of TDRAs shall be the 1st one after the last PDCCH symbols of **each UE specific search space configured for the cell. Note common search space overlap with UE specific space. Note if the same PDSCH start position shall be seen as one. Example:** ****

• In a slot, if the only search space has monitoringSymbolWithinSlot as Symbol_0_1 and its CORESET duration is one, then PDSCH start symbol from 1 and 2 shall be supported.

• In a slot, if the only search space has monitoringSymbolWithinSlot as Symbol_0_1_2 and its CORESET duration is one, then PDSCH start symbol 3 shall be supported.

• In a slot, if the first search space has monitoringSymbolWithinSlot as Symbol_0_1 and its CORESET duration is one, another search space in the same slot have monitoringSymbolWithinSlot as Symbol_0 and its CORESET duration is one, then PDSCH start symbol from 1 and 2 shall be supported.

• In a slot, if the only one search space has monitoringSymbolWithinSlot Symbol_1 and its CORESET duration is one, then PDSCH start symbol from 2 shall be supported. (DSS case).

• In a slot, if the first search space has monitoringSymbolWithinSlot as Symbol_0 and its CORESET duration is two, another search space in the same slot have monitoringSymbolWithinSlot as Symbol_2 and its CORESET duration is one, then PDSCH start symbol from 2 and 3 shall be supported.

Rationale: when addaptive PDCCH is enabled, L2 may only use the first PDCCH search space.

• In a slot, if the only search space has monitoringSymbolWithinSlot as Symbol_0 and its CORESET duration is three, then PDSCH start symbol from 3 shall be supported.

2 PDCCH symbols are configured in BWs >40MHz or in BWs >=20MHz and <=40MHz if frame structure is 'not' **tdLte configuration 0. Maximum 3 PDCCH symbols are supported in BWs 10Mhz and 15MHz or in BWs >=20MHz and <=40MHz if frame structure is tdLte configuration 0.**

**For FDD:**

When nrLteDssMode received in the PsCell_CellSetupReq is equal to 0 (no DSS) or 1, the start OFDM symbol of TDRAs must be allowed for each downlink OFDM symbol, starting from the index 1 and until the one handling the DM-RS Type A specified in the “PsCell_CellSetupReq” message with “dmrsTypeAPosition” parameter.

When nrLteDssMode received in the PsCell_CellSetupReq is greater than 1 [CB007372-A] and if any coreset is overlapping with LTE shared area (which is always true for NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false) [End CB007372-A], the start OFDM symbol of TDRAs must be equal to the downlink OFDM symbol handling the DM-RS Type A specified in the “PsCell_CellSetupReq” message with “dmrsTypeAPosition” parameter.

[CB007372-A]   
When asymmetric DSS is enabled (NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true) and all coresets are within NR dedicated area (not overlapping with LTE shared area), the start OFDM symbol of TDRAs must be allowed for each downlink OFDM symbol, starting from the index 2 and until the one handling the DM-RS Type A specified in the “PsCell_CellSetupReq” message with “dmrsTypeAPosition” parameter.  
[End CB007372-A]

Parameter full name:

actCsirsMultiplexing: NRBTS.NRCELL.actCsirsMultiplexing

actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf: NRBTS.NRCELL.actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf

actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot: NRBTS.NRCELL.actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot

actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf: NRBTS.NRCELL.actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf

monitoringSymbolWithinSlot:

for common CORESET:

NRBTS.BWP_PROFILE.PDCCH.PDCCH_CONFIG_COMMON.searchSpaceCommon.monitoringSymbolWithinSlot

for dedicated CORESET:

NRBTS.BWP_PROFILE.PDCCH.PDCCH_CONFIG_DEDICATED.searchSpaceDedicated.monitoringSymbolWithinSlot

With,

NDL,Symb:

Number of Downlink symbols available in the slot format.

tdraStartSymb:

PDSCH start symbol selected.

PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration 12815920: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration 12815920: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration 12815920: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration 12815920: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration When the 5G-L2-PS selects combination of default slot Format with CSI-RS/IM and for which PDSCH allocation overlapping is forbidden, the set of TDRA lengths is computed according to the number of available PDSCH symbols and the start symbol selected.

[image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a light gray font against a white background. The equation reads: `tdraLength = NDL,symb - tdraStartSymb - cstSymb`.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5472.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

With,

_N_ DL,Symb:**

Number of Downlink symbols available in the slot format.

_tdraStartSymb:_

PDSCH start symbol selected.

_csiSymb:_

Number of CSI-RS/IM symbols configured which could not be overlapped by the PDSCH allocation (UE-Specific or Cell-Specific CSI-RS/IM).

If actTddCsiImRm is true, gNB-DU shall count cell specific CSI-IM symbol (as well as symbols after CSI-IM symbol) into "_csiSymb" in the slots where ZP CSI-RS (CSI-IM) are located to make sure that PDSCH could not be scheduled on CSI-IM symbol. The CSI-IM symbol allocation for different cell specific CSI-RS resource for channel measurement refer to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13831_replaced([11302003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqdSLPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). __Note: No additional new SLIVs will be added because the value of csiSymb is the same as legacy._ **

On SSB slots, number of DL symbols(NDL,Symb) shall be reduced as per muting of Last DL symbol as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2330_replaced([11114751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnth_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Only 16 indexes are allowd in TDRA list, so considering this we would have to limit the SLIVs to the ones that are really needed for scheduling.

After taking off symbols for CSI-RS, slots with less than 9 symbols left for PDCCH and PDSCH shall not be added to the TDRA list.

If actHighNumberOfUEs is TRUE AND rdActDedicatedCsiSlots is TRUE, gNB-DU shall not add the following SLIVs to the TDRA list:

  * SLIVs with CSI-RS present in the slot.



If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false, CSI-RS symbols may not be allocated from the end of a slot, and thus the symbols after the CSI-RS symbols are not possible to use for PDSCH. In this case, number of unused symbols after CSI-RS symbols is 2 and added into _csiSymb._

**[CB015668-A]** Note: actTddCsirsOpt and actTddCsiImRm are not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator. **[End CB015668-A]** ****

---

##### 3.5.9.2.2.0-7 PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration Slots with CSI-RS for channel acquisition (ID: 11115460)

**3.5.9.2.2.0-7.0-11**  (ID: `12874593`)

PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration For FDD:

refers to: [12805308: Slots with CSI-RS for channel acquisition FDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4wO1Q59LEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

~~Slots with cell-specific CSI-RS shall have _csiSymb = 1_ ~~

~~If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), slots with cell-specific CSI-RS of other CsiRsPoolingGroups in the same L1 Pool shall also have _csiSymb = 1._ ~~

~~A list of such slots is described in 5G_UP_ALG_19561_replaced([11115176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).~~

~~If ZAB privilege is provided to the cell (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is set to 0 (i.e. the parameter is disabled and not configured), the last symbol of a cell specific CSI-RS slot can be used for PDSCH.~~

~~End If~~

~~If **NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is set to 1 (mute_slot_3_6_8),** ~~

~~Slot offsets 3 & 6 in every even SFN and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN shall have _csiSymb = 1 (The last symbol of these slots shall not be used for any PDSCH transmission irrespective of the ZAB privilege provided to the cell)_ ~~

~~Else If **NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is set to 2 (mute_slot_0_3_6_8),** ~~

~~Slot offsets 0, 3 & 6 in every even SFN and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN shall have _csiSymb = 1 (The last symbol of these slots shall not be used for any PDSCH transmission irrespective of the ZAB privilege provided to the cell)_ ~~

~~End If~~

For TDD:

Note that the rest of this requirement only applies to FR1. For CSI-RS in FR2, please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_26373_replaced([11117380](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-56PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 

  * **Case 1): cell specific CSI-RS (row 8 in TS38.211) at the end of the slot**



**\-- If actCsirsMultiplexing is true: slots with frequency multiplexed cell specific CSI-RS (row 8 in table 7.4.1.5.3-1 in TS38.211) at the end of the slot if they are not included in common TDRA list;**

  * If NIDD:maxCsirsNumber >= 4: _csiSymb = 2,4;_
  * else: _csiSymb = 2;_



\-- else (i.e.actCsirsMultiplexing is false): Slots with 8 ports cell specific CSI-RS **is not added to common list:_csiSymb = 0._**

  * **Case 2): For FR1, UE specific CSI-RS (row 3 or 4 in table 7.4.1.5.3-1 in TS38.211) at the end of the slot**



Slots with UE specific CSI-RS shall have _csiSymb = 1._

  * **_*Case 3): one cell specific CSI-RS (row 3 or 4 in table 7.4.1.5.3-1 in TS38.211) at the end of the slot:_** *



**\--_csiSymb = 1._**

  * **Case 4): the manual configured** cell specific CSI-RS is provided in cell setup request.****



\-- If manual configured **cell specific CSI-RS is in slot that is within secondary list used for cell specific CSI-RS and the slot has 14 symbols for DL (5G_UP_ALG_2530_replaced([11117351](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S3_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the slot shall be considered with CSI-RS symbol's configuration;**

\-- else the slot itself shall not be added to SLIV list as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_6484_replaced([11115389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0J_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), _csiSymb = 0._

Rationale: a) special slot cannot be scheduled for OSI/paging and etc. as defined in (5G_UP_ALG_6484_replaced([11115389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0J_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))); b) TRS slot or SSB slot is normal DL 14 slot but it cannot be scheduled for OSI/paging and etc. c) Cell specific CSI-RS symbols not used by any UE shall be used for PDSCH, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3570_replaced([11159651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktKwzvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), shall also be added to SLIV list. 

\- If actDlSrsBm is true:

\-- If dlMimoMode is CL 8x4MIMO: **Case 1) and** 2) coexist;****

\-- else **Case 2) exist;**

  * else:



\-- If dlMimoMode is CL 8x4MIMO and actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is False: **Case 1) exist;**

  * else If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true:



\-- if there is no manual configured **cell specific CSI-RS is provided in cell setup request:**

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
dlMimoMode | ~~numberOfTransmittedSsBlocks~~ number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch) | support case | subfeature  
CL 8x4 | 4 | 1) | CB008534-A  
CL 8x4 | 6 | Co-exist of 1) and 2) | CB008534-B  
CL 4x4 or CL 4x2 or OL 4x4 or OL 4x2 | 2 | 3) | CB008534-A  
  
\-- else

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
dlMimoMode | ~~numberOfTransmittedSsBlocks~~ number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch) | support case | subfeature  
CL 8x4 | 4 | 4) | CB008534-C  
CL 8x4 | 6 | Co-exist of 4) and 2) | CB008534-C  
CL 4x4 or CL 4x2 or OL 4x4 or OL 4x2 | 2 | 4) | CB008534-C  
  
\-- else **Case 2) exist;**

  * **_*if actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true:_** *



\-- if there is no manual configured **cell specific CSI-RS is provided in cell setup request:**

**\--- Case 3) exist;**

**else:**

**\--- Case 4) exist;**

**\- If DL PRB Pooling for TDD FR1 is activated, that is slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**

**\--_then csiSymb = 1 shall always coexist with all above cases except case 4)._**

\-- _csiSymb = 4 shall always coexist with all above cases except case 4) if actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false, due to Cell Specific CSI-RS in other pooling groups._

**\- If DL PRB Pooling for TDD FR1 in TDD eCPRI 7-2e is activated, that is slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false**

\-- _csiSymb = 4 shall always coexist with all above cases except case 4)_

Note: When **DL PRB Pooling for TDD FR1 is activated and ZAB privilege is provided to the cell (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),****[CB014543-H] [N****ote that** **w** hen partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))], **[End CB014543-H]**  _csiSymb = 1 as UE specific CSI-RS at the end of the slot. When_ _DL PRB Pooling for TDD FR1 is activated and ZAB privilege is not provided to the cell, last symbol of a slot can be used for UE specific CSI-RS by other cells in the same L1 Pool, and as such the cell shall not use last DL symbol of the slot for PDSCH._ **

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and actTddCsirsOpt is true, or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true AND actTddCsirsOpt is true) 



**\--_then csiSymb = 2,4 shall always coexist with all above cases except case 4)._**

Note: In such case,

if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true 

  * If ZAB privilege is provided to the cell (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), _csiSymb = 2,4 as cell specific CSI-RS at the end of the slot, actCsiRsMuting, rdDynamicScheduling(5G_UP_ALG_25160_replaced([11138829](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kriZE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdspectralEfficiencyThd(5G_UP_ALG_25163_replaced([11138839](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kriZFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall also be considered for PDSCH scheduling(5G_UP_ALG_26017_replaced([11117367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-55PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))._

  * If ZAB privilege is not provided to the cell, last several symbols of the slot can not be used for PDSCH, because cells in other pooling groups in same L1 Pool may transmit cell specific CSI-RS on these symbols




else if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true

  * _csiSymb = 2,4 as cell specific CSI-RS at the end of the slot, actCsiRsMuting, rdDynamicScheduling(5G_UP_ALG_25160_replaced([11138829](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kriZE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdspectralEfficiencyThd(5G_UP_ALG_25163_replaced([11138839](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kriZFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall also be considered for PDSCH scheduling(5G_UP_ALG_26017_replaced([11117367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-55PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))._



end

\- If actTddCsiImRm is true, CSI-IM symbols(as well as symbols after CSI-IM symbols) (5G_UP_ALG_25008_replaced([11116931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72n_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be considered to make sure that PDSCH could not be scheduled on CSI-IM symbols for common TDRA usage.

**\- If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true** and actTddCsirsOpt is false, CSI-RS symbols may not be allocated from the end of a slot, and thus the CSI-RS symbols and the symbols after the CSI-RS symbols are considered as not possible to use for PDSCH. _csiSymb = number of CSI-RS symbols as in above cases + number of unused symbols after CSI-RS symbols, number of unused symbols after CSI-RS symbols = 2. Note: When DL PRB pooling for TDD FR1, cells which have ZAB privilege can schedule PDSCH in the CSI-RS/TRS slots if a valid SLIV exists._ ****

**Note: actTddCsirsOpt and actTddCsiImRm are not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator.**

---

##### 3.5.9.2.2.0-8 PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration Slots with CSI-RS for channel acquisition FDD (ID: 12805308)

**3.5.9.2.2.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12805309`)

PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration For FDD:

  * **Case 1): cell specific CSI-RS (row 1,2,3,4, in TS38.211) at the end of the slot**



**\--_csiSymb = 1._**

-[CB008577-B] **Case 2): cell specific CSI-RS (row 6) at the end of the slot**

**\--_csiSymb = 1._**

  * **_*Case 3): cell specific CSI-RS (row 18 [CB008577-E]/16 [End CB008577-E]) at the end of the slot:_** *



**\--_csiSymb = 4._**

[End CB008577-B]

[Before CB013525-D] Note for deletion, only CSI-RS symbol position matters to SLIV calculation, it is always the last symbol of the slot. 

If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_7785_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), slots with cell-specific CSI-RS of other CsiRsPoolingGroups in the same L1 Pool shall also have _csiSymb = 1._

A list of such slots is described in 5G_UP_ALG_19561_replaced([11115176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If ZAB privilege is provided to the cell (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[CB014543-G], [Note: w** hen partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) ], **[End CB014543-G]** and NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is set to 0 (i.e. the parameter is disabled and not configured), the last symbol of a cell specific CSI-RS slot can be used for PDSCH.

End If

If **NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is set to 1 (mute_slot_3_6_8),**

Slot offsets 3 & 6 in every even SFN and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN shall have _csiSymb = 1 (The last symbol of these slots shall not be used for any PDSCH transmission irrespective of the ZAB privilege provided to the cell)_

Else If **NRBTS.slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is set to 2 (mute_slot_0_3_6_8),**

Slot offsets 0, 3 & 6 in every even SFN and slot offset 8 in every odd SFN shall have _csiSymb = 1 (The last symbol of these slots shall not be used for any PDSCH transmission irrespective of the ZAB privilege provided to the cell)_

End If

[End CB013525-D]

[CB008577-B] If dlMimoMode is CL32x4: case2) and case 3) coexist. [ End CB008577-B]

---

configuration 11115504: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration 11115504: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration 11115504: PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration The 5G-L2-PS creates Time Domain Resource Allocation list with the following constraints:  The slot offset (K0) is set to 0.  The PDSCH mapping is set to “typeA”.  The Start and Length Indicator Value (SLIV), for each TDRA, is computed with the formula hereafter and the following cases:  The start OFDM symbol of TDRAs. The 5G-L2-PS scans the start PDSCH symbol list defined previously according to the PDCCH configuration of all BWP in the cell (see 5G_UP_ALG_6487_replaced([11115399](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0KvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  Lengths of TDRAs must be computed in order to maximize the number of PDSCH symbols with or without UE-Specific or Cell CSI-RS at the end of the slot. For each start OFDM symbol allowed, the 5G-L2-PS uses teh expected TDRA length computed previously (5G_UP_ALG_6489_replaced([11115420](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpubMPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_6619_replaced([11115428](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpubMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Then the 5G-L2-PS computes the remaining OFDM symbols of each selected slot formats according to the frame structure and the presence of the UE-Specific or Cell CSI-RS for channel feedback if activated. [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation with piecewise definitions. The equation is for SLIV and is defined as follows: SLIV = { 14 * (tdraLength - 1) + tdraSymbStart, if 0 < (tdraLength - 1) ≤ 7 (14 * (14 - tdraLength + 1)) + (14 - 1 - tdraSymbStart), if 7 < (tdraLength - 1) } Additionally, there is a condition: and 0 < tdraLength ≤ 14 - tdraSymbStart[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5482.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] [image-1][image_desc]The image contains the text "trdaSymbStart" in a light gray, italicized font. The text is slightly blurry and has a subtle blue and yellow hue.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5482.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]: Start OFDM symbol of the PDSCH start symbol list and not after the dmrsTypeAPosition. [image-2][image_desc]The image contains the text "trdaLength". The text is in a light gray color and is slightly blurry. The font appears to be a serif font.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5482.003.png[/image_path][/image-2]: Length of the TDRA as defined above. It takes into account the potential presence of the wideband CSI-RS for channel feedback which could be transmitted in any BWP overlapping the PDSCH resources aligned with the CORESET(0).

##### 3.5.9.2.2.0-10 PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration Special Time Domain Resource Assignment addition (ID: 11115507)

**3.5.9.2.2.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `12802810`)

PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration When nrLteDssMode received in the PsCell_CellSetupReq is greater than 1 [CB007372-A] and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false [End CB007372-A], a specific TDRA length set to 9 is added with the PDSCH start symbol, to avoid the collision between the LTE Cell Reference Signals (C-RS) and DM-RS (front loaded and additional) before the UE configuration.

To allow PDSCH transmissions for at least the RA-RNTI without rate matching capability around the CSI-IM in FDD and with enough PDSCH symbols to have a TBS of at least 64 bits (1 RAR size), the U-Plane adds specific TDRA starting from dmRsTypeAPosition and a length which doe snot overlap the CSI-IM in symbol 8 or 10 (see [11115315: Supported SLIV for PDSCH transmission based on the slot format in FDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNFPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

##### 3.5.9.2.2.0-11 PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration Common pdschTimeDomainAllocation update (ID: 11115515)

**3.5.9.2.2.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `11115516`)

PDSCH common Time Domain Resource Allocation configuration The 5G-L2-PS reports the computed non empty TDRA list in the PsCell_CellSetupResp message and use this list for all PDSCH transmisisons requesting to use it (5G_UP_ALG_6667_replaced([11115365](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

#### 3.5.9.2.3 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-1 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Dedicated TDRA usage and construction - Overview (ID: 11115524)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11115527`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration The 5G-L2-PS defines the list of possible Time Domain Resource Allocation (TDRA) which will be used by the downlink scheduler for the following PDSCH transmissions:

 The UE dedicated PDSCH transmissions for which the Downlink Control Information (DCI) is transmitted in a common search space associated to the Control Resource Set (CORESET) with the identifier not equal to zero.

 The UE dedicated PDSCH transmissions for which the Downlink Control Information (DCI) is transmitted in a UE-Specific search space whatever the identifier of the associated CORESET.

Following requirements define the detailed steps for building the dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations:

o Flowchart (5G_UP_ALG_9299_replaced([11115530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) indicate the high level flow chart.

o Dedicated TDRA list initialization (5G_UP_ALG_6657_replaced([11115539](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) defines how the dedicated TDRA list is initialized.

o Slot Format selection (5G_UP_ALG_6658_replaced([11115546](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCTfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) defines the allowed PDSCH in the combination of slot format with/without signals/channels.

o Start PDSCH symbol (5G_UP_ALG_6659_replaced([11115568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) defines how to compute the Start symbol of the PDSCH.

o PDSCH symbol lengths computation with default slot formats (5G_UP_ALG_6660_replaced([11115577](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpV_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) defines the length allowed for the TDRA for the slot format without additional signals/channels.

o PDSCH symbol lengths computation for slot formats with PDSCH allocation restrictions (5G_UP_ALG_6661_replaced([11115584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpWfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_9301_replaced([11115621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) defines the length allowed for the TDRA for the slot format without and with TRS.

o [CNI-134962-E] Conditional addition of RIM-related one TDRA entry as per ([12642389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3L4pgEHIEfC6a_agjpBoXg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). [End CNI-134962-E]

o Time Domain Resources Assignment definition (5G_UP_ALG_6662_replaced([11115676](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpw3cvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) defines the addition parameter of the TDRA (k0, SLIV computation).

o [CNI-134962-E] TDRA to handle transmissions which can’t be done using adaptive retransmission mechanism. [[12879282 mechanism](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_7R3-FbNAEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)] [End CNI-134962-E]

o Special Time Domain Resource Assignment addition (5G_UP_ALG_6663_replaced([11115691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpw3dPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) defines specific TDRA handling

o Duplicate TDRA filtering (5G_UP_ALG_6713_replaced([11115701](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpw3d_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) specifies the duplicate TDRA handling

o DCI Format 1_0 and 1_1 size management (5G_UP_ALG_6696_replaced([11171698](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuGk4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) specifies dummy entry handling to control the DCI Format 1_1 size.

o Dedicated pdschTimeDomainAllocation update (5G_UP_ALG_6664_replaced([11115708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpw3efvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) sends the final TDRA list.

---
