Resource Allocations configuration 11115536: PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration 11115536: PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration 11115536: PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration The principle steps to build the dedicatedTDRA list is summarized hereafter. [image-0][image_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process for constructing a dedicated TDRA (Time Domain Resource Allocation) list. The flowchart begins with the "Default dedicated TDRA part construction" and proceeds through several steps involving initialization, selection of slot formats and PDSCH start symbols, computation of SLIV (Start Symbol Index Value), and building the TDRA. It includes decision points for checking if a TDRA already exists in the list, if there are remaining symbols or slot formats, and if there are configuration issues related to DCI (Downlink Control Information) size. The process also involves adding dummy entries to avoid conflicts and checking the number of indexes. Finally, it reports the computed list and broadcasts it for transmissions. The flowchart ends with two possible outcomes: "End" or "Configuration Error". Here is the extracted text from the image: Default dedicated TDRA part construction Initialize the dedicated TDRA list with the default TDRA list, saved at the end of the common TDRA list construction From the cell slot format lists, select all slot formats to handle the PDSCH transmission with and without CSI (channel feedback, Interference management, tracking. Select the first slot format from the selected list From the cell PDSCH start symbol list, select the first start PDSCH symbol for TDRA Compute the SLIV with CSI-RS, if configured, with tdraStart Symb, slot format and CSI symbols, if there are: -tdraLength = NbL3/mb -tdraStart Symb - [0,csiPsSymbol] Build the TDRA with k_0 set to 0, PDSCH mapping Type set to "TypeA" and SUV Select the next tdraStart Symbol in the list Yes TDRA already in the list? No Add the TDRA in the common pdschTimeDomainAllocationList Yes Remaining tdraStart Symb in the list? No Remaining slot format in the list? Yes No Specific TDRA addition Yes Configuration without DCI size issue? No Add dummy entries to avoid the DCI size conflict between DCI Format 1_0 and 1_1 More than 16 indexes? No Yes Report the computed pdschTimeDomainAllocationList in the PsUser_User[Setup, Modify] Resp Broadcast the list within the 5GL2-PS in order to use it for the transmissions using the dedicated TDRA list End Select the next slot format in the list Configuration Error[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5491.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] File: pdschTdraMgt.vsdx. Folder:

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-3 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Dedicated TDRA list initialization (ID: 11115539)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11115543`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration The 5G-L2-PS initializes the dedicated TDRA list with the common TDRA list built previously (5G_UP_ALG_2391_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). it will allow to use the only dedicated TDRA list when the UE is RRC configured and the Type3-PDCCH (associated to the CORESET(0)) is used to send the DCI Format 0_0 or 1_0.

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-4 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Slot format selection (ID: 11115546)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-4.0-5**  (ID: `11115564`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration In the dedicated list, the objective is to improve the PDSCH usage of the slot format(s) selected for the common TDRA list when they handle additional signals and channels (SS/PBCH, CSI-RS for channel feedback (UE-Specific or Cell CSI-RS) or for tracking). These slots could not be used for PDSCH transmissions allocated by a common search space using the coreset(0). Nevertheless, they are used for the dedicated traffic using UE-Specific search space with any CORESET or a common search space with CORESET not equal to 0.

On top and for TDD, the bidirectional (BI) slot(s), with a guardian period, are added when the number of DL symbols is enough to allow the PDCCH (largest size defined in the cell as specified in 5G_UP_ALG_6659_replaced([11115568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and PDSCH (min 3 DL symbols including the one reserved for the DM-RS Type A).

If short PUCCH is configured, only slots available for PDSCH scheduling with PUCCH token in slots from existing K1 values (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9825_replaced([11116142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp1I7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are considered. Otherwise, the slots will be excluded for PDSCH scheduling. If long PUCCH is enabled, PUCCH token check is skipped during PDSCH scheduling.

For TDD:

if dlMimoMode set to “CL 8x4MIMO”:

The 5G-L2-PS shall append the combination of the slot formats with the Cell-Specific CSI-RS in the slot (Allocation algorithm refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2347_replaced([11114923](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpo7rvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[Before CB009510-A]

When the numPdschPrbInTrsSlots (refer to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2011_replaced([11275482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpGnSPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is larger than 0, for PDSCH data scheduling in TRS slot, and[CB009510-A] Regardless of NRBTS.NRCELL.actPdschRmCsirsForTracking value When [End CB009510-A] the sum of TDRA start symbol and length is between 10 and 12 due to cell specific CSI-RS allocation, to avoid additional DMRS for PDSCH and TRS allocating within same symbol, SLIV=99 and SLIV=86 and SLIV=73 shall be added.

Else (dlMimoMode not set to “CL 8x4MIMO”):

The 5G-L2-PS shall append the combination of the slot formats with the UE-Specific CSI-RS in the slot.

If {actDlSrsBm is true and dlMimoMode is CL 8x4MIMO} or actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true or {actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see 5G_UP_82_replaced([11347116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than 4}: the OFDM symbols for PDSCH shall consider slots with either cell specific or UE specific CSI-RS at the end of the slot see 5G_UP_ALG_8947_replaced([11115636](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-5 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Start PDSCH symbols selection (ID: 11115568)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-5.0-4**  (ID: `12618966`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration For TDD cell:

Start OFDM symbol of TDRAs shall be the 1st one after the last PDCCH symbols of each specific search space configured for the cell, which is the same with start symbol of common TDRAs in [11115399 (Start PDSCH symbols selection for common PDSCH TDRA)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0KvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9);

if NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdcchSharingWithPdsch is set to True, OFDM symbol 0 shall be added to the list of possible start PDSCH symbols. 

For FDD cell without DSS or with DSS Phase 1 (NRBTS/NRCELL/lteNrDssMode <= 1):

The start OFDM symbol of TDRAs must be allowed for each downlink OFDM symbol, starting from **the** index 1 and until the one handling the DM-RS Type A specified in the “PsCell_CellSetupReq” message with “dmrsTypeAPosition” parameter.****

For FDD cell with DSS Phase 2 or later (NRBTS/NRCELL/lteNrDssMode >=2):

[CB007372-A] If NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false [End CB007372-A] [CB007372-B] or (NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true and any coreset overlaps area shared with LTE) [End CB007372-B] the start OFDM symbol of TDRAs must be equal to the downlink OFDM symbol handling the DM-RS Type A specified in the “PsCell_CellSetupReq” message with “dmrsTypeAPosition” parameter.

[CB007372-A] If NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=true and no coreset overlaps area shared with LTE the start OFDM symbol of TDRAs must be allowed for each downlink OFDM symbol, starting from **the** index 2 and until the one handling the DM-RS Type A specified in the “PsCell_CellSetupReq” message with “dmrsTypeAPosition” parameter. [End CB007372-A]****

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-6 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration PDSCH symbol lengths computation with default slot formats (ID: 11115577)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11115580`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Whatever the technology (FDD or TDD), the set of TDRA lengths (tdraLength) is computed from the slot format selection (see 5G_UP_ALG_6658_replaced([11115546](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCTfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) without any reference signal in the slot format and according to the PDSCH start symbol selected. The valid tdraLength must have at least 3 consecutive PDSCH symbols including the DM-RS Type A position defined in the cell.

tdraLength = NDL,Symb - tdraStartSymb

With,

NDL,Symb:

Number of Downlink symbols available in the slot format.

tdraStartSymb:

PDSCH start symbol selected.

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-7 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration PDSCH symbol lengths computation for slot formats with PDSCH allocation restrictions (ID: 11115584)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-7.0-12**  (ID: `12819082`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration When the 5G-L2-PS selects combination of default slot format with UE-Specific or Cell-Specific CSI-RS/IM, without CSI-RS for tracking and for which the PDSCH allocation overlapping is forbidden, the set of TDRA lengths is computed according to the number of available PDSCH symbols and the start symbol selected. The valid tdraLength must have at least 3 consecutive PDSCH symbols including the DM-RS Type A position defined in the cell.

tdraLength = NDL,Symb - tdraStartSymb - csiSymb

OR

tdraLength = NDL,Symb - tdraStartSymb - impactedbyTasSrsSymb

With,

_N_ DL,Symb:**

Number of Downlink symbols available in the slot format.

_tdraStartSymb:_

PDSCH start symbol selected.

_csiSymb:_

Number of CSI-RS/IM symbols configured which could not be overlapped by the PDSCH allocation (UE-Specific or Cell-Specifc CSI-RS/IM), refer 5G_UP_ALG_8947_replaced([11115636](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_12065_replaced([11115664](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If actTddCsiImRm is true **(note: actTddCsiImRm is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator)** , gNB-DU shall **NOT count CSI-IM symbol (as well as symbols after CSI-IM symbol) into "_csiSymb" in the slots where ZP CSI-RS (CSI-IM) are located to make sure that PDSCH could be scheduled on CSI-IM symbol. The CSI-IM symbol allocation for different cell specific CSI-RS resource for channel measurement refer to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13831_replaced([11302003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqdSLPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))._**

_impactedbyTasSrsSymb:_

Number of symbols impacted by TAS-SRS for SB BF configured in critical band combination. If C-Plane indicates this carrier has txSwitchImpactToRx=true (refer to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_11305_replaced([11307687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tq-2kvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), set to 2; otherwise, set to 0.

On SSB slots, number of DL symbols(NDL,Symb) shall be reduced as per muting of Last DL symbol as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2330_replaced([11114751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnth_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Only 16 indexes are allowed in TDRA list, so considering this we would have to limit the SLIVs to the ones that are really needed for scheduling.

If NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdcchSharingWithPdsch is set to False

**{**

**For TDD FR1:**

**After taking off symbols for CSI-RS, SLIVs corresponding to DL(only DL symbols) slots with less than 9 symbols left for PDCCH and PDSCH shall not be added to the dedicated TDRA list.**

For FR1 TDD Frame structure, with BI6,4 or BI10,y slot pattern, Below SLIVs are restricted from TDRA List.

S=2,L=5

S=1,L=6

S=1,L=3

Additionally,

**If PDCCH Search space(s) for a cell is configured such that only symbol 0 is used for PDCCH allocation(monitoringSymbolsWithinSlot in all the search spaces set to symbol 0) in the cell, restrict**

S=2,L=3

S=2,L=6

**Else, restrict**

S=1,L=7

S=1,L=4

**Note:**

  1. Except for certain deployment where PDCCH search space for a cell is configured such that only symbol 0 is used for PDCCH allocation; instead of (S=1,L=4) and (S=1,L=7) it is preferred to use (S=2,L=3) and (S=2,L=6) respectively. This is mainly to limit the number of SLIVs in dedicated TDRA list within 16. At the same time it is better to use SLIV (with same S + L value) with S=2[SLIV='2,3'] when compared to S=1[SLIV = '1,4'], as, if number of PDCCH is calculated as 2, then S=1 can't be used for scheduling, but if number of PDCCH is calculated as 1, then S=2 can still be used for scheduling.

  2. (S=2,L=5) and (S=1,L=6) don't have a use case currently.

  3. (S=1,L=3) won't get generated currently based on 5G_UP_ALG_7720_replaced([11115018](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).S=1,L=3




For FR1 TDD Periodic 5-slot Frame Structure[as defined by 5G_UP_58_replaced([11346939](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubIlt_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))] with BI9,2 slot pattern Below SLIVs are restricted from TDRA list;

S=1,L=6

S=2,L=5

For FR1 TDD Periodic 5-slot Frame Structure[as defined by 5G_UP_58_replaced([11346939](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubIlt_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))] with BI8,2 slot pattern Below SLIVs are restricted from TDRA list;

S=1,L=6

S=2,L=5

S=3,L=4

For FR1 TDD Periodic 5-slot Frame Structure[as defined by 5G_UP_58_replaced([11346939](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubIlt_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))] with BI7,2 slot pattern Below SLIVs are restricted from TDRA list;

S=1,L=5

S=2,L=4

For FR1 TDD tdLte config. 0 frame structure, below SLIVs are restricted from TDRA list,

S=1, L=5 (Restricted in all cases except when multiple BWPs are configured and at least one BWP is 20-40 MHz)

S=1, L=4

S=2, L=3,

S=3, L=6

[CB012733-A]All SLIV values with S=3 are only allowed for 10 MHz and 15MHz TDD, or BWs <=40 MHz and >=20 MHz with tdLte configuration 0 , or when NRCELL.actThreeSymbolPdcch is not disabled. For all other bandwidths [End CB012733-A], SLIV values with S=3 are restricted.

For FDD: After taking off symbols for CSI-RS, SLIVs corresponding to both DL (only DL symbols) and BI slots with less than 9 symbols left for PDCCH and PDSCH shall not be added to the dedicated TDRA list.

**}**

Else, if NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdcchSharingWithPdsch is set to True, TDRA entries shall be restricted as per 5G_UP_ALG_26125_replaced([11115671](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpw3cPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false**, CSI-RS symbols may not be allocated from the end of a slot, and thus the symbols after the CSI-RS symbols are not possible to use for PDSCH. In this case, number of unused symbols after CSI-RS symbols is 2 and added into _csiSymb._**

**If actHighNumberOfUEs is TRUE AND rdActDedicatedCsiSlots is TRUE, gNB-DU shall not add the following SLIVs to the TDRA list:**

  * SLIVs with CSI-RS present in the slot.

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-8 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration PDSCH symbol lengths computation for slot formats with PDSCH allocation restrictions - with TRS and PDSCH DMRS overlapping (ID: 11115621)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-8.0-3**  (ID: `11115633`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration **[Before CB009510-A]When the numPdschPrbInTrsSlots (refer to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2011_replaced([11275482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpGnSPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is larger than 0,**[CB009510-A] Regardless of NRBTS.NRCELL.actPdschRmCsirsForTracking value **[End CB009510-A] for PDSCH data scheduling in TRS slot, and the sum of TDRA start symbol and length is between 10 and 12 due to cell specific CSI-RS allocation, to avoid additional DMRS for PDSCH and TRS allocating within same symbol, SLIV=99 (S=1, L=8)** and SLIV=86 (S=2, L=7) and SLIV=73 (S=3, L=6) shall be added.**_*_** *

When gNB fills DCI 1_1 TDRA field per 5G_UP_ALG_4452_replaced([11178134](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku0WnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PDSCH mapping type A, if a candidate SLIV results in TRS and PDSCH DMRS overlapping, the gNB shall choose a new SLIV without TRS and PDSCH DMRS overlapping as above.

Rationale for overlapping determination and avoiding:

The gNB determines TRS symobl position per 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2019_replaced([11275652](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1a_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The gNB determines the PDSCH DMRS position as table below.

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
The position(s) of the DM-RS symbols |  |  |   
S+L | dmrsAdditionalPosition |  |   
pos0 | pos1 | pos2 |   
4 | l0 | l0 | l0  
5 | l0 | l0 | l0  
6 | l0 | l0 | l0  
7 | l0 | l0 | l0  
8 | l0 | l0, 7 | l0, 7  
9 | l0 | l0, 7 | l0, 7  
10 | l0 | l0, 9 | l0, 6, 9  
11 | l0 | l0, 9 | l0, 6, 9  
12 | l0 | l0, 9 | l0, 6, 9  
13 | l0 | l0, l1 | l0, 7, 11  
14 | l0 | l0, l1 | l0, 7, 11  
  
dmrsAdditionalPosition per 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2242_replaced([11282395](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpfBwPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

S: tdrsSymbStart per 5G_UP_ALG_6662_replaced([11115676](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpw3cvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

L: tdraLength per 5G_UP_ALG_6662_replaced([11115676](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpw3cvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

l0 = 3 if dmrsTypeAPosition is 'pos3'.

l0 = 2 if dmrsTypeAPosition is 'pos2'.

l1 = 11 or 12. TRS symbols are not in these positions per 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2019_replaced([11275652](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1a_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Combined the above table and 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2019_replaced([11275652](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1a_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the possible collision symbols are 6 and/or 9. That is, if TRS and PDSCH DMRS overlapping happens when S+L is in [10, 11, 12], gNB can avoid the overlapping by choosing the SLIV by shortening L to S+L = 9.

Notes:

dmrsTypeAPosition: NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/dmrsTypeAPosition

Rationale of PDSCH DMRS position table is from TS 38.211 Table 7.4.1.1.2-3

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-9 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Slots with CSI-RS for channel acquisition - TDD (ID: 11115636)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-9.0-10**  (ID: `12874611`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration L2PS shall determine the number of csiSymb from reserved DL symbols for CSI-RS. Such symbols are located on symbols [x-csiSymb .. x] in DL x and BI x y slots.

For TDD:

Note that the rest of this requirement only applies to FR1. For CSI-RS in FR2, please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_26373_replaced([11117380](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-56PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * **Case 1): cell specific CSI-RS (row 8 in table 7.4.1.5.3-1 in TS38.211) at the end of the slot**



**\-- If actCsirsMultiplexing is true: slots with frequency multiplexed cell specific CSI-RS (row 8 in table 7.4.1.5.3-1 in TS38.211) at the end of the slot if they are not included in common TDRA list.**

  * If NIDD:maxCsirsNumber >= 4: _csiSymb = 2,4;_
  * else: _csiSymb = 2;_



\-- else (i.e.actCsirsMultiplexing is false): Slots with one or two or four 8 ports cell specific CSI-RS **allocated intermediately shall be considered. i.e.**

  * if NIDD:maxCsirsNumber >= 4: _csiSymb = 2,4,8;_
  * else if NIDD:maxCsirsNumber >= 2: _csiSymb = 2,4;_
  * else: _csiSymb = 2;_



The allocated intermediately symbols means for sure the symbols will be used for CSI-RS without considering SI/Paging. Allocation algorithm refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2347_replaced([11114923](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpo7rvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). After taking CSI-RS symbol out, the left symbols shall round down to the support SLIV list per 5G_UP_ALG_2375_replaced([11115218](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: the TDRA list lengh will not exceed 16 based on current work.

Note: if more than one SLIV candidate are ok for some number of DL symbols in 5G_UP_ALG_2375_replaced([11115218](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), all of them will appear in the TDRA list because here PDCCH symbol number 1 and 2 are both traversed first.

Note: Reallocating CSI-RS in normal data slot with 14 DL symbols to avoid SI/Paging will not impact SLIV here.

  * **Case 2): For FR1, UE specific CSI-RS (row 3 or 4 in table 7.4.1.5.3-1 in TS38.211) at the end of the slot**



Slots with UE specific CSI-RS shall have _csiSymb = 1._

\- **Case 3): one cell specific CSI-RS (row 3 or 4 in table 7.4.1.5.3-1 in TS38.211) at the end of the slot:**

**\--_csiSymb = 1._**

  * **Case 4): the manual configured** cell specific CSI-RS is provided in cell setup request, note L2 shall not assuming configured cell specific CSI-RS is at the end of one slot but only slots with CSI-RS at the end of the slot shall be added to the SLIV list.****



Rationale: a) cell specific CSI-RS symbols not used by any UE shall be used for PDSCH, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3570_replaced([11159651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktKwzvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), shall also be added to SLIV list.

**If the manual configured** cell specific CSI-RS is in one DL14 slot but not at the end of the slot, the slot shall not be added to the SLIV.****

\- If actDlSrsBm is true:

\-- If dlMimoMode is CL 8x4MIMO: **Case 1) and** 2) coexist;****

\-- else **Case 2) exist;**

  * else:



\-- If dlMimoMode is CL 8x4MIMO and actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is False: **Case 1) exist;**

  * else If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true:



\-- if there is no manual configured **cell specific CSI-RS is provided in cell setup request:**

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
dlMimoMode | ~~numberOfTransmittedSsBlocks~~ number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch) | support case | subfeature  
CL 8x4 | 4 | 1) | CB008534-A  
CL 8x4 | 6 | Co-exist of 1) and 2) | CB008534-B  
CL 4x4 or CL 4x2 or OL 4x4 or OL 4x2 | 2 | 3) | CB008534-A  
  
\-- else

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
dlMimoMode | ~~numberOfTransmittedSsBlocks~~ number of activated ss/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch) | support case | subfeature  
CL 8x4 | 4 | 4) | CB008534-C  
CL 8x4 | 6 | Co-exist of 4) and 2) | CB008534-C  
CL 4x4 or CL 4x2 or OL 4x4 or OL 4x2 | 2 | 4) | CB008534-C  
  
\-- else **Case 2) exist;**

  * **_*If actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true:_** *



\-- if there is no manual configured **cell specific CSI-RS is provided in cell setup request:**

**\--- Case 3) exist;**

else:

**\--- Case 4) exist;**

**\- If DL PRB Pooling for TDD FR1 is activated, that is slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**

**\--_then csiSymb = 1 shall always coexist with all above cases except case 4)._**

\-- _csiSymb = 4 shall always coexist with all above cases except case 4) if actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false , due to Cell Specific CSI-RS in other pooling groups._

\- If DL PRB Pooling for TDD FR1 in TDD eCPRI 7-2e is activated, that is slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false

\-- csiSymb = 4 shall always coexist with all above cases except case 4)

Note: When **DL PRB Pooling for TDD FR1 is activated and ZAB privilege is provided to the cell (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),****[CB014543-H] [N****ote: w** hen partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))] **[End CB014543-H],**  _csiSymb = 1 as UE specific CSI-RS at the end of the slot. When_ _DL PRB Pooling for TDD FR1 is activated and ZAB privilege is not provided to the cell, last symbol of a slot can be used for UE specific CSI-RS by other cells in the same L1 Pool, and as such the cell shall not use last DL symbol of the slot for PDSCH._ **

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and actTddCsirsOpt is true, or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true AND actTddCsirsOpt is true)



**\--_then csiSymb = 2,4 shall always coexist with all above cases except case 4)._**

Note: In such case,

if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true 

\- If ZAB privilege is provided to the cell (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **[CB014543-H] [N****ote: w** hen partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))] **[End CB014543-H],** csiSymb = 2,4 as cell specific CSI-RS at the end of the slot, actCsiRsMuting, rdDynamicScheduling(5G_UP_ALG_25160_replaced([11138829](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kriZE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdspectralEfficiencyThd(5G_UP_ALG_25163_replaced([11138839](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kriZFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall also be considered for PDSCH scheduling(5G_UP_ALG_26017_replaced([11117367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-55PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

\- If ZAB privilege is not provided to the cell, last several symbols of the slot can not be used for PDSCH, because cells in other pooling groups in same L1 Pool may transmit cell specific CSI-RS on these symbols

else if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true 

\- csiSymb = 2,4 as cell specific CSI-RS at the end of the slot, actCsiRsMuting, rdDynamicScheduling(5G_UP_ALG_25160_replaced([11138829](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kriZE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdspectralEfficiencyThd(5G_UP_ALG_25163_replaced([11138839](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kriZFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall also be considered for PDSCH scheduling(5G_UP_ALG_26017_replaced([11117367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-55PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

end

**\- If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true and actTddCsirsOpt is false, CSI-RS symbols may not be allocated from the end of a slot, and thus the CSI-RS symbols and the symbols after the CSI-RS symbols are considered as not possible to use for PDSCH._csiSymb = number of CSI-RS symbols as in above cases + number of unused symbols after CSI-RS symbols, number of unused symbols after CSI-RS symbols = 2. Note: When DL PRB pooling for TDD FR1, cells which have ZAB privilege can schedule PDSCH in the CSI-RS/TRS slots if a valid SLIV exists._**

**_*Note: in this artifact, actTddCsirsOpt is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator._** *

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-11 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Slots with CSI-RS for channel acquisition - FDD (ID: 12806047)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-11.0-2**  (ID: `12805310`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration csiSymb is:

For FDD 5MHz cell, it shall be 0 for each start OFDM symbol allowed; specific SLIV 67(S=2,L=11) if dmrsTypeAPosition is pos2, 67(S=2,L=11) and 80(S=3,L=10) if dmrsTypeAPosition is pos3 are added in dedicated TDRA list (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2382_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) 

For FDD with greater than 5MHz cell bandwidth with each start OFDM symbol allowed, it will be 0/1/2/3/4 if dmrsTypeAPosition =pos2, and 0/1/2 if dmrsTypeAPosition =pos3;

[CB008577-B] the same possible cases as for common TDRA [12805308: Slots with CSI-RS for channel acquisition FDD](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4wO1Q59LEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End CB008577-B]

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-12 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration prioritization of dedicated TDRA entries (ID: 11115671)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-12.0-3**  (ID: `12742742`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration if NRBTS/NRCELL/actPdcchSharingWithPdsch is set to True [CB012733-A] or NRCELL.actThreeSymbolPdcch is not disabled[End CB012733-A], gNB-DU shall prioritize entries from dedicated TDRA list to keep only 16 of them as follows:

  * all entries from common TDRA list with same order (see 5G_UP_ALG_6657_replaced([11115539](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * TDRA entries with K0=0 allowing to handle slots with csiSymb = 0 (see 5G_UP_ALG_6660_replaced([11115577](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpV_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from largest to smallest S+L, then largest to smallest S including S = 0
  * TDRA entries with K0=0 allowing to handle slots with csiSymb > 0 (see 5G_UP_ALG_6661_replaced([11115584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpWfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), from smallest to largest S+L, then largest to smallest S greater than 0
  * TDRA entries with K0=0 allowing to handle TRS+DMRS collision (see 5G_UP_ALG_9301_replaced([11115621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with S greater than 0
  * TDRA entries with K0=0 allowing to handle slots with csiSymb > 0 (see 5G_UP_ALG_6661_replaced([11115584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpWfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from largest to smallest S+L, with S equal to 0
  * TDRA entries with K0=0 allowing to handle TRS+DMRS collision (see 5G_UP_ALG_9301_replaced([11115621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with S equal to 0



**rationale: S=0 is relevant only if it helps achieving higher DL peak Tput. Occurrence of slots in the the frame structure shall be considered to maximize usage of DL symbols. Adding one symbol in many DL slots should bring higher benefit than a few symbols in a few DL slots.**

In CSI-RS slots, smallest number of S+L should always be available while largest S+L only helps using a few additional symbols.

Adding one PDCCH symbol in a few DL slots with CSI-RS has the lowest possible occurrence.

For tdLte config0 frame structure, if actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is true and PS BWP is configured or at least one dedicated BWP is <40MHz, then following TDRA entries shall have the least priorities (1 => has least priority):

  1. K0=0, S=2 and L=4 (rationale: due to always having 3 PDCCH symbols on special slot in above two scenarios)
  2. K0=0, S=1 and L=8 (rationale: due to the reason that the above 2 scenarios may coexist)



S=0 TDRA entries are not applicable for tdLte config0 frame structure. Rationale: conditions for S=0 allocations are not satisfied in tdLte config0 frame structure.

Resource Allocations configuration 11115687: PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration 11115687: PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration 11115687: PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration The 5G-L2-PS creates Time Domain Resource Allocation list with the following constraints:  The slot offset (K0) is set to 0.  The PDSCH mapping is set to “typeA”.  The Start and Length Indicator Value (SLIV), for each TDRA, is computed with the formula hereafter and the following cases:  The start OFDM symbol of TDRAs. The 5G-L2-PS scans the start PDSCH symbol list defined previously according to the PDCCH configuration of all BWP in the cell (see 5G_UP_ALG_6659_replaced([11115568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  Lengths of TDRAs must be computed in order to maximize the number of PDSCH symbols with or without UE-Specific or Cell-Specific CSI-RS at the end of the slot. For each start OFDM symbol allowed, the 5G-L2-PS uses teh expected TDRA length computed previously (5G_UP_ALG_6661_replaced([11115584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpWfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_9301_replaced([11115621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula defined by a piecewise function. The formula is for a variable named SLIV. The formula is as follows: SLIV = { 14 × (tdraLength - 1) + tdraSymbStart, if 0 < (tdraLength - 1) ≤ 7 (14 × (14 - tdraLength + 1)) + (14 - 1 - tdraSymbStart), if 7 < (tdraLength - 1) } Additionally, there is a condition: and 0 < tdraLength ≤ 14 - tdraSymbStart[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5531.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] [image-1][image_desc]The image contains the text "trdaSymbStart" in a light gray, italicized font. The text is slightly blurry and has a subtle blue and yellow hue.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5531.002.png[/image_path][/image-1]: Start OFDM symbol of the PDSCH start symbol list and not after the dmrsTypeAPosition. [image-2][image_desc]The image contains the text "trdaLength". The text is in a light gray color and is slightly blurry. The font appears to be a serif font.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m22dng_5G_UP_Algorithms_file_5531.003.png[/image_path][/image-2]: Length of the TDRA as defined above. It takes into account the potential presence of the wideband CSI-RS for channel feedback which could be transmitted in any BWP overlapping the PDSCH resources aligned with the CORESET(0).

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-14 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration TDRA to handle transmissions which can’t be done using adaptive retransmission mechanism (ID: 12879282)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-14.0-1**  (ID: `12879283`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration For each TDRA entry present in the dedicated TDRA list, add additional TDRAs with incremented "start symbol" and keeping the "length" same. Start symbol is incremented until symbol handling the DM-RS Type A specified in the “PsCell_CellSetupReq” message with “dmrsTypeAPosition” parameter. Addition shall be stopped, when dedicated TDRA limit is reached or when there are no more entries to be added.

Example,

If TDRA entry S = 1, L = 11 is already added to the TDRA list, and

NRBTS.NRCELL.dmrsTypeAPosition = pos3

Then,

S = 2, L= 11 and S = 3, L = 11 are added additionally to the TDRA list

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-15 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Special Time Domain Resource Assignment addition (ID: 11115691)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-15.0-4**  (ID: `12619148`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration When DSS is activated (nrLteDssMode received in the PsCell_CellSetupReq is greater than 0) [CB007372-A] and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false [End CB007372-A], a specific TDRA is added to manage the PDSCH transmission avoiding the collision between the LTE Cell Reference Signals (C-RS), the 5G front loaded and additional DM-RS before the UE configuration, with the following parameters:

 The slot offset (K0) is set to 0.

 The PDSCH mapping is set to “typeA”.

 Start Symbol: 3 ; Length: 9 ; SLIV: 94

[CB014153-B] Specific RIM TDRA entries shall be included as defined in [12642389: Addition of dedicated TDRA entries for RIM](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3L4pgEHIEfC6a_agjpBoXg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End CB014153-B]

For a eligible UE for power saving BWP (see 5G_UP_ALG_1866_replaced([11111136](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpKaj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) L2-PS appends at the last position one Time Domain Resource Allocation with k0 = 6 (for tdLte config0 frame structure k0=8 is used), mapping TypeA, tdraLength 7, tdraStartSymb 2. 

For a eligible UE for power saving BWP (see [11111136](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpKaj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), gNB-DU shall replace the lowest priority entry in the TDRA table with K0 = 6 entry, if the table has reached its maximum capacity.

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-16 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Dedicated TDRA entries for RIM (ID: 12642384)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-16.0-1**  (ID: `12880264`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration **Partial slot muting readiness**

---

**3.5.9.2.3.0-16.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12880265`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration A cell shall be considered as ready for partial slot muting when all of the following conditions are satisfied:

  * The cell operates in TDD FR1.
  * Adaptive retransmission functionality is enabled i.e.: actAdaptiveReTxResMcs = true.
  * The configured frame structure is not [11346967: FR1 TDD Periodic 10-slot frame structure](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubIlvPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

---

**3.5.9.2.3.0-16.0-2**  (ID: `12642385`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration **Determination of dedicated TDRA entries for RIM**

---

**3.5.9.2.3.0-16.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12642386`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration [Before CB014153-B-UPD002] In case of FR1 TDD [CB014153-B-UPD002] When cell configuration is ready for partial slot muting as described in [12880264: Partial slot muting readiness](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4fX80LPmEfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End CB014153-B-UPD002], TDRA fulfilling the following rules shall be determined:

  * Slot offset (k0) is set to 0.
  * The PDSCH mapping is set to ‘typeA’.
  * Start OFDM symbol shall be:
  * the first one after any PDCCH symbols used in specific search space configured for the cell.
  * if actPdcchSharingWithPdsch is set to True, then OFDM symbol 0 shall be added to the list of possible start PDSCH symbols as well.
  * Sum of start OFDM symbol and length shall be equal to 6, [PR868326-26R2] 9 [End PR868326-26R2] or 10.



Notes:

1\. [PR868326-26R2] The rationale behind determination of entries with S+L = 9 is to avoid overlapping of additional DMRS and TRS signals. See details in [11115621: PDSCH symbol lengths computation for slot formats with PDSCH allocation restrictions - with TRS and PDSCH DMRS overlapping](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpwQY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End PR868326-26R2]

  1. Example:



Assuming default configuration with PDCCH covering symbols 0 and 1 (i.e.: monitoringSymbolWithinSlot = symbol_0_1, actPdcchSharingWithPdsch = False):

  * S = 1 or 2.
  * S+L = 6, [PR868326-26R2] 9 [End PR868326-26R2] or 10.



Results in the following SLIVs: (S=1, L=5), (S=2, L=4), (S=1, L=9), (S=2, L=8), [PR868326-26R2] (S=1, L=8), (S=2, L=7) [End PR868326-26R2].

---

**3.5.9.2.3.0-16.0-3**  (ID: `12642387`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration **Sorting of dedicated TDRA entries for RIM**

---

**3.5.9.2.3.0-16.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12642388`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration TDRA entries determined in [12642385: Determination of dedicated TDRA entries for RIM](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VxhLgUHIEfC6a_agjpBoXg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) shall be sorted according to the following rules [PR868326-26R2] for S+L = 6 or 10 [End PR868326-26R2]:

  * At first, from largest to smallest S (SLIV start OFDM symbol).
  * Then, [Before CB014153-B-UPD002] from largest to smallest [CB014153-B-UPD002] from smallest to largest [End CB014153-B-UPD002] S+L (sum of SLIV start and length symbols).



[PR868326-26R2] Entries with S+L = 9 shall be appended at the end from largest to smallest S. [End PR868326-26R2]

---

**3.5.9.2.3.0-16.0-4**  (ID: `12642389`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration **Addition of dedicated TDRA entries for RIM**

---

**3.5.9.2.3.0-16.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12642390`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration TDRA entries for RIM shall be added to dedicated TDRA list according to the following rules:

  * In accordance with order determined in [12642387: Sorting of dedicated TDRA entries for RIM](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ue5EMUHIEfC6a_agjpBoXg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
  * Entry shall be added only if the same entry does not exist on the list i.e.: any duplications shall be skipped.
  * [CB014153-B-UPD002]  
If the current TDRA list:  
\- Does not contain at least one entry for handling 6 DL symbols (i.e., S+L = 6), OR  
\- Does not contain at least one entry for handling 10 DL symbols (i.e., S+L = 10),  
Then:  
\- L2PS shall add one new RIM-related entry to the TDRA list before adding entries for [Before CNI-134962-E] non-adaptive reTx [CNI-134962-E] retransmission as per [12879282](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_7R3-FbNAEfCQT7hYUxERAg?vvc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/cm/stream/_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA) [End CNI-134962-E]. If item for handling 10 DL symbols is missing, then entry fulfilling S+L=10 shall be added. Otherwise (item for 6 DL symbols is missing or both items), then entry fulfilling S+L=6 shall be added.  
\- The remaining RIM-related entries determined shall be added after the entries for [Before CNI-134962-E] non-adaptive reTx [CNI-134962-E] retransmission as per [12879282](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_7R3-FbNAEfCQT7hYUxERAg?vvc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/cm/stream/_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA) [End CNI-134962-E].  
Otherwise (if both S+L = 6 and S+L = 10 entries already exist):  
\- All RIM-related entries shall be added after the entries for [Before CNI-134962-E] non-adaptive reTx [CNI-134962-E] retransmission as per [12879282](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_7R3-FbNAEfCQT7hYUxERAg?vvc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/cm/stream/_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA) [End CNI-134962-E].  
[End CB014153-B-UPD002]
  * Addition shall be stopped, when dedicated TDRA limit is reached or when there are no more entries to be added.

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-17 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Duplicate TDRA filtering (ID: 11115701)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-17.0-1**  (ID: `11115703`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration When the TDRA (K0, PDSCH mappign type, SLIV) computed for a given combination of TDRA start symbol and length is already in the list, the 5G-L2-PS removes it. The part corresponding to the iniitialization of the list (5G_UP_ALG_6657_replaced([11115539](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvCS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) must not be modified at any time.

---

##### 3.5.9.2.3.0-18 PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration Dedicated pdschTimeDomainAllocation update (ID: 11115708)

**3.5.9.2.3.0-18.0-1**  (ID: `11115711`)

PDSCH dedicated Time Domain Resource Allocations configuration To be also transmitted in the PDSCH-Config IE towards UEs, the 5G-L2-PS sends back this list to the C-Plane using the pdschTimeDomainAllocationList structure in the PsUser_UserSetupResp message or in the PsUser_UserModifyResp message, and uses this list for all PDSCH transmisisons requesting to use it.

The dedicated TDRA list is initialized with the common TDRA list built previously (see 5G_UP_ALG_2391_replaced([11115362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpt0IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and followings) ; Note: The common TDRA list may contain unnecessary entries due to the implemented algorithm, which differs from the specified one. The 5G-L2-PS completes the initial TDRA list by adding non duplicate entries.

Note: The algorithm implemented differs from the one specified and illustrated below. It does not distinguish among the type of the cell (FDD/TDD) and does neither consider other optimizations, e.g. due to used CORESET duration patterns. Thus, more list entries may be created as needed for a cell

---

## 3.5.10 PUSCH configuration

### 3.5.10.1 Available slots for PUSCH scheduling

#### 3.5.10.1.0-1 Available slots for PUSCH scheduling Slots available for PUSCH scheduling. (ID: 11115721)

**3.5.10.1.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `12698771`)

Available slots for PUSCH scheduling DLx slots are not available for PUSCH scheduling.

ULy and BIx,y slots with y < 10 UL symbols are not available for PUSCH scheduling.

For FR1 TDD PUSCH may be scheduled on ULy slots of the resultant slot format pattern of 5G_UP_ALG_2313_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) only if y = 14.

If PRACH multiplexing (NRBTS.actPrachMultiplexing) is enabled, UL slots with an active PRACH configuration are also available for PUSCH scheduling with UL dedicated BWP.

If long PUCCH is configured (NRCELL.pucchModeSelect = longPucch), UL slots with an active PRACH configuration are also available for PUSCH scheduling except in 5MHz FDD cells where the initial transmission of Msg3 granted by Msg2 shall not be scheduled slots with PRACH. Rationale for the exception is that there are not sufficient PRBs available between the common PUCCH areas to schedule Msg3 in addition to PRACH.

On an FDD Carrier shared with LTE [CB007372-AA] and NRCELL.NRDSSLTE.actAsymmetricDss=false [End CB007372-AA], a Msg3 can’t be scheduled in slots with an active PRACH if long PUCCH is configured (NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect set to ‘longPucch’). Rationale a Msg3 can be scheduled only in the guaranteed PRB area. In slots with PRACH the resources of the guaranteed PRB area are already allocated and hence it is not possible to schedule a Msg3.

---

#### 3.5.10.1.0-2 Available slots for PUSCH scheduling Symbols sharing between PUSCH and PUCCH in FDD with short PUCCH (ID: 11115730)

**3.5.10.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11115733`)

Available slots for PUSCH scheduling In FDD, on a carrier not shared with LTE, if short PUCCH is configured, the symbol 12 in UL slots which are not "reserved SRS" slots (see 5G_UP_ALG_2536_replaced([11117398](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-57vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall be available for PUSCH if no periodic CSI report reception for a UE is planned in the slot according to 5G_UP_ALG_3473_replaced([11159017](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktGfW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). SLIV shall be selected accordingly.

---

#### 3.5.10.1.0-3 Available slots for PUSCH scheduling Supported Time Domain Resource Allocations for PUSCH in TDD FR1 (ID: 11115737)

**3.5.10.1.0-3.0-6**  (ID: `13455388`)

Available slots for PUSCH scheduling In 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2526_replaced([11297475](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqHT4PvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), it will be specified whether UL fragmentation of Uplane packets is enabled or disabled over the fronthaul interface.

If UL fragmentation is enabled [CB010737-C] or ( NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList contains "Mixed PUSCH" and UE is identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconfiguration%2f9&componenturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2frm-projects%2f_euvego3ree-rl47x_rccmw%2fcomponents%2f_evmaio3ree-rl47x_rccmw"))) [End CB010737-C] ,

 The following table provides the supported SLIV for PUSCH transmission based on the slot format in TDD FR1

|  |   
---|---|---  
**Slot Format** | **PUSCH SLIV** | **Comments**  
UL14 | 27 (S=0, L=14) | In this case, PUSCH is scheduled with 14 symbols along with Long PUCCH and no SRS is scheduled  
| 41 (S=0, L=13) | In this case, PUSCH is scheduled with 13 symbols (0-12) and SRS is scheduled on OFDM symbol 13, or used on PCell where UL fragmentation is enabled for: - FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or - FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell) UL CA UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case the UE is not a single Tx UE and configured with aperiodic SRS on TDD SCell and (puschMappingType Type A is configured or UL fragmentation is enabled on TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see [11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and rank1 is used on TDD SCell, or used on UL serving cell where UL fragmentation is enabled for: - FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or - FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell) UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case (puschMappingType Type A is configured or UL fragmentation is enabled on both PCell and TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see [11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
| 55 (S=0, L=12) | Used on PCell where UL fragmentation is enabled for: - FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous , or - FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell) UL CA UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), **in case the UE is not a single Tx UE and configured with aperiodic SRS on TDD SCell and (puschMappingType Type B is configured and UL fragmentation is disabled on TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see[11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and rank1 is used on TDD SCell,** or used on UL serving cell where UL fragmentation is enabled for: - FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or - FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell) UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), in case puschMappingType Type B is configured and UL fragmentation is disabled on PCell or TDD SCell, and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see [11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
  
Note that when UL fragmentation is enabled, SLIV 55 with long PUCCH is supported and A-SRS is scheduled on symbol 13 if there is A-SRS scheduling. 

Else if UL fragmentation is disabled [CB010737-C] and ( NRCELL/actAdaptiveDmrsList does not contain "Mixed PUSCH" or UE is not identified as a static UE for adaptive DMRS ([13396700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IVoJUAflEfGozuGzRUXHpg "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fbi_ivojuaflefgozugzruxhpg&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconfiguration%2f9&componenturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2frm-projects%2f_euvego3ree-rl47x_rccmw%2fcomponents%2f_evmaio3ree-rl47x_rccmw")) [End CB010737-C] ,

 The following table provides the supported SLIV for PUSCH transmission based on the slot format in TDD FR1.

|  |   
---|---|---  
**Slot Format** | **PUSCH SLIV** | **Comments**  
UL14 | 55 (S=0, L=12) | PUSCH with 12 symbols, SRS on OFDM symbol 12, or used on PCell where UL fragmentation is disabled for: - FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or - FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell) UL CA UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), **in case the UE is not a single Tx UE and configured with aperiodic SRS on TDD SCell and (puschMappingType Type B is configured and UL fragmentation is disabled on TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells ([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and rank1 is used on TDD SCell,** or used on UL serving cell where UL fragmentation is disabled for: - FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or - FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell) UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))​​​​​, in case puschMappingType Type B is configured and UL fragmentation is disabled on PCell or TDD SCell, and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see [11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
69 (S=0, L=11) | Used with semiStatic frame structure with SRS **and 2 PUCCH symbols.** |   
27(S=0,L=14) | PUSCH with 14 symbols with Long PUCCH and without SRS |   
| 41(S=0,L=13) | PUSCH with 13 symbols, SRS on OFDM symbol 13, or used on PCell where UL fragmentation is disabled for: - FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or - FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell) UL CA UE without indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), **in case the UE is not a single Tx UE and configured with aperiodic SRS on TDD SCell and (puschMappingType Type A is configured or UL fragmentation is enabled on TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see[11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and rank1 is used on TDD SCell,** or used on UL serving cell where UL fragmentation is disabled for: - FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous, or - FR1 TDD + TDD + FDD (with intra-band contiguous TDD CCs with TDD PCell) UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))​​​​​, in case (puschMappingType Type A is configured or UL fragmentation is enabled on both PCell and TDD SCell) and transmission buffer in UL is split between two TDD serving cells, or between two TDD and one FDD serving cells (see [11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
  
where,

 SLIV defines the TD mapping of PUSCH as per ([11115806](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 S: Start symbol

 L: Length in symbols

#### 3.5.10.1.0-4 Available slots for PUSCH scheduling Supported Time Domain Resource Allocations for PUSCH in TDD FR2 (ID: 11115754)

**3.5.10.1.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `13479456`)

Available slots for PUSCH scheduling The following table provides the supported SLIV for PUSCH transmission based on the slot format in TDD FR2.

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Slot Format** | **L1 Slot Type ID** **(L2PS)** | **PUSCH SLIV** | **Comments**  
UL14 | 32 (C5) | 55 (S=0, L=12) | used with semiStatic frame structure with 2 PUCCH symbols  
39 | 69 (S=0, L=11) | Used with semiStatic frame structure with SRS **and 2 PUCCH symbols.** |   
  
Where :

\- SLIV defines the TD mapping of PUSCH as per 5G_UP_ALG_2425_replaced([11115806](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- S : Start symbol

  * L : Length in symbols



**NOTE: There is no need to define new slot types. The IE slotType shall be filled properly for PRACH or SSB slot (set to 0 for PRACH and 2 for SSB), otherwise this IE is useless** and can be set to any value (see 5G_UP_99_replaced([11347309](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubLpA_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_80_replaced([11347107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz1vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_124_replaced([11347480](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubM3KPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_147_replaced([11347646](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubOsUfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).****

**[CB013712-B] Not valid for NewFR1**[End CB013712-B]****

29 (C0) | 41 (S=0, L=13) | 1\. Used for UL FDD with one-symbol PUCCH. **2\. For reserved aSRS slot of FDD long PUCCH case, in case SRS report is triggered and located in symbol 13.** 3\. For reserved aSRS slot of FDD long PUCCH case, in case aSRS report is triggered and located in symbol 12.** 4\. UL14 | 31 (C4) | 27 (S=0, L=14) | 1\. Used for UL with long PUCCH. 2. For reserved aSRS slot of FDD long PUCCH case, in case aSRS report is not triggered, then 14 symbols are also available for PUSCH in the slot.

Where :

\- SLIV defines the TD mapping of PUSCH as per 5G_UP_ALG_2425_replaced([11115806](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

\- S : Start symbol

  * L : Length in symbols



**NOTE: There is no need to define new slot types. The IE slotType shall be filled properly for PRACH or SSB slot (set to 0 for PRACH and 2 for SSB), otherwise this IE is useless** and can be set to any value (see 5G_UP_99_replaced([11347309](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubLpA_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_80_replaced([11347107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz1vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_124_replaced([11347480](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubM3KPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_147_replaced([11347646](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubOsUfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).****

#### 3.5.10.1.0-6 Available slots for PUSCH scheduling Supported Time Domain Resource Allocations for PUSCH in TDD FR1/FR2/FDD with deactivated dedicated configuration (ID: 11115795)

**3.5.10.1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11115798`)

Available slots for PUSCH scheduling When the call setup is done with dedicated configuration deactivated (ueDedicatedConfigState set to disabled), the TDRA indexes available in the slots are restricted until the completion of the procedure to configure all resources in the UE determined by the U-Plane and triggered by the C-Plane.

The U-Plane selects the start symbol and the length according to the number of PUSCH symbols allowed in each uplink or bidirectional slots (ULy and BIx,y) with at least 10 uplink symbols (y). the list of available TDRA is the one broadcasted in the SIB1. The largest number of uplink symbols for PUSCH are:

 14 symbols (starting from symbol 0), when there is no uplink channel (short PUCCH) and no uplink signal (SRS)

 13 symbols (starting from symbol 0), when the SRS is expected in the symbol 13.

 12 symbols (starting from symbol 0), when the SRS is expected in the symbol 12. in that case the last symbol is not used.

 11 symbols (starting from symbol 0), when the SRS is expected in the symbol 11 and the short PUCCH is expected in symbols 12 and 13.

The UE is always configured with at least a TDRA list (the one reported to teh C-Plane during teh cell setup procedure). Therefore, the default PUSCH time domain resource allocation A for normal Cyclic Prefixe is never used.

At the runtime, the U-Plane selects the TDRA which is not larger than the number of PUSCH symbols in the slot.

---

### 3.5.10.2 Configuration of PUSCH Time Domain Resource Allocation Lists

#### 3.5.10.2.0-1 Configuration of PUSCH Time Domain Resource Allocation Lists PUSCH DCI TDRA Field Definition (ID: 11115806)

**3.5.10.2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11115812`)

Configuration of PUSCH Time Domain Resource Allocation Lists When the UE is scheduled to transmit PUSCH by a DCI, the Time-domain resource assignment field of the DCI provides a row index of an RRC configured table pusch-TimeDomainAllocationList where the indexed row defines the slot offset K2, the start and length indicator SLIV and the PUSCH mapping type to be applied in the PUSCH reception.

The bitwidth of the field Time domain resource assignment in DCI format 0_1 is determined as the CEIL(LOG2(I )) bits, where I is the number of entries in the higher layer parameter pusch-TimeDomainAllocationList.

Note, K2 is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2469_replaced([11116080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp0h2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The slot where the UE shall transmit the PUSCH is determined by K2 of the indexed row as (n + K2) where n is the slot with the scheduling DCI, K2 is based on the numerology of PUSCH.

The starting symbol S relative to the start of the slot, and the number of consecutive symbols L counting from the symbol S allocated for the PUSCH are determined from the start and length indicator SLIV of the indexed row. For information SLIV field is computed as:

if (L-1) <= 7 then

SLIV = 14*(L-1)+S

else

SLIV = 14*(14-L+1)+(14-1-S)

where 0< L <= 14-S

The PUSCH mapping type is set to Type A or Type B as defined in 38.211 as given by the indexed row.

For pusch-TimeDomainAllocationList table definition :

  * refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2426_replaced([11115819](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD FR1

  * refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2431_replaced([11115841](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD FR2

  * refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9399_replaced([11115853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpysovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD not shared with LTE

  * refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9400_replaced([11115884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpysqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_9401_replaced([11115904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpzTsPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD shared with LTE




[CB008236-A]

For pusch-TimeDomainAllocationList-Rel16 table definition used by a SAG Eligible UE (per 5G_UP_ALG_18906_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 19245):

  * refer to 5G_UP_ALG_18908_replaced([11204846](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4N_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD not shared with LTE

  * refer to 5G_UP_ALG_19545_replaced([11204930](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwmfQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD shared with LTE when UE is in SAG Mode




[End CB008236-A]

[CB011118-A] - refer to 5G_UP_ALG_21213_replaced([11205007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwmfSvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD FR1 [End CB011118-A]

[CB008236-A-UPD001] Notes:

  * All SAg Eligible UEs must use the puschAllocationList-r16 table (defined by 5G_UP_ALG_18908_replaced([11204846](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4N_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_19545_replaced([11204930](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwmfQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), regardless of SAg state. This is because CP will configure a UE at RRC with the puschAllocationList-r16 table at user setup (and not wait for UE to have a VoNR DRB). UEs in TP Enabled::SAG On state (see 5G_UP_ALG_18906_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for state definition) can select 2x and 4x repetition entries in the table, but UEs not in TP Enabled::SAG On state are restricted to 1x repetition enties [End CB008236-A-UPD001]
