### 3.5.13.0-2 Scheduling timings for aperiodic CSI scheduling A-CSI compatible K2 determination over the slot pattern. (ID: 11116648)

**3.5.13.0-2.0-6**  (ID: `13432638`)

Scheduling timings for aperiodic CSI scheduling Requesting UE for A-CSI reporting require that gNB perform A-CSI scheduling with respect for UE CSI computation timing as specified in TS 38.214 $5.4. Consequently, it shall be ensured that A-CSI scheduler shall select a k2 compatible with UE CSI processing timing with the following algorithm:

\- For each slot S configured with UL PDCCH token OR SSB slot not configured for PDSCH transmission and with an available OFDM symbol that could be used for PDCCH in the first 3 OFDM symbols in the slot pattern:

o If k2minCsi <= k2

 mark the slot S eligible for A-CSI scheduling.

o Else:

 determine the k2aCsi as the smallest k2 in the interval [k2minCsi, 12] that allows PUSCH scheduling in a future PUSCH occasion not already considered for A-CSI scheduling.

 If such k2aCsi is found:

 mark the slot S eligible for A-CSI scheduling and save k2aCsi in the slot’s context

 If it’s not already included in the UE specific TDRA list, add k2aCsi uniquely to the temporary list TL

\- If the list TL is not empty:

o If the list TL could be entirely included into the user specific TDRA list, for every SLIV already considered (see 5G_UP_ALG_2426_replaced([11115819](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), such that the maximum allowed size is not exceeded:

 For each element in TL, create the corresponding entry in the user specific TDRA

o Else

 Sort TL in ascending k2aCsi value order

 Populate the remaining positions in the user specific TDRA list from TL, in ascending order, until TDRA list is full (every additional entry shall be replicated for every SLIV already considered (see 5G_UP_ALG_2426_replaced([11115819](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 Remove the A-CSI eligibility and k2aCsi from the slot’s context for all the slots marked as A-CSI eligible for which k2aCsi was not added to TDRA list.

\- If at least one k2aCsi was determined, run the A-CSI dynamic k1 determination over the slot pattern in 5G_UP_ALG_2502_replaced([11116669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6BY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If NRCELL/NRRIM_PROFILE/actRimPdcchMuting is not equal to 0 and RIM PDCCH muting is required (see [13242857](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2uvgIMKhEfCnuMJFWtMTpQ), [Before CB015505-A] [13242859](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jt_WkMKiEfCnuMJFWtMTpQ) [End CB015505-A]), then

  * if slot N is a DL slot and slot +k2AcsiRIm (calculated in [13242857](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2uvgIMKhEfCnuMJFWtMTpQ), [Before CB015505-A] [13242859](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jt_WkMKiEfCnuMJFWtMTpQ) [End CB015505-A]) is the first UL slot after a special slot,



> A-CSI on slot N+k2AcsiRim shall be scheduled from slot N
> 
> mark slot N eligible for A-CSI scheduling

-if special slot is marked as eligible for A-CSI scheduling, it shall be unmarked.

If (NRBTS-actFlexibleBISlotDurationMode is 'full' and rrmK2min = 2 and k2Rim is not 3 and k2Cell is 3),

\- if slot N is a DL slot and slot N+12 is the first UL slot after a special slot, A-CSI timing K2 for A-CSI on slot N+12 shall be determined as below,

> K2 = 12

> A-CSI on slot N+K2 shall be scheduled from slot N

> mark slot N eligible for A-CSI scheduling

\- Refer 5G_UP_ALG_2484_replaced([11116264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp2XB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_29578_replaced([11116328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp2-G_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for rrmK2min, k2Rim and k2Cell.

if MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/tddFrameStructure.tddFrameStructureType = tdLte **and NRBTS.NRCELL.tddFrameStructure.tdLteUlDlConfig is set to tdLteConfig0** ,****

  * if slot N is a special slot, A-CSI timing k2 for A-CSI on slot N+6 shall be determined as below,



> K2 = 6
> 
> A-CSI on slot N+6 shall be scheduled from slot N
> 
> mark slot N eligible for A-CSI scheduling

---

### 3.5.13.0-3 Scheduling timings for aperiodic CSI scheduling A-CSI dynamic k1 determination over the slot pattern. (ID: 11116669)

**3.5.13.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11116672`)

Scheduling timings for aperiodic CSI scheduling \- If long PUCCH is enabled, for each slot S marked as A-CSI eligible for PDCCH for which k2aCsi was defined:

o For each DL slot S’ in range [S, S + k2aCsi – k1min] (S is not included.) configured with PDSCH and having at least one search space eligible to grant C-RNTI in DL, if S' + k1 <= S + k2aCsi then:

 Find the smallest k1aCsi, that would allow PDSCH scheduling such that the Harq-Ack originally expected at S' + k1 (after the initial k1 determination algorithm) to be moved in the next slot configured with PUCCH token for Harq feedback.

 If such k1aCsi is found:

 mark the slot S as supporting dynamic k1 selection and add k1aCsi in the slot’s context

 If it’s not already included in the list of supported k1 values, add k1aCsi uniquely to the temporary list TL’

o If all the k1aCsi values in the TL’ list could be added to the list of k1 that shall be transmitted to the UE (_dl-DataToUL-ACK):_

 Add all the k1 values from TL’ to the list of supported k1 that is transmitted to C-Plane via L2-L3 i/f (dlDataToUlAck in cell setup response message)

o Else

 Sort TL’ in ascending k1aCsi value order

 Populate remaining positions in dlDataToUlAck with k1aCsi from TL’, in ascending order.

 Remove dynamic k1 support and k1aCsi for the slots for which k1aCsi was not added to dlDataToUlAck

---

### 3.5.14 Resource list for CSI-RS/PUCCH for channel acquisition

#### 3.5.14.0-1 Resource list for CSI-RS/PUCCH for channel acquisition Resources provided to C-Plane (ID: 11116680)

**3.5.14.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11116686`)

Resource list for CSI-RS/PUCCH for channel acquisition The 5G-L2-PS defines several sets of resources that could used to configure the UEs specific needs, as follows:

 The sets of OFDM symbols available for the Channel State Information Reference signal (CSI-RS) transmissions

 The sets of PUCCH resources available for the Channels State reports used for channel feedback or beam management.

These sets are built, by the 5G-L2-PS, according to the data sent in the cell setup message. UE specific CSI-RS shall be supported and the sets are reported to the C-Plane through the PsCell_CellSetupResp message by using the availablePucchAndCsiRsResources structure.

Cell specific CSI-RS shall be allocated directly by L2 (5G_UP_ALG_2347_replaced([11114923](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpo7rvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))and returned to C-Plane through the structure **cellCsiRsTimeDomainAllocation.**

If {DlMimoMode is CL 8x4 and actDlSrsBm is false} or actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and **[Before CB008285-E-UPD001] numberOfTransmittedSsBlocks**[CB008285-E-UPD001] number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see 5G_UP_82_replaced([11347116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[End CB008285-E-UPD001] is less than or equal to 4, cell specific CSI-RS shall be returned to C-Plane while UE specific is not.** ****

If {actDlSrsBm is true and dlMimoMode is CL 8x4MIMO} **or {actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and numberOfTransmittedSsBlocks is greater than 4}, Both UE specific CSI-RS resource list and cell specific CSI-RS resource location shall be returned to C-Plane.**

For each slot defined in the rrmSlotPattern **as per 5G_UP_ALG_2313_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the 5G-L2-PS builds 4 bitmaps of 16 bits to indicate:**

 The primary list of OFDM symbols available for CSI-RS transmission (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) (see 5G_UP_ALG_2510_replaced([11116690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6BcfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and followings).

The primary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) is used to provide the C-Plane with the OFDM Symbols to be selected first for CSI-RS.

 The secondary list of OFDM symbols available for CSI-RS transmission (csiRsResourcesInDataSlots) (see 5G_UP_ALG_2510_replaced([11116690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6BcfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and followings).

The secondary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInDataSlots) is used to provide the C-Plane with the OFDM Symbols to be selected when there is no more symbols available in the primary list.

 The OFDM symbols associated to PUCCH (pucchResourceForCsiReport) (see 5G_UP_ALG_2535_replaced([11117394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-57fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and followings).

 The OFDM symbols associated to PUCCH not linked to HARQ feedback (goldenPucchResourcesForCsiReport).

---

#### 3.5.14.1 Resources for CSI-RS transmissions

##### 3.5.14.1.0-1 Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Identifying OFDM symbols for CSI-RS transmissions (ID: 11116693)

**3.5.14.1.0-1.0-10**  (ID: `12874653`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions For each slot within the slot pattern defined at the cell setup (rrmSlotPattern), the 5G-L2-PS set “1” into one of both bitmaps to activate the OFDM symbol in the pool of available symbol to handle CSI-RS transmissions. The 5G-L2-PS selects the primary or secondary list to indicate the availability of OFDM symbols according to the presence or not of signals and common channels in the slot.

The 5G-L2-PS selects the primary or secondary bitmap for a given slot, within the computed slot pattern (rrmSlotpattern), to specify the OFDM symbol(s) available to be configured with CSI-RS for channel feedback according to the presence of specific signals or/and common channels in the slot except the **the slots that are excluded by rdDisableUeSpecificCsiRsPerSlotFormatBitmap flag (see 5G_UP_ALG_12946_replaced([11118217](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAvHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

Note that the rest of this requirement only applies to FR1. For creation of the primary and secondary bitmaps in FR2, please refer to [11117380 (Available Resources for CSI-RS Transmissions in TDD FR2)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-56PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

In the primary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots),

  * the downlink OFDM symbols not configured to handle signal(s) and/or common channels are set available for CSI-RS transmission.

  * If NRCELL.actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is set to TRUE, **AND If NRCELL.addExtDelayCompensation is set to non-zero value (feature activation flag) or NRCELL.actPrachC2Scs15kHzTddFr1 set to TRUE, reserve 3 DL symbols on Bi-directional slots for PDSCH to be scheduled (after considering maximum PDCCH symbols configured in cell setup), and set aside the remaining symbols which can be used for allocating UE specific CSI-RS transmission. For this reservation purpose, PDSCH start symbol shall be calculated as per 5G_UP_ALG_6659_replaced([11115568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpvpVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**




The list of downlink slots considered in the primary bitmap are the following:

 The slots handling the configured SS/PBCH (see: [11347128: Configured SS/PBCH](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

 The slots handling the CSI-RS for beam management.

 The slots handling the CSI-RS for tracking.

 The slots available for SIB1 transmissions.

 BI6,4 slots not impacted by the previous cases.

 For FR1 the slots without the capacity handle the maximum size of the PDCCH defined by the "dmrsTypeAPosition", the smallest PDSCH allocation allowed (3 symbols including the front loaded DM-RS with PDSCH mapping Type A) and one free downlink symbol.

In the secondary bitmap, only the last downlink OFDM symbol of the downlink slots not listed above, is set available for CSI-RS transmission. The secondary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInDataSlots) is used for other downlink slots according to 5G_UP_ALG_2531_replaced([11117353](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-54PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For FR1 TDD the resultant slot format pattern (see [11114697: TDD slot format determination](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) shall be used as the rrmSlotPattern.

If {actDlSrsBm is true and dlMimoMode is CL 8x4MIMO} **or {actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see[11347116: Configured, activated, muted SS/PBCH blocks](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is greater than 4}, UE specific CSI-RS resource list and cell specific CSI-RS resource list shall be generated separately. The primary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) as defined in [11117226 (Unavailable OFDM Symbols for CSI-RS in the primary bitmap)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) shall be different; The secondary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInDataSlots) as defined in [11117351 (Available OFDM Symbols for CSI-RS in the secondary bitmap)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S3_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) shall be different.**

UE specific and cell specific CSI-RS may have different periodicity based on NIDD configuration.

If actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true: only cell specific CSI-RS resource list shall be generated.

If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and number of activated SS/PBCH (nActivatedSsPbch, see [11347116: Configured, activated, muted SS/PBCH blocks](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubJz2PvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is less than or equal to 4: only cell specific CSI-RS resource list shall be generated.

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true),

  * to generate Cell Specific CSI-RS resource list, ignore the procedure mentioned above, consider the procedure mentioned in [11116720 (CSI-RS Slot Selection with DL FR1 TDD PRB Pooling)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6ocfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) to identify the slots and symbols for Cell Specific CSI-RS transmission (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots & csiRsResourcesInDataSlots).
  * to generate UE specific CSI-RS resource list, consider the same procedure as earlier : The primary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2514_replaced([11117226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)); The secondary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInDataSlots) as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2530_replaced([11117351](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S3_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  * If actTddCsirsOpt is false or (actTddCsirsOpt is true, and ueSpecCsiRsSlotsRatio is 1 or not configured), the primary and secondary bitmaps for UE Specific CSI-RS shall not consider the symbols that might be allocated to CSI-RS for TRS/CSI-RS for Channel Acquisition in other CsiRsPooling Groups. List of such slots and the corresponding symbols can be obtained from 5G_UP_ALG**_19429_replaced([11116831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp7Pi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)),5G_UP_ALG_11874_replaced([11117149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9rwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and 5G_UP_ALG_25008_replaced([11116931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72n_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

  * If actTddCsirsOpt is true and ueSpecCsiRsSlotsRatio is configured and not 1, **only slots in selected slot offsets which are decided in 5G_UP_ALG_25278_replaced([11117209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9ry_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are considered for UE Specific CSI-RS by same procedure as earlier.**
  * The last symbol of a candidate slot for SIB1 shall be filled as available in the primary bitmap in the PsCell_CellSetupResp message.



In case the cell requires only Cell-Specific CSI-RS, the list of UE specific CSI-RS resources shall be marked as unavailable when forwarding it to CP-RT (as mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_2507_replaced([11116680](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6BbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). However, UE-Specific CSI-RS resources can be required by configuration in other cells of L1 Pool. Thus, L2-PS shall always calculate all potential UE-Specific CSI-RS resources and mark them as available in L2-PS in order to not use those symbols for PDSCH, unless the cell has been granted ZAB privilege as described below or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true, **[CB014543-H] [Note: when partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))], **[End CB014543-H]****

If actTddCsirsOpt is true, all potential UE Specific CSI-RS which might be used by other cells in same L1 pool are restricted in the selected slot offsets (5G_UP_ALG_25278_replaced([11117209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9ry_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The conditions that would require UE-Specific CSI-RS along with Cell-Specific CSI-RS are mentioned above in this requirement and in 5G_UP_ALG_2507_replaced([11116680](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6BbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**.**

End **If**

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or(slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true),

If the cell is not provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **[CB014543-H] [Note: w** hen partial ZAB is enabled (partialZABAllowed = True), the BBRM determines the set of ZAB-privileged cells according to the specification in ([12804289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ui5xYp6QEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). This privilege assignment may subsequently be overridden by the algorithm detailed in ([12825840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Onwec61_EfCyQasEtWkQ4A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))], **[End CB014543-H]**

and slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is false,

all the symbols that are marked as available for UE Specific CSI-RS transmission in the primary and the secondary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots, csiRsResourcesInDataSlots) shall not be used for any PDSCH transmissions.

Else

If actTddCsirsOpt is false,

all the symbols that are marked as available for UE Specific CSI-RS transmission in the primary and the secondary bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots, csiRsResourcesInDataSlots) shall be used for PDSCH transmissions as long as a valid SLIV exists (5G_UP_ALG_2375_replaced([11115218](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Else

Whether PDSCH can be scheduled on the CSI-RS symbol (which might be used by UE Specific CSI-RS in other pooling groups) shall follow 5G_UP_ALG_25278_replaced([11117209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9ry_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

End If

End If

End If

**Note: in this artifact, actTddCsirsOpt is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator.**

---

##### 3.5.14.1.0-2 Resources for CSI-RS transmissions CSI-RS Slot Selection with DL FR1 TDD PRB Pooling (ID: 11116720)

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11116723`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Determine slots for CSI-RS transmission with DL FR1 TDD PRB Pooling

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12816189`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true), L2-PS shall select particular slots within the slot pattern defined at the cell setup (rrmSlotPattern) and set “1” into one of the two bitmaps (csiRsResourcesinSsSlots & csiRsResourcesInDataSlots) to activate the OFDM symbol in the pool of available symbols which can later be allocated for cell specific CSI-RS transmissions. The 5G-L2-PS selects the primary or secondary list to indicate the availability of OFDM symbols according to the presence or not of signals and common channels in the slot.

For FR1 TDD the resultant slot format pattern of 5G_UP_ALG_2313_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be used as the rrmSlotPattern.

The slots that are considered to be allocated for CSI-RS transmission (and their subsequent filling of the two bitmaps) are determined as described in 5G_UP_ALG_11339_replaced([11116731](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6odPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true), the procedure mentioned here shall be used to allocate only Cell Specific CSI-RS resources.

**[CB015668-A]** Note: in this artifact, actTddCsirsOpt is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator. **[End CB015668-A]** ****

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11116731`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Rules to determine slots for CSI-RS transmission with DL FR1 TDD PRB Pooling

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-2.0-7**  (ID: `12816192`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions L2-PS shall support both Cell Specific & UE Specific CSI-RS. The rules mentioned below shall be used only to allocate Cell Specific CSI-RS resources.

UE Specific CSI-RS resources are allocated as mentioned in 5G_UP_ALG_2511_replaced([11116693](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6BcvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

L2-PS shall consider only the following slots as the list of available slots and resources to allocate CSI-RS and fill the subsequent resource lists (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots, csiRsResourcesInDataSlots) appropriately. All other slots are excluded.

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed = true AND actTddCsirsAllocOptimization = true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true),

If actTddCsirsOpt is false or rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset (defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32993_replaced([11118286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9MvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is True,

  1. Potential slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in the CsiRsPooling Group of the current cell are handled as described in **5G_UP_ALG_19433_replaced([11116748](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6oevvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

  2. Slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups are handled as described in 5G_UP_ALG_19429_replaced([11116831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp7Pi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).




All DL slots other than the ones considered in Steps 1 & 2 shall be excluded from the list of available resources for CSI-RS transmission.

Else

Slots allocated to Cell Specific CSI-RS in data slots are handled as described in 5G_UP_ALG_25008_replaced([11116931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72n_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

End If

End If

Note: When large BB pooling is enabled, i.e., slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and subcellDeactivationDlAllowed is true, each cell can have its subcells (up to 4 in total) spread across 2 L1 pools (with 2 L1 subpools per L1 pool). The primary subcell of all cells might be in different L1 pools. Hence, the procedure mentioned in this requirement shall be executed repeated in all L1 pools where the cells have their respective primary subcell. While executing the procedure, the same CsiRsPoolingGroupId is used acrossing all L1 Pools.

Rationale for exclusion : The total number of PRBs that can be processed per L1 instance is limited. Due to PRB pooling, these L1 resources are shared between cells in 3 separate CsiRsPoolingGroups (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Thus, L2-PS has to provide a fair share of the available resources (symbols for CSI-RS) to all CsiRsPoolingGroups. This is ensured by excluding some slots from CSI-RS allocation in each cell, such that the other cells in other CsiRsPoolingGroups will also be provided with some resources for CSI-RS transmission.

**[CB015668-A]** Note: in this artifact, actTddCsirsOpt is not get from NIDD but from L3 indicator. **[End CB015668-A]** ****

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11116748`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in the CsiRsPooling Group of the current cell

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11116751`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Overview

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-3.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `13420444`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions All cells on the same L1 instance (i.e. in the same L1 Pool) will have a common Frame Structure, hence L2-PS can consider the current cell's frame structure to determine the CSI-RS for TRS slots for the other cells in the same L1 Pool.

This calculation is not used for actual TRS / CSI-RS for channel acquisition scheduling but is performed to ensure zero allocations required by PRB pooling. The position of the current cell's TRS is determined by CP-RT during cell setup.

Restrictions for CSI-RS periodicity shall be adhered by L2-PS: 

  * (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * ssBurstPeriodicty should be set to 20ms
  * csirsTrackingPeriod > 3 * ssBurstPeriodicty (80ms : 160 slots)
  * CSI-RS for Acquisition (Cell-Specific) shall be accomodated in TRS slots whenever possible, hence,



If rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is True

  * CSI-RS Periodicity is restricted to [320 slots]



Else

If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is false, CSI-RS Periodicity is restricted to [160 slots, 320 slots]
  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true, CSI-RS Periodicity is restricted to [40 slots, 80 slots, 160 slots, 320 slots]



Else

Cell Specific CSI-RS periodicity is restricted as follows:

  * CSI-RS RS4(resource set#4(5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) Periodicity 40 slots, CSI-RS RS1(resource set#1(5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and RS2(resource set#2(5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) Periodicity 160 slots
  * CSI-RS RS4 Periodicity 80 slots, CSI-RS RS1 and RS2 Periodicity 80 slots
  * CSI-RS RS4 Periodicity 160 slots, CSI-RS RS1 and RS2 Periodicity 160 slots
  * CSI-RS RS4 Periodicity 320 slots, CSI-RS RS1 and RS2 Periodicity 320 slots.



If actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true, Cell Specific CSI-RS RS1 supports a periodicity of 40 slots. If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true, Cell Specific CSI-RS RS1 or RS4 supports a periodicity of 40 slots.

End If

End If

L2-PS shall use the hardcoded tables below to calculate the worst-case TRS configuration:

The table below (summarized from 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) provides the slot offsets where CSI-RS for TRS could be allocated for the various TDD frame structures.

(sfn,slot) : (0,0) of the rrmSlotPattern (generated in 5G_UP_ALG_2313_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) serves as the Reference slot for the offsets mentioned in the table.

Note: If rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is True and ([Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf [End 05454058-26R3] is False or not configured), the tables below shall not be used. TRS slot offsets i, & i+1 shall use i = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueI, TRS slot offset j shall use j = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueJ (Note: we only require slot offset j. j+1 is not needed and not used)

If [Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf [End 05454058-26R3] is True:

L2PS shall use the configured TRS slot offsets replacing the tables: [Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpParam16 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking.trsSlotOffsetI [End 05454058-26R3] as i (for i and i+1) and [Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpParam17 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking.trsSlotOffsetJ [End 05454058-26R3] (if configured) as j (for j and j+1).

Else If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Frame Structure |  | TRS Slot Offsets |   
Type | Variant | i, i+1 | j, j+1  
tdLte | 0ms | 20, 21 | 18, 19  
3ms | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |   
Semi-Static | 1:4 | 20, 21 | 16, 17  
3:7 | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |   
4:6 | 20, 21 | 16, None |   
  
Note: Semi-Static 4:6 does not have TRS Slots at offsets j, j+1. However, L2-PS shall still consider offset j=16 since we require 3 slots for the CSI-RS allocation. Slot offset j in this scenario shall be used for CSI-RS allocation.

Else

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Frame Structure |  | TRS Slot Offsets |   
Type | Variant | i, i+1 | j, j+1  
tdLte | 0ms | 20, 21 | 36, 37  
3ms | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |   
tdLteConfig0 | 20, 21 | 22, 32 |   
Semi-Static | 1:4 | 20, 21 | 16, 17  
3:7 | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |   
4:6 | 20, 21 | 31, 32 |   
  
Note: tdLteConfig0 does not have TRS slot offsets j, j+1. However, L2-PS shall still **consider offset j as 22 & (j+1) as 32 since we require 4 slots for the CSI-RS allocation. Slot offsets j, j+1 in this scenario shall be used for CSI-RS allocation. These slots have been chosen instead of 2 consecutive slots due to the limited number of DL slots available with this frame structure.**

End If

Input :

  * CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell.
  * TDD Frame Structure
  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and (actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true or actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true) or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true), period of CSI-RS (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2571_replaced([11299301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqS6EfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * Hardcoded tables for TRS offsets above and [Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15, NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpParam16, NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpParam17 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf, NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking.trsSlotOffsetI, NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking.trsSlotOffsetJ [End 05454058-26R3]
  * rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32993_replaced([11118286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9MvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueI is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32995_replaced([11118293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9NPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueJ is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32997_replaced([11118299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9NvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))



The following steps will list out all the slots that could be potentially used for TRS in the CsiRsPoolingGroup of the current cell,

1\. Determine the list of slot offsets to be considered:

If**rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is True and [Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf [End 05454058-26R3] is False or not configured)**

All cells in all CsiRsPoolingGroups shall use the same slots for TRS.

TRS slot offsets i, & i+1 shall use i = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueI

TRS slot offset j shall use j = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueJ (Note: we only require slot offset j. j+1 is not needed and not used)

Go to "End"

Else:

Determine the list of slot offsets to be considered from the table above based on the TDD Frame structure of the current cell (all mentioned slot offsets in a row need to be considered).

End If

  1. Calculate TRS Slot offsets as : (Offset from Table) + (CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell * 40) : (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (for all i, i+1, j, j+1 offsets)



If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false, 

Note: If a column has None (example: Semi-Static 4:6 -> Row j+1), no additional calculation for that row is needed.

End

  1. List of slot offsets used for CSI-RS for TRS is generated.

  2. End




If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true)

If rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is True and ([Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf [End 05454058-26R3] is False or not configured):

All cells in all CsiRsPoolingGroups shall use the same slots for TRS.

TRS slot offsets i, & i+1 shall use i = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueI

TRS slot offset j shall use j = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueJ (Note: we only require slot offset j. j+1 is not needed and not used)

Else

If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

If actExplicitCsirsPoolSolution is false**,**

Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in the CsiRsPooling Group of the current cell - Basic is handled as described in 5G_UP_ALG_11941_replaced([11116787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp7PgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Else

Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in the CsiRsPooling Group of the current cell - Extensions for TDD FR1 is handled as described in 5G_UP_ALG_19177_replaced([11116803](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp7Pg_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

End If

Else

Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in the CsiRsPooling Group of the current cell - Optimization for wideband TRS for TDD FR1 is handled as described in 5G_UP_ALG_25400_replaced([11116811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp7PhfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

End If 

End If 

End If

Notes:

  * An example for determining CSI-RS for TRS slots for other CsiRsPooling Groups is described in 5G_UP_ALG_11964_replaced([11116818](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp7Ph_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11116787`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in the CsiRsPooling Group of the current cell - Basic

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-3.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12581105`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions List out all the slots that could be potentially used for TRS in the CsiRsPoolingGroup of the current cell, refer to the steps in 5G_UP_ALG_19435_replaced([11116751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6oe_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**L2-PS shall consider only the 1st Slot offset from the list (slot offset i) as available for CSI-RS (ACQ) transmission and fill the primary resources bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) for this slot as per 5G_UP_ALG_2514_replaced([11117226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

If the cell is provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CNI-147211-B] or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true [End CNI-147211-B] , **L2-PS can perform PDSCH scheduling in any of the slot offsets from the list above as long as a valid SLIV exists, else,** **L2-PS shall skip scheduling PDSCH in the slot offsets if they might also be allocated for Cell Specific CSI-RS in the other CsiRsPooling Groups.**

(PDSCH scheduled in such slots can be allocated PRBs only up to the numAllocCellPrb provided to the cell by the BBRM)

Slot offsets allocated for CSI-RS in other CsiRsPooling Groups can be determined from 5G_UP_ALG_11874_replaced([11117149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9rwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11116803`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in the CsiRsPooling Group of the current cell - Extensions for TDD FR1

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11116806`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions List out all the slots that could be potentially used for TRS in the CsiRsPoolingGroup of the current cell, refer to same steps in 5G_UP_ALG_19435_replaced([11116751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6oe_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true, 

Offsets = remove Slot Offset (j+1+CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell * 40) from List of slot offsets used for CSI-RS for TRS, as the Slot Offset is not allocated for CSI-RS resources. Note: Offsets is the calculated list of TRS slots in the CsiRsPoolingGroup of the current cell.

CSI-RS resources needed by current cell needs to be allocated into TRS slot offsets in the CsiRsPoolingGroup of current cell according to 5G_UP_ALG_19019_replaced([11117052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_19022_replaced([11117066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EtPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), thus L2PS shall consider following Slot Offsets from the list as available for CSI-RS (ACQ) transmission:

Note: Tables in 5G_UP_ALG_19019_replaced([11117052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_19022_replaced([11117066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EtPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for Multi-Set CSI-RS resource allocation can be used as a reference for the allocation into TRS slots in CsiRsPoolingGroup of current cell and CSI-RS symbols.

If period of CSI-RS = 40 slots,

If CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell = 0 or 1, 

Offsets[Mod(CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell, MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups(5G_CP_ARC_ALG_4283_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))], in case CSI-RS Resource Set#1 is needed in current cell (5G_UP_ALG_7720_replaced([11115018](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Offsets[Mod(CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell+1, MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups)], in case CSI-RS Resource Set#2 is needed in current cell.

Offsets[Mod(CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell+2, MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups)], in case CSI-RS Resource Set#4 is needed in current cell.

Else If CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell = 2,

Offsets[Mod(CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell+1, MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups)], in case CSI-RS Resource Set#1 is needed in current cell.

Offsets[Mod(CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell, MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups)], in case CSI-RS Resources Set#2 is needed in current cell.

Offsets[Mod(CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell+2, MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups)], in case CSI-RS Resource Set#4 is needed in current cell.

End If

Else If period of CSI-RS = 80 slots,

If CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell = 0, 2 

Offsets[Mod(CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell + 2, MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups)], in case CSI-RS Resource Set#4 is needed in current cell.

Else If CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell = 1,

Offsets[Mod(CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell, MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups)], in case CSI-RS Resource Set#1 is needed in current cell.

Offsets[Mod(CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell + 1, MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups)], in case CSI-RS Resources Set#2 is needed in current cell.

End If

Else If period of CSI-RS = 160 or 320 slots, 

If CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell = 0, 1 

Offsets[CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell], in case CSI-RS Resource Set#1 is needed in current cell.

Else If CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell = 2, 

Offsets[CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell], in case CSI-RS Resource Set#2 is needed in current cell.

End If

End If 

L2PS shall fill the primary resources bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) for these slots as per 5G_UP_ALG_2514_replaced([11117226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_19019_replaced([11117052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_19022_replaced([11117066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EtPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) according to the period of CSI-RS. 

End If

If the cell is provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

L2-PS can perform PDSCH scheduling in any of the slot offsets from the list above as long as a valid SLIV exists, 

else,

L2-PS shall skip scheduling PDSCH in the slot offsets if they might also be allocated for Cell Specific CSI-RS in the other CsiRsPooling Groups. 

Note: L2-PS shall schedule PDSCH with Rate Matching in slot offset (j+1+CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell *40), as Cell Specific CSI-RS are not allocated to the slot offset and current cell is transmitting TRS in the slot offset. 

End If

(PDSCH scheduled in such slots can be allocated PRBs only up to the numAllocCellPrb provided to the cell by the BBRM)

Slot offsets allocated for CSI-RS in other CsiRsPooling Groups can be determined from 5G_UP_ALG_11874_replaced([11117149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9rwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `11116811`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in the CsiRsPooling Group of the current cell - Optimization for wideband TRS for TDD FR1

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-3.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `12580696`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions gNB-DU shall list out all the slots that could be potentially used for TRS in the CsiRsPoolingGroup of the current cell, refer to same steps in 5G_UP_ALG_19435_replaced([11116751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6oe_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

gNB-DU shall allocate CSI-RS resources needed by current cell into TRS slot offsets in the CsiRsPoolingGroup of current cell according to 5G_UP_ALG_25404_replaced([11117092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), thus gNB-DU shall consider following Slot Offsets from the list as available for CSI-RS (ACQ) transmission:

Note: Tables in 5G_UP_ALG_25404_replaced([11117092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for Multi-Set CSI-RS resource allocation can be used as a reference for the allocation into TRS slots in CsiRsPoolingGroup of current cell and CSI-RS symbols.

If period of CSI-RS = 40 slots,

period of CSI-RS RS4(resource set#4(5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) is 40 slots, period of CSI-RS RS1(resource set#1(5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and RS2(resource set#2(5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) is 160 slots

slot offset for CSI-RS Resource Set#4 is Offsets[CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell + 1]

slot offset for CSI-RS Resource Set#1 and Set#2 is Offsets[0]

If actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true, only Cell Specific CSI-RS RS1 with 40 slots period is supported, and same period as period of CSI-RS from CPRT. In this case, CSI-RS RS1 will be allocated in the slot offset of RS4 in the allocation above.

If NRCELL.dlMimoMode is equal to '8x4 Closed Loop Spatial Multiplexing' And (NRCELL.actExternalAntennaBF is equal to TRUE or NRCELL.mMimoAntArrayMode is equal to ('Top 16TRX Array (1x8x2)' or 'Bottom 16TRX Array (1x8x2)')), only Cell Specific CSI-RS RS1 with 40 slots period is supported, and same period as period of CSI-RS from CPRT. In this case, CSI-RS RS1 will be allocated in the slot offset of RS4 in the allocation above.

If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true, only Cell Specific CSI-RS RS1 or RS4 with 40 slots period is supported, and same period as period of CSI-RS from CPRT. In this case, CSI-RS RS1 or RS4 will be allocated in the slot offset of RS4 in the allocation above.

Else If period of CSI-RS = 80 slots,

period of CSI-RS RS4 is 80 slots, period of CSI-RS RS1 and RS2 is 80 slots

If CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell = 0,

slot offset for CSI-RS Resource Set#4 is Offsets[CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell + 1]

If CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell = 1, 2,

slot offset for CSI-RS Resource Set#1 and Set#2 is Offsets[CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell + 1]

Else If period of CSI-RS = 160 slots then period of CSI-RS RS1, RS2 and RS4 is 160 slots, or If period of CSI-RS = 320 slots then period of CSI-RS RS1, RS2 and RS4 is 320 slots

slot offset for CSI-RS Resource Set#1 and Set#2 is Offsets[0]

End If 

gNB-DU shall fill the primary resources bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) for these slots as per 5G_UP_ALG_2514_replaced([11117226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_25404_replaced([11117092](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 

No matter the cell is provided ZAB privilege or not by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **gNB-DU can perform PDSCH scheduling with rate matching in any of the slot offsets from the list above as long as a valid SLIV exists.**

If the cell is not provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CNI-147211-B] and cell is not TDD eCPRI 7-2e [End CNI-147211-B] ,

PDSCH can not be scheduled on last several symbols which might be allocated to Cell Specific CSI-RS for cells in other pooling groups.slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed 

End If

Slot offsets which might be allocated for CSI-RS in other CsiRsPooling Groups can be determined from 5G_UP_ALG_11874_replaced([11117149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9rwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11116818`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Example : Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in the CsiRsPooling Group of the current cell

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `12580697`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Example:

Consider for the current cell:

\- CsiRsPoolingGroupId : 1,

\- TDD Frame Structure : SemiStatic 1:4

\- If **slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true** [CNI-147211-B] or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true [End CNI-147211-B] and**(actExplicitCsirsPoolSolution or actTddCsirsAllocOptimization)** is true, period of CSI-RS = 40 slots****

Based on the Frame Structure,

L2-PS shall consider Slot Offsets mentioned in row 4 of the table in 5G_UP_ALG_19435 (Corresponding to SemiStatic 1:4 Frame Structure) for further processing, i.e. Slot Offsets : 20, 21, 16, 17

CsiRsPoolingGroupId for current cell = 1,

  * Slot Offsets for TRS = (Offsets from Table) + (CsiRsPoolingGroupId * 40) : (Offset from Table) + (1 * 40)
  * The resultant offsets are : [60, 61, 56, 57]



Final list of TRS slot offsets : [60, 61, 56, 57]

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true [CNI-147211-B] or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true) [End CNI-147211-B] ,

If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

**If actExplicitCsirsPoolSolution is false** ,****

L2-PS shall consider only the 1st Slot offset from the list (slot offset i) : 60

Fill the primary resources bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) for slot offset 60 as per 5G_UP_2514_replaced([11390448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufTUCPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Slot offsets allocated for CSI-RS in other CsiRsPooling Groups for the cell inputs in this example as per 5G_UP_ALG_11874_replaced([11117149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9rwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) : [20, 61, 96, 100, 21, 56]

From the 2 lists above, slot offsets [61, 56] overlap.

If the cell is provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **L2-PS shall proceed with PDSCH scheduling in slot offsets [61, 56] as long as there exists a valid SLIV, else,** L2-PS shall skip PDSCH scheduling in slot offsets [61, 56].****

(PDSCH scheduled in slot offsets [61, 56] can be allocated PRBs only upto the numAllocCellPrb provided to the cell by the BBRM)

Else

Remove Slot Offset (j+1+40) from List of slot offsets used for CSI-RS for TRS, as the Slot Offset is not allocated for CSI-RS resources and will then have: [60, 61, 56].

**L2-PS shall consider all Slot offsets from the list (i+40, i+1+40, and j+40) : [60, 61, 56]**

Fill the primary resources bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) for slot offset [61] as per 5G_UP_ALG_2514_replaced([11117226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_19019_replaced([11117052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in case CSI RS Resource Set#1 is needed in current cell (5G_UP_ALG_7720_replaced([11115018](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), for the period of CSI-RS =40 slots.

Fill the primary resources bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) for slot offset [56] as per 5G_UP_ALG_2514_replaced([11117226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_19019_replaced([11117052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in case CSI RS Resource Set#2 is needed in current cell, for the period of CSI-RS =40 slots.

Fill the primary resources bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) for slot offset [60] as per 5G_UP_ALG_2514_replaced([11117226](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp-S0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_19019_replaced([11117052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9EsvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in case CSI RS Resource Set#4 is needed in current cell, for the period of CSI-RS =40 slots.

Slot offsets allocated for CSI-RS in other CsiRsPooling Groups for the cell inputs in this example as per 5G_UP_ALG_11874_replaced([11117149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp9rwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) : [20, 21, 16, 60, 61, 56, 100, 101, 96, 140, 141, 136]

From the 2 lists above, slot offsets [60, 61, 56] overlap.

If the cell is provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **L2-PS shall proceed with PDSCH scheduling in slot offsets [60, 61, 56] as long as there exists a valid SLIV, else,** L2-PS shall skip PDSCH scheduling in slot offsets [60, 61, 56].****

(PDSCH scheduled in slot offsets [60, 61, 56] can be allocated PRBs only upto the numAllocCellPrb provided to the cell by the BBRM)

**End If**

Else

Slot Offset for CSI-RS Resource Set#4 is Offsets[CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell + 1]: Offset[2] = 56.

Slot Offset for CSI-RS Resource Set#1 and Set#2 is Offsets[0] = 60.

Fill the primary resources bitmap (csiRsResourcesInSsSlots) for slot offset 60 for RS1 and RS2, slot offset 56 for RS4.

No matter the cell is provided ZAB privilege or not by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **gNB-DU can perform PDSCH scheduling with rate matching in any of the slot offsets from the list above as long as a valid SLIV exists.**

[CNI-147211-B] if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is false and [End CNI-147211-B] If the cell is not provided ZAB privilege by the BBRM for current pooling period (5G_UP_ALG_14549_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), PDSCH can not be scheduled on last several symbols which might be allocated to Cell Specific CSI-RS for cells in other pooling groups 

End If

End If 

(sfn,slot) : (0,0) of the rrmSlotPattern (generated in 5G_UP_ALG_2313_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) serves as the Reference slot for the offsets above.

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `11116831`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPooling Groups

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11116834`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions Overview

---

**3.5.14.1.0-2.0-5.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `13420447`)

Resources for CSI-RS transmissions if (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true)

  * There is no more ZAB context, so if rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset (defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32995_replaced([11118293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9NPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is False , no need to implement any PDSCH restriction linked to other pooling group TRS transmission but if rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is True , PDSCH transmissions is not allowed on slot with TRS transmission . This requirement is still valid to generate UE specific CSI-RS resource list (see [11116693: Identifying OFDM symbols for CSI-RS transmissions](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6BcvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).



else if (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false)

  * CSI-RS scheme used is the non pooled one, this requirement shall be considered as invalid. (Rational: actTddCsirsAllocOptimization equal TRUE is considered as the default 7.2e pooled CSI-RS scheme)



else

  * this requirement is valid.



All cells on the same L1 instance (i.e. in the same L1 Pool) will have a common Frame Structure, hence L2-PS can consider the current cell's frame structure to determine the CSI-RS for TRS slots for cells in other CsiRsPoolingGroups.

This calculation is not used for actual TRS / CSI-RS for channel acquisition scheduling but is performed to ensure zero allocations required by PRB pooling. The position of the current cell's TRS is determined by CP-RT during cell setup.

Restrictions for CSI-RS periodicity shall be adhered by L2-PS:

  * (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * ssBurstPeriodicty should be set to 20ms
  * csirsTrackingPeriod > 3 * ssBurstPeriodicty (80ms : 160 slots)
  * CSI-RS for Acquisition (Cell-Specific) shall be accommodated in TRS slots whenever possible, hence,



If rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is True

  * CSI-RS Periodicity is restricted to [320 slots]



Else

If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is false, CSI-RS Periodicity is restricted to [160 slots, 320 slots]
  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true, CSI-RS Periodicity is restricted to [40 slots, 80 slots, 160 slots, 320 slots]



Else

Cell Specific CSI-RS periodicity is restricted as follows:

  * CSI-RS RS4(resource set#4(5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) Periodicity 40 slots, CSI-RS RS1(resource set#1(5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) and RS2(resource set#2(5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))) Periodicity 160 slots
  * CSI-RS RS4 Periodicity 80 slots, CSI-RS RS1 and RS2 Periodicity 80 slots
  * CSI-RS RS4 Periodicity 160 slots, CSI-RS RS1 and RS2 Periodicity 160 slots
  * CSI-RS RS4 Periodicity 320 slots, CSI-RS RS1 and RS2 Periodicity 320 slots
  * If actCellCsiRsImTddNonBf is true, Cell Specific CSI-RS RS1 supports a periodicity of 40 slots. If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true, Cell Specific CSI-RS RS1 or RS4 supports a periodicity of 40 slots.



End

End

L2-PS shall use the hardcoded tables below to calculate the worst-case TRS configuration:

The table below (summarized from 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) provides the slot offsets where CSI-RS for TRS could be allocated for the various TDD frame structures.

(sfn,slot) : (0,0) of the rrmSlotPattern (generated in 5G_UP_ALG_2313_replaced([11114697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnGefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) serves as the Reference slot for the offsets mentioned in the table.

Note: If rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is True and ([Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf [End 05454058-26R3] is False or not configured), the tables below shall not be used. TRS slot offsets i, & i+1 shall use i = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueI, TRS slot offset j shall use j = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueJ (Note: we only require slot offset j. j+1 is not needed and not used)

If [Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf [End 05454058-26R3] is True:

L2PS shall use the configured TRS slot offsets replacing the tables: [Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpParam16 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking.trsSlotOffsetI [End 05454058-26R3] as i (for i and i+1) and [Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpParam17 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking.trsSlotOffsetJ [End 05454058-26R3] (if configured) as j (for j and j+1).

Else If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Frame Structure |  | TRS Slot Offsets |   
Type | Variant | i, i+1 | j, j+1  
tdLte | 0ms | 20, 21 | 18, 19  
3ms | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |   
Semi-Static | 1:4 | 20, 21 | 16, 17  
3:7 | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |   
4:6 | 20, 21 | 16, None |   
  
Note: Semi-Static 4:6 does not have TRS Slots at offsets j, j+1. However, L2-PS shall still consider offset j=16 since we require 3 slots for the CSI-RS allocation. Slot offset j in this scenario shall be used for CSI-RS allocation.

Else

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Frame Structure |  | TRS Slot Offsets |   
Type | Variant | i, i+1 | j, j+1  
tdLte | 0ms | 20, 21 | 36, 37  
3ms | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |   
tdLteConfig0 | 20, 21 | 22, 32 |   
Semi-Static | 1:4 | 20, 21 | 16, 17  
3:7 | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |   
4:6 | 20, 21 | 31, 32 |   
  
Note: tdLteConfig0 does not have TRS slot offsets j, j+1. However, L2-PS shall still **consider offset j as 22 & (j+1) as 32 since we require 4 slots for the CSI-RS allocation. Slot offsets j, j+1 in this scenario shall be used for CSI-RS allocation. These slots have been chosen instead of 2 consecutive slots due to the limited number of DL slots available with this frame structure.**

End

Input :

  * CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell.
  * TDD Frame Structure
  * If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true and (actBbPoolExtensionTddFr1 is true or actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true), period of CSI-RS (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2571_replaced([11299301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqS6EfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2350_replaced([11115014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpqJyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
  * List of all CsiRsPoolingGroupIds : a list which contains all CsiRsPoolingGroupIds in same L1 Pool.
  * Hardcoded tables for TRS offsets above and [Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15, NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpParam16, NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpParam17 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf, NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking.trsSlotOffsetI, NRBTS.NRCELL.csirsForTracking.trsSlotOffsetJ [End 05454058-26R3]
  * rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32993_replaced([11118286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9MvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueI is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32995_replaced([11118293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9NPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
  * rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueJ is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_32997_replaced([11118299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9NvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))



The following steps will list out all the slots that could be potentially used for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups,

1\. Determine the list of slot offsets to be considered:

If**rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is True and ([Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf [End 05454058-26R3] is False or not configured)**

All cells in all CsiRsPoolingGroups shall use the same slots for TRS.

TRS slot offsets i, & i+1 shall use i = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueI

TRS slot offset j shall use j = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueJ (Note: we only require slot offset j. j+1 is not needed and not used)

Go to "End"

Else:

Determine the list of slot offsets to be considered from the table above based on the TDD Frame structure of the current cell (all mentioned slot offsets in a row need to be considered).

End If

  1. For each CsiRsPoolingGroupId != (CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell)



Calculate TRS Slot offsets as : (Offset from Table) + (CsiRsPoolingGroupId * 40) : (5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2020_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (for all i, i+1, j, j+1 offsets)

If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

Note: If a column has None (example: Semi-Static 4:6 -> Row j+1), no additional calculation for that row is needed.

End

  1. List of slot offsets used for CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPoolingGroups is generated.

  2. End




If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true,

If rdReallocateCsiRsSlotOffset is True and ([Before 05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.tmpActFeat2.Bit15 [05454058-26R3] NRBTS.NRCELL.actTrsSlotOffsetConf [End 05454058-26R3] is False or not configured)

All cells in all CsiRsPoolingGroups shall use the same slots for TRS.

TRS slot offsets i, & i+1 shall use i = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueI

TRS slot offset j shall use j = rdCsiRsSlotOffsetForcedValueJ (Note: we only require slot offset j. j+1 is not needed and not used)

Else

If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

If actExplicitCsirsPoolSolution is false**,**

Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPooling Groups - Basic is handled as described in 5G_UP_ALG_11311_replaced([11116871](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72kvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Else

Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPooling Groups - Extensions for TDD FR1 for Cell Specific CSI-RS periodicity 40 and 80 slots is handled as described in 5G_UP_ALG_19185_replaced([11116886](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72lfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPooling Groups - Extensions for TDD FR1 for Cell Specific CSI-RS periodicity 160 and 320 slots is handled as described in 5G_UP_ALG_19181_replaced([11116893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72l_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**_*End If_** *

Else

Determine slots allocated to CSI-RS for TRS in other CsiRsPooling Groups - Optimization for wideband TRS for TDD FR1 is handled as described in 5G_UP_ALG_25402_replaced([11116898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72mfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

End If

End If

End If

Notes:

  * An example for determining CSI-RS for TRS slots for other CsiRsPooling Groups is described in 5G_UP_ALG_11959_replaced([11116906](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72m_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
